subject: What's your pronoun, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We need to stop focusing on pronouns and start focusing on keeping our country safe| | | What's your pronoun, Peter? Joe Biden has taken the most respected and feared military in the world and turned it into a college campus safe space. The military is the absolute LAST place that should have anything to do with "woke."China is laughing at us, Peter! We need to stop focusing on pronouns and start focusing on keeping our country safe and secure. **[Will you take the Military Readiness Assessment to help us de-woke our military? Follow this link to take the assessment.>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=802e0e6a1d9642d395dff6e6d8b76647&_e=GxqbrOrru8VPXLPrZhbr8ARPnPLjNVVZljAoXqrc-lQ80qQegDuWiguhq93NLinrFioEktTbVT0KoPW0iwYuuseVPfCkqasIIIcp24YKQfaAc-_lRSPTn5dJtP1ZO80CezsGHnte5r1ye7CHh7qAueAwCbzmwZ3uoDwJjzPh12mdXQiwskPcnJpdC-1igq8Y-gQnKpCJmQ7RsM3GR_n3n6-xOqEgIti0QXkYcyHKOI8_CmWU-x5sOR6ZIqV3E1qEpX-6ZfvoCBoYcRiJFoOjUd315oSZluCuiPZkJGk4mOHjC-qaf8picBCbYkvwrUM0WnbwfSTSiYbAU-7BAT30cGwqj8Q_ls7g2CtJFmtEQLyUEFXKvf8x6iMCCYkZ3N-q5pfSy-frag9vZ1knD-W_QPZhTDqJnHVJq6Rx6o71AHdE1EklEA2qKdSrrQSV2gFrLRiYYdgv07kHaqmSp3aqrw%3D%3D)**

name: The Sheriff
subject: The SWAMP doing what it does best
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Why in the HELL would New York state be awarded $130 million for migrant containment efforts when states like Arizona bear the brunt of the illegal activity?
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=8878a0b9f85e410f81b04d6a26c6b4f9&_t=-jMXjSbpusDmEyxsw7qqvM1bDQZWOxXJeHnIhc277xz_jZ7ihSPOT4NkItxdmhPi-1DPKYULa6Qebt-HwuoMa-9jandkcLlNVZkBsUdyAZw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=8878a0b9f85e410f81b04d6a26c6b4f9&_t=-jMXjSbpusDmEyxsw7qqvM1bDQZWOxXJeHnIhc277xz_jZ7ihSPOT4NkItxdmhPi-1DPKYULa6Qebt-HwuoMa-9jandkcLlNVZkBsUdyAZw%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8878a0b9f85e410f81b04d6a26c6b4f9&_e=8RX5g1vpFvlBVmp_xFQ0Zn--pWgAru9944PuxmMfLaZhlo4UO6yaqkD9AauIopD-vy2M6-vTyBpfTuVA1sR7cx9wyHB7JbLK9ZjSBghtMjjcpAkgVuPd3_Rzv01hSuMvsC2BGysYPnGFm8-YS_ft4wAb0WbWK9-AjrZa8Xfh4lJm33863mv-YROlDR2xEEYuXKYx9rDBWXb89KC2EmAW7jlRdHz2CfqRrubid46Ux2Drbae27ldaUGeeJh1n9Kvthr1jzmDKYk4MLXdCOqpZPRNzqv_QsSui1dA8ve-I6hulnChuTNQQOt5yPz-H1NwM84dQAO6EeiGZ38Dkugi-I60tZYZrUbQhcz4soAu-0Ns45xqt6S4O5Ki_buHV3rqIVbMrL7SvVG3Kn5LvVVZmjA%3D%3D)
| $130 MILLION TO NEW YORK CITY TO MANAGE **_"MIGRANT CRISIS"_**
Fellow Conservative,

Our Southern Border is not secure and every member of the House and Senate, whether they want to admit it or not, knows it. **There have been 2,310,987 border encounters in fiscal year 2023 so far; in 2022, there were 2,378,944!**

As Sheriff of Pinal County – Arizona’s 3rd largest – it’s up to me and my deputies to ensure the security of the communities under our jurisdiction. And unlike President Biden and Washington Democrats, I don’t play favorites. **As I see it, every man, woman, and child deserve a safe community in which to live. Again, that’s my belief, and it’s not necessarily one that the President or the Senate majority leader share. **

_**IF THEY DID, $130 MILLION**_ in federal aid wouldn’t have gone to New York City to help their city manage their own “migrant surge.” **Think about it:** New York doesn’t share a border with Mexico like Arizona does, so why would the Federal Emergency Management Agency funnel such a significant amount of cash to New York City? Well, probably because Chuck Schumer is from Brooklyn! Want to know something else Arizona doesn’t have that New York City does? **Deep pocketed Democrat donors who aren’t used to migrants freely wondering into their upper crust communities uninvited.**

Meanwhile in Arizona where we’re bearing the brunt of illegal border encounters, along with New Mexico, Texas and California, **we’ve received just $45 million from feds to help prevent overcrowding in migrant facilities.**
**
** **THIS IS AS WRONG AS WRONG GETS!**

**[I’m asking you to chip in $5, $10, or even $25 right now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8878a0b9f85e410f81b04d6a26c6b4f9&_e=8RX5g1vpFvlBVmp_xFQ0Zn--pWgAru9944PuxmMfLaZhlo4UO6yaqkD9AauIopD-vy2M6-vTyBpfTuVA1sR7cx9wyHB7JbLK9ZjSBghtMjjcpAkgVuPd3_Rzv01hSuMvsC2BGysYPnGFm8-YS_ft4wAb0WbWK9-AjrZa8Xfh4lJm33863mv-YROlDR2xEEYuXKYx9rDBWXb89KC2EmAW7jlRdHz2CfqRrubid46Ux2Drbae27ldaUGeeJh1n9KvtwDL4_XUPf38euQeEokIIZPKeVbwGeiAY1vUbPSp7lHj3JZr7DiW8zl5y5WC1p1Qw-z80QVw_yEOuOmn2FPwqhO4ElsnsDCLdLVT3qdYr3Txjm60uKt2I4OHrFr0h06GtIFiZnRcqg8iGH5dTosQyiw%3D%3D)** to my Senate campaign because you, and everyone reading this right now, needs a law enforcement official who understands the true crisis we’re facing at our border as Arizona’s next U.S. Senator.

[**INVEST IN BORDER PROTECTION
INVEST IN SHERIFF LAMB**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8878a0b9f85e410f81b04d6a26c6b4f9&_e=8RX5g1vpFvlBVmp_xFQ0Zn--pWgAru9944PuxmMfLaZhlo4UO6yaqkD9AauIopD-vy2M6-vTyBpfTuVA1sR7cx9wyHB7JbLK9ZjSBghtMjjcpAkgVuPd3_Rzv01hSuMvsC2BGysYPnGFm8-YS_ft4wAb0WbWK9-AjrZa8Xfh4lJm33863mv-YROlDR2xEEYuXKYx9rDBWXb89KC2EmAW7jlRdHz2CfqRrubid46Ux2Drbae27ldaUGeeJh1n9KvtCC9x8ArUczVd7pb9ulnCS5B2Xc-PfqrBuWXCkTUHEpQ0H20aQDQ5Fbv66JjmnvKTfEhyV9kWDE5p_4fxXvPHmlFgZUUDrfbyY6oD1Q9-B9GfnsZm6qqD38PGlLKZ7I9M1aGnTILh1XUWtL1FuAycxg%3D%3D)
I’m running for the United States Senate because every American family deserves to feel safe in their homes – not just New York City Democrats. If I had it my way, the border would be completely shut down. But without a Republican in the White Hour or a majority in the Senate, that’s currently not an option. **[What we can do to start addressing the ever-spiraling problem is to boot Democrats from office that can’t seem to figure out how to get border communities and Border Patrol agents the funds they need to secure our homeland.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8878a0b9f85e410f81b04d6a26c6b4f9&_e=8RX5g1vpFvlBVmp_xFQ0Zn--pWgAru9944PuxmMfLaZhlo4UO6yaqkD9AauIopD-vy2M6-vTyBpfTuVA1sR7cx9wyHB7JbLK9ZjSBghtMjjcpAkgVuPd3_Rzv01hSuMvsC2BGysYPnGFm8-YS_ft4wAb0WbWK9-AjrZa8Xfh4lJm33863mv-YROlDR2xEEYuXKYx9rDBWXb89KC2EmAW7jlRdHz2CfqRrubid46Ux2Drbae27ldaUGeeJh1n9KvteJh_RkfttgJrMg35q8CPkghSro1lqOKvKFWc4aAWPuKKE_RDQtDRyheTeIHTHkTQqBJcX784fHM9RWZ8Vhg132r9dXbV1zDA-wgU3BV2trXQozBkk6t0R7jLfsuAqUxBCQLSUBJTSzUKieW-f_aXbA%3D%3D)**

Arizona’s border communities, our cities, and frankly our entire state is being made to feel that folks in New York City are more deserving of safe living spaces than those of us living in border communities.

**Frankly, it's outrageous.**

**[Please let me know if you can assist today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8878a0b9f85e410f81b04d6a26c6b4f9&_e=8RX5g1vpFvlBVmp_xFQ0Zn--pWgAru9944PuxmMfLaZhlo4UO6yaqkD9AauIopD-vy2M6-vTyBpfTuVA1sR7cx9wyHB7JbLK9ZjSBghtMjjcpAkgVuPd3_Rzv01hSuMvsC2BGysYPnGFm8-YS_ft4wAb0WbWK9-AjrZa8Xfh4lJm33863mv-YROlDR2xEEYuXKYx9rDBWXb89KC2EmAW7jlRdHz2CfqRrubid46Ux2Drbae27ldaUGeeJh1n9Kvtb0NR50J7tg4V87kXflmOYFth8wly10-UawXnrAV5409N0VgV03MLNsoHORRt_HXUZkkcCblOjGaFrHepynFpW8b-4AMDP4hzgI-W6RcfKSxyBP-Me7Awee8KgzSJgTdoXRz6UqPzwDjQUkGMMzGU8A%3D%3D)** We cannot allow Democrats states to disproportionately benefit from federal aid money just because their members of Congress are in positions of power.
[**INVEST IN BORDER PROTECTION
INVEST IN SHERIFF LAMB**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8878a0b9f85e410f81b04d6a26c6b4f9&_e=8RX5g1vpFvlBVmp_xFQ0Zn--pWgAru9944PuxmMfLaZhlo4UO6yaqkD9AauIopD-vy2M6-vTyBpfTuVA1sR7cx9wyHB7JbLK9ZjSBghtMjjcpAkgVuPd3_Rzv01hSuMvsC2BGysYPnGFm8-YS_ft4wAb0WbWK9-AjrZa8Xfh4lJm33863mv-YROlDR2xEEYuXKYx9rDBWXb89KC2EmAW7jlRdHz2CfqRrubid46Ux2Drbae27ldaUGeeJh1n9KvtWOUlhFTJsOTcsFOj8IzhGE_ZQ65A0Vj3W6NAcUBwHJN1nRrUSa9IrM9fNFt0RW89NOmyLSU1CD6q3b5RcYfjMU6chqM6qbOcLvlmRIHkqlocpoPf5lk6FE2GfCv8gw_sSXuiYpBBCnpSc9CthSaGbg%3D%3D)

Thank you,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8878a0b9f85e410f81b04d6a26c6b4f9&_e=8RX5g1vpFvlBVmp_xFQ0Zn--pWgAru9944PuxmMfLaZhlo4UO6yaqkD9AauIopD-vy2M6-vTyBpfTuVA1sR7cx9wyHB7JbLK9ZjSBghtMjjcpAkgVuPd3_Rzv01hSuMvsC2BGysYPnGFm8-YS_ft4wAb0WbWK9-AjrZa8Xfh4lJm33863mv-YROlDR2xEEYuXKYx9rDBWXb89KC2EmAW7jlRdHz2CfqRrubid46Ux2Drbae27ldaUGeeJh1n9KvtYRMw7_4sGq6LLtdaPjV0doIKq3bRhzj_M_Q2sxq0MYMlsUOzV90tEHZo0XNTdQoBaClKLsBa0RhQYmSaVXTaLKH_FMCVnB4zOoj71-i0sE3oIqIOsGztz2TrxrPZZeOfzB87jG7aJwY87noJhu0XJw%3D%3D)

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: Why in the HELL would New York state be awarded $130 million for migrant containment efforts when states like Arizona bear the brunt of the illegal activity? | | $130 MILLION TO NEW YORK CITY TO MANAGE "MIGRANT CRISIS" Fellow Conservative, Our Southern Border is not secure and every member of the House and Senate, whether they want to admit it or not, knows it. There have been 2,310,987 border encounters in fiscal year 2023 so far; in 2022, there were 2,378,944! As Sheriff of Pinal County – Arizona’s 3rd largest – it’s up to me and my deputies to ensure the security of the communities under our jurisdiction. And unlike President Biden and Washington Democrats, I don’t play favorites. As I see it, every man, woman, and child deserve a safe community in which to live. Again, that’s my belief, and it’s not necessarily one that the President or the Senate majority leader share. IF THEY DID, $130 MILLION in federal aid wouldn’t have gone to New York City to help their city manage their own “migrant surge.” Think about it: New York doesn’t share a border with Mexico like Arizona does, so why would the Federal Emergency Management Agency funnel such a significant amount of cash to New York City? Well, probably because Chuck Schumer is from Brooklyn! Want to know something else Arizona doesn’t have that New York City does? Deep pocketed Democrat donors who aren’t used to migrants freely wondering into their upper crust communities uninvited. Meanwhile in Arizona where we’re bearing the brunt of illegal border encounters, along with New Mexico, Texas and California, we’ve received just $45 million from feds to help prevent overcrowding in migrant facilities. THIS IS AS WRONG AS WRONG GETS! to my Senate campaign because you, and everyone reading this right now, needs a law enforcement official who understands the true crisis we’re facing at our border as Arizona’s next U.S. Senator. I’m running for the United States Senate because every American family deserves to feel safe in their homes – not just New York City Democrats. If I had it my way, the border would be completely shut down. But without a Republican in the White Hour or a majority in the Senate, that’s currently not an option. Arizona’s border communities, our cities, and frankly our entire state is being made to feel that folks in New York City are more deserving of safe living spaces than those of us living in border communities. Frankly, it's outrageous. We cannot allow Democrats states to disproportionately benefit from federal aid money just because their members of Congress are in positions of power. Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media | | | ---|---|--- ../../../../../../../Desktop/Desktop/Mark Lamb/Templates/April Pelosi/www.alekfororegon.com Meet Sheriff Lamb: GOD. body:
Next week, two important things are happening. First, it’s back to school time for most of CD2. And second, voting will begin in the primary election! | | | | |
---
|
---
Friends,
Next week, two important things are happening. First, it’s back to school time for most of CD2. **And second, ballots will begin to arrive for the primary election beginning August 15th!**
To celebrate the arrival of ballots and a new school year, we are excited to announce “Ballots, Backpacks, and Becky.” On August 15th, supporters will be hosting guests at their homes throughout the day to answer questions about the election. They will also remind our friends and neighbors why they are voting for Becky.
The meeting time and location nearest to you can be found here. For several of the events, Becky will be attending to greet voters and talk more about her candidacy.

| [FIND YOUR LOCATION](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=cc65b854f1&e=6484bb6dd5)
---

We're aiming for an impressive number of votes for Becky, and your help in boosting voter turnout is crucial.
Please attend the nearest event and then take a few minutes on Tuesday to text ten friends to remind them to check their mailboxes for their ballot and to vote for Becky! If you are interested in hosting your own event, **reply to this email!**
Thank you for your support,
Team Becky
|
---
#### PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS

Our mailing address is:
Becky Edwards for CongressPO Box 909Bountiful, Utah 84011

Want to change how you receive these emails?You can [update your preferences](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=42039c1857&e=6484bb6dd5&c=fe759e5378) or [unsubscribe](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=42039c1857&e=6484bb6dd5&c=fe759e5378)

name: Latinos for America First
subject: Help Fund the Police
body:
DONATE TODAY Help us Fund the Police! Fellow American: Are you tired of watching the television and hearing about all the crime in our country? So
| |
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/15469?id=473.1.1.bf9136c1bb4b88b1a5b6599c612b576d) |
---
| | [ DONATE TODAY ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/15469?id=473.2.1.823a8ff66d7b593667375bb456c8870a)
---
## Help us Fund the Police!
---
Fellow American: Are you tired of watching the television and hearing about all the crime in our country? So are we! In the last couple of years we have watched the WOKE left attack our law enforcement agencies and called for the defunding of police. We live in a society where these evil entities have managed to do just that. Many law enforcement agencies have been defunded which has caused the spike in crime across our country. Meanwhile, we have an open border where many “bad hombres” are coming across to destroy our communities. According to the Customs Border Patrol on August 11, 2023 it was reported that Border Patrol apprehended just over 6,000 illegal aliens who crossed into the U.S. illegally, led by RGV sector with 1800+ and Tucson sector with 1700+. These numbers do not include gotaways, port of entry, or CBP One app paroles. In addition, fentanyl deaths are on the rise in the country with no end in sight. Our country is slipping away, but here at Latinos for America First we have decided to partner with the largest Hispanic Organization of Spanish Speaking Officers (OSSO) in Texas and we plan on FUNDING the POLICE. We need your help, these officers are under staffed, over worked, and under paid. We want to show them that we believe and care for them. We support their hard work to keep our communities and families safe. The Organization of Spanish Speaking Officers (OSSO) needs our help funding their Injured Officer Program, their High School Scholarship Program, and all their other Community Initiatives. That’s why we are asking you to help us help OSSO this year. Can we count on you to chip in $50, $100, or $1000 today and help FUND OUR POLICE. Our organization advocates for law and order and that’s why Latinos for America First needs your help. Will you support our efforts and help us fund The Organization of Spanish Speaking Officers! Donate $50, $100 or even $1000 today to help ensure that we keep our officers out on the streets and FUNDED. Mail your check to: 6443 Fairmont Pkwy 140-102 Pasadena TX 77505. Bianca Gracia
Founder and Executive Director
---
| | OSSO Board of Directors
---
---

name: Patty Murray
subject: Update: Introducing the Reproductive Health Care Accessibility Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
reproductive health care should be easily accessible for all
| | |
---
Peter – reproductive health care should be accessible for everyone, but that isn't the reality for millions of women, including those with disabilities.
People with disabilities have long faced discrimination and roadblocks to getting the reproductive health care that they need – and it’s become a full-blown crisis since the Dobbs decision overturned the right to abortion a year ago.
There are now **3 million women with disabilities** living in states where abortion is banned or likely to be banned, and millions more across the country are struggling to find well-trained doctors at accessible facilities that can provide them with adequate reproductive health care.
**That's why I introduced a bill alongside Sen. Tammy Duckworth to remove barriers and strengthen access to reproductive health care for people with disabilities. **
I promise that I won't stop fighting until every American can safely, legally and easily access the health care they need.** [If you want to join the fight for reproductive freedom, please consider donating $5 now to support my work in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68002293/421619461/657691562?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk98-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzI0MjMzNy04NjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=awFBLR9-odmouZ8011E4Uomp6eWxPnwuNlZ8AL9JGSk=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68002294/421619462/657691562?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk98-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzI0MjMzNy04NjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=awFBLR9-odmouZ8011E4Uomp6eWxPnwuNlZ8AL9JGSk=)
---
Let's keep working for a better future together – a future where everyone is empowered, and able, to make their own health care decisions.

Patty Murray

Patty Murray | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. People for Patty Murray PO BOX 3662 Seattle, WA 98124 United States | | PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Hilary Franz
subject: A quick personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D)
body:
I need your help.

| I wanted to share a quick note, Peter.

**As the only woman in the Democratic primary, I'm the only candidate who personally understands so many of the issues Washington families are facing.**

I'm the only candidate who personally understands what it’s like trying to find and afford both childcare and eldercare at the same time while overcoming roadblocks in a male-dominated career as a lawyer and state executive. I'm the only one who personally understands the impact of extremist Republicans' attacks on reproductive rights and women’s healthcare.

_**And, Peter, I'm the only candidate with the statewide executive experience creating a strategy to tackle our problems headfirst while creating sustainable jobs and investing in our children's education.**_ I did it with my work establishing Washington as a leader in wildfire response and preparedness, and I’ll do it as your next governor.

I've been on the ground, building things on the ground, for more than seven years as commissioner of public lands, working to understand our communities' needs and how to deliver. Now, I'm running for governor to continue the work of making Washington the blueprint for a leading pro-worker, pro-family, pro-choice, pro-environment state.

[_**I need your help building my team’s resources to prepare for the election ahead of us. Will you join my grassroots movement for Washington's future by donating $10 right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68002304/421619640/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230813-Z-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTlmZmY4ZTctOGQzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=imluhZNGK4wWkugk9UQ3VPr0n3Xi8rojZHRqmCABdgs=)

In just a few short days, I will reach the SIX-MONTH anniversary of launching my campaign for president. Thousands of grassroots supporters have joined our movement to save America, and today, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0dc645cae1665f7c81569de10dddf66b5d1a0f07808725cfb2434ee8f143bfc6d2eab76a0e82f3d77e7a2637f8696fc1c1c68b82faa9e1ef7d6a853e9d93ee22 I want to personally ask you to become a member of my team in order to help me WIN my presidential campaign. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0dc645cae1665f7c81569de10dddf66b5d1a0f07808725cfb2434ee8f143bfc6d2eab76a0e82f3d77e7a2637f8696fc1c1c68b82faa9e1ef7d6a853e9d93ee22 Can I count you in? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0dc645cae1665f7c81569de10dddf66b5d1a0f07808725cfb2434ee8f143bfc6d2eab76a0e82f3d77e7a2637f8696fc1c1c68b82faa9e1ef7d6a853e9d93ee22 Supporters like you are the reason we have been able to fund my campaign, travel and host events, and reach voters across America with my message over the last six months, but there’s still a lot of work to be done! We’re closer than ever to Election Day, with just 155 days until the first-in-the-nation Iowa caucuses, and we can’t let our foot off the gas for one minute. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0dc645cae1665f7c81569de10dddf66b5d1a0f07808725cfb2434ee8f143bfc6d2eab76a0e82f3d77e7a2637f8696fc1c1c68b82faa9e1ef7d6a853e9d93ee22 In honor of our six month mark, will you make a special contribution of $20.24 today so we can keep up the hard work during the next stretch of the campaign? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0dc645cae1665f7c81569de10dddf66b5d1a0f07808725cfb2434ee8f143bfc6d2eab76a0e82f3d77e7a2637f8696fc1c1c68b82faa9e1ef7d6a853e9d93ee22 CHIP IN 20.24 I launched my campaign for president almost six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0dc645cae1665f7c81569de10dddf66b5d1a0f07808725cfb2434ee8f143bfc6d2eab76a0e82f3d77e7a2637f8696fc1c1c68b82faa9e1ef7d6a853e9d93ee22 But as you know, running a presidential campaign is expensive, and a huge undertaking. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0dc645cae1665f7cdb66712d5093b49be594b1a53a9db058bb0ec20f3dc0bc1f37985d1a7295c4b13fc99820275cbed26fd3af8666792da11faa65873a1a45ab So, if you’re able to send more than $20.24 or more today– I would be especially grateful. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0dc645cae1665f7c81569de10dddf66b5d1a0f07808725cfb2434ee8f143bfc6d2eab76a0e82f3d77e7a2637f8696fc1c1c68b82faa9e1ef7d6a853e9d93ee22 CHIP IN 20.24 If ever there was a time, and if ever there was a need for freedom-loving conservatives to step up and help me save our future...this is it. subject: I checked the numbers...she's going to lose.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered.

| | | | [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20390%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g9elA524Z8QPx%2boGL3u7rg&sysid=1)
---
| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That’s why this is the hardest email I’ve had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She’s taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a “Toss up.”_**

I’m looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**
---
| | | [STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20391%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p6DthX1N5XG4%2bcDe33gSEA&sysid=1 "STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN")
---
| Let’s just start with the facts.

**>** Last year, her opponent **lost by only 546 votes** after a lengthy recount.

**>** This year, he’s **outraised Lauren 3 to 1** , and she’s in danger of falling too far behind.

**>** If this trend continues, Soros will have punished **one of the strongest voices defending my father** and the American way next year. [**_I am begging every Patriot who loves this country to step up and defend Lauren Boebert. Her record speaks for itself -she had our back and now we MUST have her back. _**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20392%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tOmJeAiI5zux8V%2fyynhqlw&sysid=1)

---
| You know the stakes of this election: **the course of America will be decided in 2024**.

Joe Biden and his crooked cabal have **declared it their mission** to completely **eradicate** **the MAGA Agenda** , and those who support it. Soros is bankrolling their effort.

And it all starts with **wiping out my father and Lauren**.

She’s **stood against the Woke “Squad,”** stood up for my father during the **unlawful persecutions levied against him** , **and never wavered in her commitment** to America First. You couldn’t find a more winsome ally than Lauren.

Which is why I am coming to you and all patriots who love America.** [Now is the time to stand with Lauren before it’s too late!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20309%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NQkB8ynsapkrUHQhzzzPbw&sysid=1)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlg76569hb57ffhqu3kiobjd57l0840995ui6omo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjh62ob6cth2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zslg804lmc9kc710l4f06lame1ss0mhj5old1uk8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjh62ob6cth2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1qnc3nnkvt2ck2trv4boglhjpqtcngo7cnb67gg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjh62ob6cth2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9t9obtmbem2p0hhuhol0s4o0h2uju6l7lp0d01g_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjh62ob6cth2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

---
---

name: Your America
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20317%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b0lu%2fU74VWJ%2b2YqJGC4tOQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20318%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5aZCHKLSMwRNzCpc9K11xw&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20319%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=psemi8SXE5%2fTWzWLNL8G6A&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20310%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ay1hsUV5k8z5XfNiMUrx3Q&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America News
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Chris Christie is talking about me on Morning Joe
disclaimer_text: paid for by Super PACs
body: The D.C. Establishment is afraid of our movement. They don't want to disrupt the status quo. [Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWhHM1SDCN) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62129326:WhHM1SDCN:m:1:2532013465:18461FA78F7D21CD7444216EC2DAB100:r) Chris Christie, former Republican Joe Scarborough, and Mika Brzezinski all had a lot to say about me and this movement we're creating. Fellow American, they can preach to their far-left audiences all they want, it's not going to stop me from speaking the TRUTH the D.C. Establishment doesn't want you to hear. **Their name-calling won't stop me.** _**[Will you stand with me, Fellow American?](https://secure.winred.com/vivek-2024/cc-msnbc-attacks-cc-r?sc=20230811_VIVEK_EE_CC_MSNBC-ATTACKS_REV_LISTNAME&utm_source=rev&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=msnbcattacks&utm_content=rec7hjyijIaIMfep1&leadcreated=false)**_ Chris Christie's interview on MSNBC made one thing clear: It doesn't matter if you have an R or a D next to your name, the "New Establishment" all share the same things: * Pro-war in Ukraine * Fine with political opponents getting arrested * Anti-free speech * Bought & paid for by Super PACs * Pretends to be anti-establishment It's laughable that MSNBC will trot out someone like Chris Christie to bash me so they can feign "bipartisanship" while still totally hiding from direct debate with me. I won't ever back down from speaking the TRUTH, even if it's not popular with the mainstream media. That's why I am looking forward to the first Republican Presidential Debate later this month, but I need your help to secure a center spot on stage. **[Will you chip in $5 or even $50 today?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62129326:WhHM1SDCN:m:1:2532013465:18461FA78F7D21CD7444216EC2DAB100:r)** | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62129327:WhHM1SDCN:m:1:2532013465:18461FA78F7D21CD7444216EC2DAB100:r) | | [Chip in $10 ➔](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62129328:WhHM1SDCN:m:1:2532013465:18461FA78F7D21CD7444216EC2DAB100:r) ---|---|--- [Chip in $24 ➔](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62129329:WhHM1SDCN:m:1:2532013465:18461FA78F7D21CD7444216EC2DAB100:r) | | [Chip in $50 ➔](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62129330:WhHM1SDCN:m:1:2532013465:18461FA78F7D21CD7444216EC2DAB100:r) Thanks, [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62129326:WhHM1SDCN:m:1:2532013465:18461FA78F7D21CD7444216EC2DAB100:r) Vivek Ramaswamy [** JOIN OUR TEAM ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62129326:WhHM1SDCN:m:1:2532013465:18461FA78F7D21CD7444216EC2DAB100:r) --- **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. [ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62129326:WhHM1SDCN:m:1:2532013465:18461FA78F7D21CD7444216EC2DAB100:r) --- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 --- Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. body:

Patriot,

We're only **10** days away from the GOP's presidential candidates taking the stage in Milwaukee. But, before they do, I want to know which issues YOU think are the most critical.

Grassroots Conservatives like you are going to be the key to securing the White House in 2024, which is why I need your input through our **[Republican Debate Readiness Survey.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059101:6zx89-IN4:m:1:3299561967:E83480011CD3AD1E7F242FA1876EE6EF:r)**

**[TAKE THE SURVEY NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059101:6zx89-IN4:m:1:3299561967:E83480011CD3AD1E7F242FA1876EE6EF:r)**

We have many highly qualified candidates vying for our Party's nomination, so this debate could be the moment that sets our future nominee apart from the rest of the field.

With so much at stake, it's critical that you make your voice heard ahead of this historic event by participating in our _ _**[Republican Debate Readiness Survey.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059101:6zx89-IN4:m:1:3299561967:E83480011CD3AD1E7F242FA1876EE6EF:r)**

**[Please submit your completed Survey by midnight tonight to ensure that we have adequate time to review your responses.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059101:6zx89-IN4:m:1:3299561967:E83480011CD3AD1E7F242FA1876EE6EF:r)**

Thank you and God bless you,

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Morgan=C2=A0Luttrell?=
subject: Ending this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell
body:
I’m a combat veteran who served in multiple combat missions in defense of America.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsk6l3bmd8i6k2qhecqel60hfb5jj0daevqom8hg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjh61o34c5h2bs)
---

Friend --

My name is Morgan Luttrell.

I'm a combat veteran who served in multiple combat missions in defense of America.

I've seen things I wouldn't wish on my worst enemy. Things I will never be able to unsee.

In 2009, I survived a helicopter crash that should've taken my life but, by the grace of God, I was given a second chance.

No matter how tough or brave you are, nothing is fully in your control. That's why we put our faith in God.

**But -- there are some things we CAN control, and that 's why I'm running for Congress. **

I have to just say it: Biden and the Radical Democrats want me GONE, they want me DEFEATED, they want to END my campaign for good.

But unlike the spineless career politicians, **I 'm not someone who EVER gives up.**

You see, the career DC politicians are living each day by their own agenda -- not thinking about those suffering the consequences.

After my time in the military, I knew that each day that I woke up in America was a gift.

_**The land of the free and home of the brave.**_

But the Biden regime has stripped our nation of our core values and turned us down a path that is leading us toward a dark future.

**So, Friend, I want to humbly ask you right now if you 'll stand with me in my fight for the America we all once knew and loved. **

It is patriots like yourself that have helped change the direction of our country before, but we still need you. Maybe now more than ever.

Please, stand up for America's liberties and freedoms by chipping in just a few bucks today?

---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zth7e4kailjoj8d4jth6p7e148snoo9a9od3fto8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjh61o34c5h2bs "CONTRIBUTE")
---

Together, we can bring America back to her greatness before the Democrats send us further down the dark path we're currently on.

Thank you,

Morgan Luttrell

---
|
---
| | Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell
---

Magnolia, TX 77353

name: Your America
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20326%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8emHPCa4xY6CEyJ5R%2bIPuQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20327%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gRAutSlmd6JZvlFDyQiTdw&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20328%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nCy%2bXnD8kR99WwhMMtmrwA&sysid=1)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Your America News

name: Trump Train News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhtbsdrpefeoigden7pdqb71qj4rlupgr92oh138_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjh61o34cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0sbsah5q9q4mpvujf9ji2kommuef2tpeiuflbio_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjh61o34cth2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd32qh5bq3j8kk6t7lr2fc6kgjmsce480s06t9tg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjh61o34cth2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zus63cmsquem60s91ikkriljchg9emnmhts21u70_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjh61o34cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chim8p30cjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj8d0a9egv1lngpqiudtn26ra5fecbc6vc4esefg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjh61o34cth2bs)_

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: I checked the numbers...she's going tolose. (edited)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered.

| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeejvfg5oja9b1nlb5rg762em2si994336b42oso_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjh61p74cjh2bs)
---
| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That’s why this is the hardest email I’ve had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She’s taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a “Toss up.”_**

I’m looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**
---
| | | [STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd8lnamdqr5fchvi3eem918kcvc46bqe3ulgioeo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjh61p74cjh2bs "STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN")
---
| Let’s just start with the facts.

**>** Last year, her opponent **lost by only 546 votes** after a lengthy recount.

**>** This year, he’s **outraised Lauren 3 to 1** , and she’s in danger of falling too far behind.

**>** If this trend continues, Soros will have punished **one of the strongest voices defending my father** and the American way next year. [**_I am begging every Patriot who loves this country to step up and defend Lauren Boebert. name: Kash Patel
subject: We are pissing off the right people.
body:
You wouldn’t believe what leftist Rep. Jackson Lee said about the Kash Foundation.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664671%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oUEoS6zZyl02dKsvEblddQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

You wouldn’t believe what leftist Rep. Jackson Lee said about the Kash Foundation.
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664671%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oUEoS6zZyl02dKsvEblddQ&sysid=1)
She is trying to accuse us of providing “cash gifts” to members of the FBI when nothing could be further from the truth!

I did exactly what I set out to do when I founded the Kash Foundation. We provided legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they brought forth credible information on corruption.

While it’s shocking that a member of Congress would go so far out of her way to try and vilify us, I couldn’t be happier.

**_We are pissing off the right people_.**

The members of the Deep State are getting scared. Their days are over. As the Kash Foundation encourages more and more whistleblowers are coming forward, we will expose all their corruption.

[That’s why I need your help. My goal is to raise $50,000 before the end of the week to protect whistleblowers from Deep State retaliation.

Please consider chipping in any amount you can afford to help the Kash Foundation defend whistleblowers by clicking below.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664671%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oUEoS6zZyl02dKsvEblddQ&sysid=1)

[Donate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664672%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=08Zw31NYI4Dp1t%2f5pwxgaw&sysid=1)

Can you imagine giving up your career, financial livelihood, privacy, and peace of mind to do what you feel is right and expose the FBI’s corruption to the rest of your fellow American citizens?

**And Rep. Jackson Lee has the nerve to accuse _the whistleblowers_ of corruption!**

These people are heroes! We owe a debt to the brave whistleblowers who come forward to share their information about corruption within our government.

Whistleblowers put themselves and their families at risk to expose the Government Gangsters within the Department of Justice and throughout our government.

**But, if you and I can provide them with the legal and financial support they need to stand up against the Deep State, then more whistleblowers will be encouraged to come forward. **

She is trying to accuse us of providing “cash gifts” to members of the FBI when nothing could be further from the truth! I did exactly what I set out to do when I founded the Kash Foundation. We provided legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they brought forth credible information on corruption. While it’s shocking that a member of Congress would go so far out of her way to try and vilify us, I couldn’t be happier. We are pissing off the right people. The members of the Deep State are getting scared. Their days are over. As the Kash Foundation encourages more and more whistleblowers are coming forward, we will expose all their corruption. subject: She’s going to lose.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered.

| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0183lbvpe6fn1cl37cpoa82nc7b2569ig1662ng_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj60pr4c9h2bs)
---
| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That’s why this is the hardest email I’ve had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She’s taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a “Toss up.”_**

I’m looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**
---
| | | [STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvt5ab8g2eq3s3ti7jnf98gi0u9fseg8urrogvug_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj60pr4c9h2bs "STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN")

| Let’s just start with the facts.

**>** Last year, her opponent **lost by only 546 votes** after a lengthy recount.

**>** This year, he’s **outraised Lauren 3 to 1** , and she’s in danger of falling too far behind.

**>** If this trend continues, Soros will have punished **one of the strongest voices defending my father** and the American way next year. [**_I am begging every Patriot who loves this country to step up and defend Lauren Boebert. Her record speaks for itself–she had our back and now we MUST have her back. _**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztl5bcj9037gcigtj21tjv1cfsnkk3ls7qqucsbo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj60pr4c9h2bs)

| You know the stakes of this election: **the course of America will be decided in 2024**.

Joe Biden and his crooked cabal have **declared it their mission** to completely **eradicate** **the MAGA Agenda** , and those who support it. Soros is bankrolling their effort.

And it all starts with **wiping out my father and Lauren**.

She’s **stood against the Woke “Squad,”** stood up for my father during the **unlawful persecutions levied against him** , **and never wavered in her commitment** to America First. You couldn’t find a more winsome ally than Lauren.

Which is why I am coming to you and all patriots who love America.** [Now is the time to stand with Lauren before it’s too late!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrb20p3p0pl0f2802cntrt9dal8bdgtl8kvb5160_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj60pr4c9h2bs)**

name: American Briefing
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zil3g46ga9iu8ckee9h26a9lhkkv065fsla3p3o0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj64pb4cth2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z80e4m9e880ngomsb9tntbk51e78a5lb7b4c1adg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj64pb4cth2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc826qok3fdgvbb3tegm69s857vcpdq35al0iet0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj64pb4cth2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdtbl9lrdkd9og1vghkcb1fh6m26tet8nh2vl99o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj64pb4cth2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: 1600 Daily
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoqa1v6pbr1pedb1gvbjkpp6sk15lghokabmhoio_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj64pb4cth2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmt0lh66sc1gisbpumln4sr97i4j83uqkk5tkuqg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj64pb4cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2fv5cf439f298bl46eshemp1gglujbk9qbd6bf8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj64pb4cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Trump Train News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6evgqv3l8l9b2g4uu2kfuhhgk7dirotcrel288o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj62pj2clh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoef5tvls6boo33lveidrlk8a6e42l7ss02eb2b8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj62pj2clh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc3ukekqgnlhpd4vg178c6q0vjqfo0qqbvob24pg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj62pj2clh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f45edf7ab47544bcb7296e3df0ad276d&_e=1UIJBfSHJ5s2dwR2pUoRyGbNhOsoZKqLMicSU2qJ9EkAXuzlI6fZWsuYygW7kAJje6V6TDTdgyr9ZfHviThOflBxWZ7CxJNwMhmbCwm4JfivVzYGhHle9oDwXdfAhkGO1sPFuUUQ9VIrtnTULaQibObzhGmICVyHhFi_BeubH0eHYSBZkOscPh_sWwJ6AQ6P8-2xgQw4bPeNv-zhvHVeiVLfmFcDvKOSHFS3TYMw3xstOErqChf4xt1AvaqG_Ka0IWt-O2_5afH3i3ceUDMLrLVl85yfll2gKE_ohLtRNanR8JVC7LhdCZNFYksRX6hxBP9Mfk67MAFGcqdKnK4O2pGJd3-2ZQ0zRzcdC80-OTzB8bQf1OvhiMu5f8XcFykxFuUsEvv7hWacRstCBNPk2ugdHkhyLEPis-ErsQqYXvE%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f45edf7ab47544bcb7296e3df0ad276d&_e=1UIJBfSHJ5s2dwR2pUoRyGbNhOsoZKqLMicSU2qJ9EkAXuzlI6fZWsuYygW7kAJje6V6TDTdgyr9ZfHviThOflBxWZ7CxJNwMhmbCwm4JfivVzYGhHle9oDwXdfAhkGO1sPFuUUQ9VIrtnTULaQibObzhGmICVyHhFi_BeubH0eHYSBZkOscPh_sWwJ6AQ6P8-2xgQw4bPeNv-zhvHVeiVLfmFcDvKOSHFS3TYMw3xstOErqChf4xt1AvaqG_Ka0IWt-O2_5afH3i3ceUDMLrAkZRcMHFspKR41PKX_JGvQAywe2HytS-0hOcPvssmEmsvSIWem3gvhGdMNW5oW825DBJOvG2pLdBzDFETuqXocbRl5T8M0Ypyu6PpBArKu-SzOaljA_7C84A5Ydtam6WtGCLZnZ3DMveaxAViEey6g%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f45edf7ab47544bcb7296e3df0ad276d&_e=1UIJBfSHJ5s2dwR2pUoRyGbNhOsoZKqLMicSU2qJ9EkAXuzlI6fZWsuYygW7kAJje6V6TDTdgyr9ZfHviThOflBxWZ7CxJNwMhmbCwm4JfivVzYGhHle9oDwXdfAhkGO1sPFuUUQ9VIrtnTULaQibObzhGmICVyHhFi_BeubH0eHYSBZkOscPh_sWwJ6AQ6P8-2xgQw4bPeNv-zhvHVeiVLfmFcDvKOSHFS3TYMw3xstOErqChf4xt1AvaqG_Ka0IWt-O2_5afH3i3ceUDMLrDct5n_ZqNT3U31Eb30wq6phaYgf1FhuxWAUSRMZIHMfQUSK2MhHiTWvQL2NBJ2NRjawQVhOqWVImp_0RUPa6Wx_7kNzhTRYKD5UJvYvgPhLzR9jrluPJ79Ew2s5589OxeMcp5fyYt3sNpailA22npE%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f45edf7ab47544bcb7296e3df0ad276d&_e=1UIJBfSHJ5s2dwR2pUoRyGbNhOsoZKqLMicSU2qJ9EkAXuzlI6fZWsuYygW7kAJje6V6TDTdgyr9ZfHviThOflBxWZ7CxJNwMhmbCwm4JfivVzYGhHle9oDwXdfAhkGO1sPFuUUQ9VIrtnTULaQibObzhGmICVyHhFi_BeubH0eHYSBZkOscPh_sWwJ6AQ6P8-2xgQw4bPeNv-zhvHVeiVLfmFcDvKOSHFS3TYMw3xstOErqChf4xt1AvaqG_Ka0IWt-O2_5afH3i3ceUDMLrI_5sphtgrAjnmHWiBwCogTOfZAMqOUjnacu-_e1XbKqDhzp3hlTZjzYpZk176YhNlraxDpGTzevBlczH1paXxCj1y2VooaFI0mNFL4tN9TC8qhnhTycaMhkOscIqoHgNovM-OstYVVBQJ40BzSPINU%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7e8ee9h3a02qdhvs5u2drbhcfuan7j9euscethg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj6aoj4c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z62el12btqelckm6b83ho0c5fi5di7a7eioeaet8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj6aoj4c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvvd36c1tq8rhohrnguf1seojhsf5ctape87fbko_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj6aoj4c1h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd7c6e3a5f55442bb46df798786c70be&_e=y7cUO26ZlYgIcil2ZnlWVEJOObxo0u3F_xUOcL0QwbLp9-0JtpONxnYbVFqqPc6D1LR94kzhs2a1XqFgDwo8JVNcLLzcDoO0jaPweN7LznJw43IiWKkIUSLYmDrFuPMRwxZjePD6dxKdOiHJdlFMxVMvc0kWv4mcbuh9X2kX0SnKwWs6v04RZybdWzAnKeluwIVkJDfkL7rRL1vScd8049X2PAiN2srHNV5MJl5pVQWKUhQSl2DNIUbNB8yLWpgZUEw-2yi-9G60s80GWCBZ1CmtpbKDMPCLfYWVelHe2srQCe39MNB9O7FZdEmXnVr4iGf55IPIJqNzwuoqonhasbeYjMVWUoXeQGBAjExDgycJlPEYoNz9hrQbZdCtJpQjA2FhycngtU9pG3M9CTfiT28MQYRpcmv42zhEfE-lMB0%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd7c6e3a5f55442bb46df798786c70be&_e=y7cUO26ZlYgIcil2ZnlWVEJOObxo0u3F_xUOcL0QwbLp9-0JtpONxnYbVFqqPc6D1LR94kzhs2a1XqFgDwo8JVNcLLzcDoO0jaPweN7LznJw43IiWKkIUSLYmDrFuPMRwxZjePD6dxKdOiHJdlFMxVMvc0kWv4mcbuh9X2kX0SnKwWs6v04RZybdWzAnKeluwIVkJDfkL7rRL1vScd8049X2PAiN2srHNV5MJl5pVQWKUhQSl2DNIUbNB8yLWpgZUEw-2yi-9G60s80GWCBZ1Jx6wTyERapJxKnNBPbTQkvgX8eVeVTtqNyWAepgjp_dUZDHcEnXLFaiWT1pswQALG-YQmgyz1O5t8c3G7v1jZdvJlGK5kDza6iinkWnYqvempSAvlTWsVe8Ns0CaTbTDLXzjjuM0NIfwjnn_EF8K1k%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd7c6e3a5f55442bb46df798786c70be&_e=y7cUO26ZlYgIcil2ZnlWVEJOObxo0u3F_xUOcL0QwbLp9-0JtpONxnYbVFqqPc6D1LR94kzhs2a1XqFgDwo8JVNcLLzcDoO0jaPweN7LznJw43IiWKkIUSLYmDrFuPMRwxZjePD6dxKdOiHJdlFMxVMvc0kWv4mcbuh9X2kX0SnKwWs6v04RZybdWzAnKeluwIVkJDfkL7rRL1vScd8049X2PAiN2srHNV5MJl5pVQWKUhQSl2DNIUbNB8yLWpgZUEw-2yi-9G60s80GWCBZ1HMV4G9r10TDNFZcKzeRtHO-Kyb6c7DHc3o5n9REYBLx_VG6rasIpG7OkaprWRx5D7XPGvk5a5aXRlProxPchILdH46LOrbKzYLumwJTJ1wGXiqo3jNHWQ7JerdTGiFwRh3dHG318x2ytTNAn_dITPM%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd7c6e3a5f55442bb46df798786c70be&_e=y7cUO26ZlYgIcil2ZnlWVEJOObxo0u3F_xUOcL0QwbLp9-0JtpONxnYbVFqqPc6D1LR94kzhs2a1XqFgDwo8JVNcLLzcDoO0jaPweN7LznJw43IiWKkIUSLYmDrFuPMRwxZjePD6dxKdOiHJdlFMxVMvc0kWv4mcbuh9X2kX0SnKwWs6v04RZybdWzAnKeluwIVkJDfkL7rRL1vScd8049X2PAiN2srHNV5MJl5pVQWKUhQSl2DNIUbNB8yLWpgZUEw-2yi-9G60s80GWCBZ1OK2JPDzZU-RQ4d7Cw0timoFJrt-cPc6CrvDuj84iQBHxS675uGvHEUfejlOeNb_Gg4TQmKaVI_X2dWqeK_jbEgs2X9aqA9ZneQJPAQQ_yGScoj2gAsfz_3XprQL1cUCJJe5eJ3FiI41vt4BZ2Y0SQc%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
