clean_body: There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=84a1eb7e3d014849878f386fa9f2aaba&_e=dBaXx1GF7PRIdkX0cbsheo31VJEgHdMjJtLUWmLgu4LOaVi8GrviR_0O-Do25P9Y6vmH_h1imQY_dMif3DvJK5OslHq_ixsKaqet2B3IDCCeVO0tO36NB73AC9cUYJg5Fqy5blvwvfSzKJFV-MCKhQBb3Kx0X-YQCaOfunvU_o1zZQbP8d0C-bIrreBB9zlTYBPpiLdJYM70auN6i1sl_Ed_IRwRcsrU6jb67WEC0OHpsYKOEmkeIb6KZw_ypmiU6o4wOkc6SCMf79RmgAYgIjRd_bNvDB9zdxRVElRzL7ZGtY-6v4L7FHyhjADEUCNMm69nqPMie4KAaCFv1x8N_L4760HJtn_Im2tTnmtLIs_-amyCPzddBQbgoT-_lItz_TpgBor16YbmAVkVsvDs3tRQ5012RgKUddpUjkYAlJeBx8mnRc96rUln76g289uP)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=84a1eb7e3d014849878f386fa9f2aaba&_e=dBaXx1GF7PRIdkX0cbsheo31VJEgHdMjJtLUWmLgu4LOaVi8GrviR_0O-Do25P9Y6vmH_h1imQY_dMif3DvJK5OslHq_ixsKaqet2B3IDCCeVO0tO36NB73AC9cUYJg5Fqy5blvwvfSzKJFV-MCKhQBb3Kx0X-YQCaOfunvU_o1zZQbP8d0C-bIrreBB9zlTYBPpiLdJYM70auN6i1sl_Ed_IRwRcsrU6jb67WEC0OHpsYKOEmkeIb6KZw_ypmiU6o4wOkc6SCMf79RmgAYgIr5JVOEM_CcVn2TVokTZRUSotUypBFIl0BXbkpg6P-8Ds2kxca_TkQkHRD9LNyLzHjQfRlniSfuyJKx1COJKQfLnmx7iSprKBxF-9BBzRVtjK5EUDl6VV2B6u1a3j4NC0oeKu6eLjta9F8sr2_maAOsiSN6oByOqkwsGgq_Xzl3c)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=84a1eb7e3d014849878f386fa9f2aaba&_e=dBaXx1GF7PRIdkX0cbsheo31VJEgHdMjJtLUWmLgu4LOaVi8GrviR_0O-Do25P9Y6vmH_h1imQY_dMif3DvJK5OslHq_ixsKaqet2B3IDCCeVO0tO36NB73AC9cUYJg5Fqy5blvwvfSzKJFV-MCKhQBb3Kx0X-YQCaOfunvU_o1zZQbP8d0C-bIrreBB9zlTYBPpiLdJYM70auN6i1sl_Ed_IRwRcsrU6jb67WEC0OHpsYKOEmkeIb6KZw_ypmiU6o4wOkc6SCMf79RmgAYgIp-RynIWnRHD_pwweQLEuaHQHwsZhKxyHddetww55VmWXoEFI3p0l6XRjRhG0B3SoGtiBCbOzSZdMCxxPOkFcuUk8bnzmGdmOLW_qm9VhUUo5EpMRaZsYnCEuo1ahv1Ex-iL7oD2chjmpgMRoc3Tikc522hfN4Xm4OcRKRxaZoqr)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=84a1eb7e3d014849878f386fa9f2aaba&_e=dBaXx1GF7PRIdkX0cbsheo31VJEgHdMjJtLUWmLgu4LOaVi8GrviR_0O-Do25P9Y6vmH_h1imQY_dMif3DvJK5OslHq_ixsKaqet2B3IDCCeVO0tO36NB73AC9cUYJg5Fqy5blvwvfSzKJFV-MCKhQBb3Kx0X-YQCaOfunvU_o1zZQbP8d0C-bIrreBB9zlTYBPpiLdJYM70auN6i1sl_Ed_IRwRcsrU6jb67WEC0OHpsYKOEmkeIb6KZw_ypmiU6o4wOkc6SCMf79RmgAYgIroL8er5qPlmAFhmf-8wFw-dMnruyvGW2uDYEfXOsLVs633RckQjFs41VNoHBl7LO4wvxVv22N4PH7IWNYgAKH_WAVanMgctgEnKVoMrO9eztiuT6oDuhbyKdvJOeClpwG36vPV3dAzXEsOOkNXpj-DML08gaLIdLYl6dFaaos0t).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Reclaiming American Freedom

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=577dc647d24642da8214d0a93cd88710&_e=Snbr9P08m0KFwzjR8K85wNbY2BpUXriha-3tU7Cnqiy8eq5yXQufxcwQtqdSR86upK0o5Wc352TYO8h2AVlid0Rrkf5UXHRm-U4y5cKT8Z4jZDnfgUR_Iv-e_uw-ybUqSoi9pLlCqy2S6urB4hQ8qWHEflBPRO1eET_yNIV0VQeo7mDAA7FJfaSavMZSJQ_cSbdqq7dq7nd2DUrovVTrWOoCcgECs5uUhXTOC5t4lJ37WC5a_JWOdKDmjI3bRoDXL670RIuXVxuaUv6NVzf7THNkF5gjGN0mP7Ta5R_cDTI7GCmt76Uo29qq0KkGVVmCbw4TcH718F3G6QHW8TfBFqv0xtQXCDIYx0i3WxcffitfwN_R_Goe3u-NXuXmp4vlQHnTN85QqpsF1gK5vU5jbS3d3UHfR4OaQQXvMOq64AY%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That's why this is the hardest email I've had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She's taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a "Toss up."_**

I'm looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**

| | | [STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7b1e679b26741698738351ce64e02dc&_e=cE60wuDwWt9oS9eqACPsZ4hjP-2Uhl3qEAtSZJ8qENzj0rk_LOqWATgZwoMxOBMjX0RSRkjo5D22rIGdDX9BixEkS_CkleTU7CdNaZAWMEqDOJgGEhKNCEIVclpAizHgzYUr21kCEMbTusaNgfMfXs1lvXrj7SdefLstqRKw9NbbN9qlW9yJAEavHKlCJIr-9eHYvW3VgW4PPxAVuEo-oN8ymbiYPqtW3oECtGjGB6SCB1jZUtfE09n2FyHG7pRo4klgkHyFgk2xUEF0GN9LbQ%3D%3D "STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>")

| You know the stakes of this election: **the course of America will be decided in 2024**.

Joe Biden and his crooked cabal have **declared it their mission** to completely **eradicate** **the MAGA Agenda** , and those who support it. Soros is bankrolling their effort.

And it all starts with **wiping out my father and Lauren**.

She's **stood against the Woke "Squad,"** stood up for my father during the **unlawful persecutions levied against him** , **and never wavered in her commitment** to America First. You couldn't find a more winsome ally than Lauren.

clean_body: Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered. %recipient.md5hash% | | | | | | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered. That's why this is the hardest email I've had to write in a long time... Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She's taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that her race was just declared a "Toss up." I'm looking at the numbers... and Lauren Boebert may lose her seat. We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat. | | | "STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>" | Let's just start with the facts. Last year, her opponent lost by only 546 votes after a lengthy recount. This year, he's outraised Lauren 3 to 1 , and she's in danger of falling too far behind. If this trend continues, Soros will have punished one of the strongest voices defending my father and the American way next year. | | | "RUSH $250 >>" | "RUSH $100 >>" | "RUSH $50 >>" | "RUSH $25 >>" | "RUSH other >>" | You know the stakes of this election: the course of America will be decided in 2024. Joe Biden and his crooked cabal have declared it their mission to completely eradicate the MAGA Agenda , and those who support it. Soros is bankrolling their effort. And it all starts with wiping out my father and Lauren. She's stood against the Woke "Squad," stood up for my father during the unlawful persecutions levied against him , and never wavered in her commitment to America First. You couldn't find a more winsome ally than Lauren. Which is why I am coming to you and all patriots who love America. | "DEFEND LAUREN BOEBERT >>" | My father and I are counting on you. Thanks, Donald Trump Jr. | | PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS | | | | Copyright(C) 2023 , All rights reserved. Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Do NOT buy this toxic product
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925947?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Right now, there are toxic chemicals on store shelves across the country. Rows and rows and rows of the pesticide Roundup – waiting to be picked up by unsuspecting customers and sprayed on their lawns and gardens. **The dangers of Roundup aren’t well known – a CATASTROPHIC mistake.** Roundup’s key ingredient, glyphosate, has been linked to alarming health risks: _**cancer, hormone disruption, fatty liver disease, and shortened pregnancy.**_ Yet _**companies like Home Depot and Lowe’s still sell Roundup**_ to anyone who wants it – some people will use this chemical on the lawns where their children play. [**Tell Home Depot and Lowe’s: STOP selling toxic Roundup! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925948?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925949?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Roundup doesn’t just impact the people who use it, Friend. The consequences spread to you, me, and _the entire planet._
That’s because Roundup contributes to the pollinator population crisis. Glyphosate has been shown to _**impair bee navigation**_ and even _**disrupt bee development.**_ That means while bee populations are PLUMMETING, Roundup is making recovery even harder.
You have pollinators to thank for every 1 in 3 bites of food you eat, for blooming flowers in spring, for forming the foundation of ecosystems around the world. **But Roundup is one of the toxic pesticides putting pollinators at risk.** [**Please, Friend, we need 38 more messages from your area to Home Depot and Lowe’s. Help protect bees and the planet!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925950?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925949?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zanr49g3q84r47k98g4012camp58uon97fcahn40_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj61o74c3h2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**
---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2eq30kig9r01ecm14iu4q45b3enbthrcjgcamm8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj61o74c3h2bs "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS")
---
| | [HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvopjs8dtb8o2bcftddvjfq4pvvrvi8agjq8b5o0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj61o74c3h2bs "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")
---
Democrats' dark money dollars are _pouring in_ to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. **[PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1e58vckrvi516sha232nkilkb45qut9iavm7hb0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj61o74c3h2bs "PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:")**
---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zref169tb9s62qo3a5ukk5dau3l626db5licscv8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj61o74c3h2bs "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS")
---
| | [HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr01b4kmlqnlkhnh7438l8pte6llg82s74oti6fg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj61o74c3h2bs "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")
---
Thank you for your time and support,

Kevin McCarthy
---
| |

* * *

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj0lmaqel4dbt91akr1rpu6u5u169k923kidpr2g_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj61o74c3h2bs "Never Give Up: Donate now!")
_I write to you with a heavy heart._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

**We must never give up on our crusade for freedom.**

I'm sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority.

**[Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zev3h900ef7uhprpr78898jsh0c9es85479dtt90_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj61o74c3h2bs "Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?")**

Thank you,

Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy

name: Mark Takano
subject: reaching out for Will Rollins
body:
We can do this!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e192046-971b-4eb9-8d04-203a6255f0ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ec46c32-2c1b-47e8-86e9-1962507ef724/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi there, Peter, it's Mark Takano. I'm reaching out to ask you to split a [**$10 donation between Blue Amp Action and Will Rollins’ campaign before his next deadline hits.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71dd47d3-efd8-44a4-89d4-60cc69c7f185/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Before I do, I want to be vulnerable for a moment, and share a personal story about my coming out experience. In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay by sending out bigoted, homophobic campaign mailers in our race.

This was before I'd even come out publicly. Coming out is an extremely personal moment, so you can imagine my horror finding out I had been outed so publicly -- and in such a hateful way. **And you might be familiar with the person who did it -- Ken Calvert, the same Republican that Will Rollins is now running to unseat.** Calvert blamed “the times” and claims he has since changed, but his attacks on the LGBTQ community haven’t. He voted against the Matthew Shepard hate crimes bill. He voted against gay adoption and voted to keep us out of the military.

**After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights.** [**Will’s race happens to be one of the most consequential elections in the country in the Democrats’ effort to retake the House. He can win, but he’ll need your support to do it. If you can, please split a contribution of $10 or more between Blue Amp Action and Will’s campaign before their next fundraising deadline. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teeedc829-4672-4d5f-942a-ed035a47315e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e572365-982f-43c2-87ba-877959a257f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | _Thank you,_ Mark
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end

|
---
| | |
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgvs0hmcbf6n7qu49r2goqg36cf0u6ma2vrkie38_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj61o74chh2bs "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z50ua52dr1ohkcb97o7bk1esatsrqt1hdbfk4sp8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj61o74chh2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation.

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj1445mql7qnbv9110ov6shkieo3opsucauv4ncg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj61o74chh2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zppbeaol9rhd9134cur8kl98rhg6ecmms6crqaa0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj61o74chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zelsicc8b54fn1q1duuic8dpc5gs6ba1ihraenuo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj61o74chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjiliui5rshcqh2kvhpvfa6u3m0uf5ube8evl4vo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cjj61o74chh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Soaring gas prices
body:
Gas prices are soaring - and Jay Inslee is not exactly telling the truth about why. But, as always, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. Read on... | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62132891:snE8CSDN7:m:1:2610672541:5C4179AD26D63FC57F7263B9C5F888F4:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, Gas prices are soaring - and Jay Inslee is not exactly telling the truth about why. But, as always, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. Read on... ** ** **This week 's need-to-know story...** Amidst soaring summer gas prices, Governor Jay Inslee's administration is still struggling to disassociate the state's cap-and-tax law, designed to elevate gas prices, from the high prices everyone now faces. While the governor is busy attempting to avoid tying the high prices to his terrible climate schemes, Washington state's rapid surpassing of price limits in two carbon tax auctions led to an unprecedented emergency auction. Put in perspective, not even California has had to resort to such an emergency measure in 10 years of its cap-and-tax program - a reality that raises serious doubts about Washington's program sustainability. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62132892:snE8CSDN7:m:1:2610672541:5C4179AD26D63FC57F7263B9C5F888F4:r). **This week 's top story...** Sound Transit's persistent mismanagement and poor decision-making have provided ample material for Shift to critique over the last decade. The most recent revelation, highlighted by the Seattle Times, underscores a recurring pattern of inadequate planning, funding, and execution at the agency. The imminent disruption caused by sinking tracks near Seattle's stadiums shows how the complete disregard for critical issues by Sound Transit bureaucrats years ago continues to negatively impact daily commuters and travelers. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62132893:snE8CSDN7:m:1:2610672541:5C4179AD26D63FC57F7263B9C5F888F4:r). **In case you missed it ...**
It's no surprise that dark Democrat blue states like Hawaii, California and New Jersey top the list of most expensive states. And, thanks to Governor Jay Inslee's really high-cost energy policies, Washington is moving up the list (led, of course, by King County). The DoxoINSIGHTS study found that Washington "residents spend about 37% of their income on household expenses, including rent, utilities and insurance." [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62132894:snE8CSDN7:m:1:2610672541:5C4179AD26D63FC57F7263B9C5F888F4:r). **This week 's bit of inspiration...** Take a moment to enjoy the beautiful photography of Cannon Beach in Oregon at sunset, courtesy of former U.S. Congressman Rod Chandler.
| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62132895:snE8CSDN7:m:1:2610672541:5C4179AD26D63FC57F7263B9C5F888F4:r)

clean_body: Gas prices are soaring - and Jay Inslee is not exactly telling the truth about why. But, as always, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. Read on... | | "Shift Washington" | Friends, Gas prices are soaring - and Jay Inslee is not exactly telling the truth about why. But, as always, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. Read on... This week 's need-to-know story... Amidst soaring summer gas prices, Governor Jay Inslee's administration is still struggling to disassociate the state's cap-and-tax law, designed to elevate gas prices, from the high prices everyone now faces. While the governor is busy attempting to avoid tying the high prices to his terrible climate schemes, Washington state's rapid surpassing of price limits in two carbon tax auctions led to an unprecedented emergency auction. Put in perspective, not even California has had to resort to such an emergency measure in 10 years of its cap-and-tax program - a reality that raises serious doubts about Washington's program sustainability. . This week 's top story... Sound Transit's persistent mismanagement and poor decision-making have provided ample material for Shift to critique over the last decade. The most recent revelation, highlighted by the Seattle Times, underscores a recurring pattern of inadequate planning, funding, and execution at the agency. The imminent disruption caused by sinking tracks near Seattle's stadiums shows how the complete disregard for critical issues by Sound Transit bureaucrats years ago continues to negatively impact daily commuters and travelers. . In case you missed it ... It's no surprise that dark Democrat blue states like Hawaii, California and New Jersey top the list of most expensive states. And, thanks to Governor Jay Inslee's really high-cost energy policies, Washington is moving up the list (led, of course, by King County). The DoxoINSIGHTS study found that Washington "residents spend about 37% of their income on household expenses, including rent, utilities and insurance." . This week 's bit of inspiration... Take a moment to enjoy the beautiful photography of Cannon Beach in Oregon at sunset, courtesy of former U.S. Congressman Rod Chandler. | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift Washington. The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning.**_

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. subject: A Republican candidate equated vaccines to“witchcraft” while state Democrats continue to defend abortion on the ballot … and everything else you need to know in the states
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, August 13th, 2023 | | |
---
| | | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdJPElWzrOkjP2c4XBSLnlNEqKycuLT0cGg7hFb5136xn7NSYna_uoCPO12Y85bVe_CzKuoJYbOerNO2iT1A-_KdSpkqiTUdhrCRr5weAXpBS2F2LQFGoDouaP4T6-jhzC0CvOjJEzpgG6YaEgcYyGCgEFOkGSsMIqV5fThMG-hgc7r7gSXC_o7JO3AQOd-8adW5YFgmSkUPE4s3a8HxaNnVdpg7ArOwFIQEcdvQDY1v60SBCAyFMGhn1KuZeLJsup7nek29Pms-oqhk_GtPToThdTtFlDUVtJS8Pu00V7ImpZcy1Ta0Z9Z4RXIV9kUfH5fVs6rD4bCJMgKGhENvmcPVw-I4odiFF6tZv2QNz1WStc3k13KC_W7cONTByLuqVphCk80Wq18ienTXf2OypRwlVS0QjJB5FKWQmajnn6R8VXTPN7Wg0GseCDsAx0D56mqPfMTcXY__D62GVxWF6ZCrNNqW324DfEX_54IOM6JgqJ1SuJZYYzNpKEeGwYEiFPD8ENj0h2KN2WxRc9Iiz4b1/3yp/WEGe_qJoTISpDPsqQuGNtA/h0/H634cNj1a2UC2d45DXyEUI6fFldZSRK8JUpIxs3GCbQ)

1️⃣ **_Michigan:_ Rejected recall petitions were refiled against House Democrats **
In Michigan, absurd recall petitions against House Democrats were refiled after being rejected. [**The state party caucus is working to fight these petitions and secure our majority →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jeW3EPvbh1Y535OPUYx-PaO3cSd8DuAOqG5zoIyt4JTVR90I92Mvp7O5CyHdbfnuOf7yYL5ugqglZ6eYBNF3p33VlGLpx1t5FXrUWCwshCULu0hIsxXxv1tXEVGlMp4RvpsJn0BWLSd--TzRFsqWECWNLA6SLToI-UEsASHemaTm-EL3kxJoneIXxiq9a2pZ-X1CALgper3olLY8HhanPU-yZRWkWznRH1biJFTNUQwS1D9W6hpxjtDUn18KNgibgDZT-PKlZPrrWSawVJ-yG4tpNbgYStwTQdxdjI8k58GKFFq-OhPeu-lOB3XWtxIxlouVU5-nDoh7q0XqW2yTjoy0WIJ_tmEb0UFVnH48T3pvEmEYeTF2XDF7jvvL0H0QjwBjswh7oAr-U1kK7Ni3TYAomnIas4daI_xc7VNdJo0yWh2baE8clqaHqRazjJj91Q6_1BnzPZCYxCg7JeI4PaS0pgp3CNT7zeFYA2797J-tJYvzUW98HFOVmXO-ho3zTR0odpdqai9dRpdGYGMD1lw-z9pYtoEePOjQJkJh8D301CeYrk74au-3-QjxOz46KWwxzckGW5lEpr18qL9fqfAyvzXoS93N9soeqa6DTH1t8gYL0D4-NlZqwfbjlPiK5veewP0e1V1FjQfwX7Gj5oOFP8cdmT2IqBg3FfkrxQN7vCVMX7eOwtHHTvdJtKnslEZK3cIZlsK15dYMnKvGtmWhZA5h6Jz_4oitXIRV3uej/3yp/WEGe_qJoTISpDPsqQuGNtA/h1/DKvKVmbmKAB7V1G6IDr60xJY72omCzOkwmnBBQwPp5g)
2️⃣ **_Ohio:_ Ohioans blocked a Republican amendment attempting to weaken voter’s voices **
In Ohio, Republicans failed to pass a proposal to require future amendments to garner 60% of the vote to pass. [**This is a huge win for abortion rights advocates as they look ahead to November’s elections →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOD8i7QwzRxtiKV0LARcM9aJwQLvS-QnPgIGhQgtSQwPX5Idh37YOGH1T8sP3GAKoRxUtAlYLOdV5cYOh8tykajBfWmxWxmLEKhor8uXXbGQP2__qNy9ie8UtY7GbgW8dM2De-KWsd_sTXXGh94P1p9EugOJX9gN46BTtbRPVIwWSGdS_lj3WxdxaW8eEHM6ST4mPiw3-xHOYm1ZBIKMjJ7x_yMw4iH8O29giu9VBHKItx8YJfaD-mLppeyiR1_3OrMwy7CbmG8ATsgqqBDx2qqYvuZuzmXTBYyDyI3HRTLNNJDR2exRTG4qpZ02g_GEo14mFbkoflAbVSmDqZzBAbwV01Jn3ZeIYrN1wvMB6nT37FQk37NodiUWyBP2shXMi1yHX9WXrsSEK8evNhC0NYaR_UPtr3TQtnkl-5EaV04U0IKKdwvZvADH2lN_Cis2wLIia0ZoyraVlWYgtDplB5he4675ZT1xctCY7kHPuC_3yIT9kcRXdaW5KoXmsqJ9oXwhkccG07LpHEy_4YyQDijVGvxI_ZmSSJkQXGy6fvpJuV99zWrZo6vDZ2UMw122B3bD07fGT6zTNeozry0v5kUgGIcgrGkvX8iOB4pdhZmOv4MxZuCzdJry5d_7HUzPbhL_lh-Zxcv515obFO4xyjoez6mw48g3ppksaEe0PTSE/3yp/WEGe_qJoTISpDPsqQuGNtA/h2/nrxQZOFxPqWm4HqquePn5sOhTHJl-MCJt0Sss-UxebA)
3️⃣ **_New Hampshire:_ The Republican nominee for next month’s special election is an anti-abortion, anti-LGBTQ+, anti-vaxx extremist **
In the New Hampshire House, where the GOP only holds a three seat-majority, the Republican running in next month’s special election holds extreme views on reproductive freedom, LGBTQ+ rights, and vaccines. [**He equated abortion to “blood sacrifices,” claimed homosexuality is “against nature,” and likened vaccines to “witchcraft” →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhjskcsVEkTRe1gdEtfbPSNxl35sBGIbj8K-WnEh_r9rb4yJ0aP3A-Jbh59-N5Pem0R9ZvDhrHlkwO5mDsqLBjHJRNSxK4J7eirWLiu9z2stYVGRSsKoOGjmdIOoWdHIkJVfaBmRGTBzThvJ_zyxBFuwIiVfZ8eubtxaDt4sipvFgXJjefCJrIEQGj66rf8T6RKECm97Td8qmqBB4aRF0LkRSRPNTPfA2n0Hv6p0pMuvlz2pGCcvH6Cn1GIdls2sshewGe4Go2zFhrhv3R9d3MZNgdKYBzQ9KT5QdZIpE2oqb_iGHuIhlT5cGF0Lx9lRE2tEwGLXpp__8m-jRwy1RRyRZ_NZRDT-Wca1jQqNZVnu8nZEmpiakqpTVakRmRQSG-rP7A-G2zOU_WccE8ei3ZL9fWjYGJIPMj8fEFebiEgoCUQjTiGn7IiFDMxqjT7lg1HYHNPBn-HR1u7cIH0SPHHQd0omhUM4w-u43yVUIsFvbAIggQsqEanYbpBvmm0T4405yLMHi9whotLBNw6OhZb-yFH82tzbHe3DGgnimyIBsBFaZlYuPO31pTvkDHS7-RJKhcYJ5r4hPoeNGUvMENO3MPXbs-5aMbqYgLt3HtkcSKk6kqx0Y7UPEtEIo6zGuVreiCgpYH3eSsjlTzIK4-Ono_dZ9wbWbbU5W9Izq3aRxUgQIs_ggeAsMLJOUg6J-FQ/3yp/WEGe_qJoTISpDPsqQuGNtA/h3/ZVF9S-l4t7IjhWSvERytetj2WE7x-p3ORd9YGh2PH3Y)
4️⃣ **_Arizona:_ Coalition launches effort to get abortion rights on the ballot **
The Arizona for Abortion Access committee filed a proposed constitutional amendment in one of our top 2024 target states [**to enshrine fundamental reproductive rights →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDDUV27dB1SLFWpo-Uwox6EOxeSEl3dZJDNCHt3ndRGK2XZDr1kl33QhDr3EtbPgC9S-8E2xC-uLSFJGtbuZAXLiny9Nev6BRtKpPowujO4r3nVt0uHQ86ikXqe2EZYc2Ry9u8ya_rJoolNoiSQc9ryWnlCp2ZgdrjoZvjcIDaPiY8HRRa-GbSGtDddT0_wHbNTMnWCOGT_Q6WW7ekKcw9tQL5Ot55yyJvrBsoAxqZagHgSyXx8j0G8csosjFYsOE2L7_bOE65rENnvmjIWy6twvbJc5pwZrq35-cMkR7tGaAO0LJKKv3ynMhjqa2OgbCInMacPCAV5rxlTztS53e0CgWlXIzf_KRc1PzcRl_R9b8TM3YbxE8dKrL9rxHFBEqbvqcOuUUuz-9yW6h_rs9X_AnwKU4rQNSYRhMVM_ayG8jwQdIXi2Y8WN1uED__RPrnpkH0dZXaAaTEyFjngO_qPKDEw9g11ECwdPi-JEhTvFzeM9FBKnHKkqETqr530e0gLUzVNy8qaVWjvDMjOZt6BWwQy0aVwz5G9YQ9_CuOD-QccM7lbbnALg9oEFZMyjDSAuBWCnUwYJikWh_PETGFHLqy-N8k7y077NyugqXKvkVS53pj7e_nyyHH-GW4gCtka3YZdQTAeScIIHNbMEA_DybA7BFqgQVyeBsg4KI7TGac0nF3uj5TqO4YQQ1A4ldcQ/3yp/WEGe_qJoTISpDPsqQuGNtA/h4/TpF_vVzZbu5bIclphUZL7PBg-lB4rU0xuZzwLA6AC6I)
**🗳️ _Special Elections:_** Over the next two months, Democrats are facing a slew of special elections in states like New Hampshire, Tennessee, and Pennsylvania so [**we’re calling on grassroots Dems to help power our candidates to victory →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZ4znX1V30AzyoPQGNX0DNOnW0LVZqJhrgvRbrc0XdJ9BIcVUr9bg058v0BI2mrkyjI6EtuyFW8UuG0K_eTWp2Cg-iwJvBIHtSc7UaraH8SmLjnC0WxqMrFGYY7RubLMLB0eF8JDeA_NBofq6bLQj5fJbxidC8Xq50XFMa8TaEDWGOO4Rwe3XETiR5WbWUJ8AlbRNmiUDvbiHXIYPfGv9KyR-gwR8AtyLN7SfJA5s8OYzCiDdIEi69zbKYgGaWt-Pm_qGrRiF0zgAfDg9pYApP3GctbpN8n8nJck8OoVQUOu2lPAOSfbzt51XBDTGJDeC3dpqY-PjhJUY6sV7vmPNzr72DnJQbTHGAn4YqPAEFLtBa9FcgaoJ4Vh4CT64KxJSDMYQzVdPfBfjCY6tjWPsVVIA0fHMF70di99_ISBiFeKPim_OdltenM6XRqt1KsUoFL4wGvdHRAYClwii311agB_U9-HLvYXB99KYyRKzwcqVBYwD5m-GIiA9-Ru7jgq4oNHtAja4TgK6gklLW1btj-BMPt7l4hspSl4dt0pzBcdM/3yp/WEGe_qJoTISpDPsqQuGNtA/h5/sjKxItTrjACSEHlR59hdKIL_SOFzPbZ7CKl1rc2H8RQ)

clean_body: Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, August 13th, 2023 | | | | | | 1️⃣ Michigan: Rejected recall petitions were refiled against House Democrats In Michigan, absurd recall petitions against House Democrats were refiled after being rejected. 2️⃣ Ohio: Ohioans blocked a Republican amendment attempting to weaken voter’s voices In Ohio, Republicans failed to pass a proposal to require future amendments to garner 60% of the vote to pass. 3️⃣ New Hampshire: The Republican nominee for next month’s special election is an anti-abortion, anti-LGBTQ+, anti-vaxx extremist In the New Hampshire House, where the GOP only holds a three seat-majority, the Republican running in next month’s special election holds extreme views on reproductive freedom, LGBTQ+ rights, and vaccines. 4️⃣ Arizona: Coalition launches effort to get abortion rights on the ballot The Arizona for Abortion Access committee filed a proposed constitutional amendment in one of our top 2024 target states 🗳️ Special Elections: Over the next two months, Democrats are facing a slew of special elections in states like New Hampshire, Tennessee, and Pennsylvania so ** | | ---|---|--- ** | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: RE: Sign to protect public health from corporate polluters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
I just reintroduced the Cumulative Impacts Act to put people’s health first. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv---HOb7OxC66zSKFDBOarog-k5LhWrFgkSJ2rqDuCXuYBMulN6QyRe_FpeCgsUw-RSl03e1V9VuQqIVXcLAWSlTuWH33biM4s5ANM5rRscxAYNxEi1L6pQ2cGsdJSDibS5W5u-me3nvERlGt--vBI8lohDcStC-UnQTy0_s3PIIyNjM0S2CnMVWWxG5ZhUa6u9jpd7l3qaBpWnOgCRQnrVkdy86H0l8aw3eIfNDNqkY/3yp/r2jmlN_TSTKGnvsr2lLZ6A/h0/AGj9qi2Zilni0GzCOLaeZ71Xm5wLecUrg3Hfn7ReQZM)
---
Friend, People across the country face health complications every day due to unchecked corporate polluters poisoning our neighborhoods. **Where pollution happens is a policy choice, and corporations tend to concentrate their industrial pollution in Black and brown communities.** Higher concentrations of pollution have compounding harms for public health—leading to high rates of cancer, respiratory diseases, infant mortality, and more. To address this environmental racism and protect our public health from corporate polluters, I just reintroduced the _Cumulative Impacts Act_. The bill would require the EPA to consider the cumulative harms of pollution in an area before granting permits for polluting facilities—and to deny permits for facilities that would endanger public health. This would be a revolutionary, transformative change for our neighbors who just want to breathe clean air. [**Please sign on today to support the**** _Cumulative Impacts Act_****, which would protect our right to clean air and water, centering public health over polluter profits.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyAR14j_zoIVV3sFcajuSDyXT7sl8yJhSDldsi2Y_n75-lxlP7AHwOQiVbi4MOZ8Ax4uCIdW4E-nps0San8o6_eBgAhaWOSzp5FO2GRqPDdiBk1mNZTUCK6DVZBmPs9AfOw-pNGztygg20pmxw84uCl-YS_VeWmGqN-f6fo2ORq-K7U3q005MwxU_1TJ2_vjzTkgFFYjoA6ntwWJK7b0P2nY947dzqrR53gUnF0ejIsqYA9HNrtR067aG4a57PbOogx_lcYW0_5Wq-zk-dlCHhv-xkcn04qtgPbEkdbMxAoxiLJjpqentQxZHapFrSZeuLAKCXSLWFsbNExbGu8fSyzT6lf4x1vfLNnRa439pnCsBkZOSSUAatsl9LqNKyCMkgBoIX8Vfospu4PNbCfh3OaE9K3hvfS_b6zRM21rplLlZ03CufEnSeNylZgA3ZI-fPQmxMA8aihs0vJ-hlfAIxjXyAdIxn4JGwSRg8uRySpBIPogsH-Z0hJNfoXBG-zaCIDrSRQ5B2CwBFxw2O9hsDERZEq86Glv9BJbKDGZZF7c98BJ_zr2NqBvgZn2FWUqgQQi5YAU2AMUpNWTDW-OHnKgDVgag67tbfDAX3iSp4Qx9Iw/3yp/r2jmlN_TSTKGnvsr2lLZ6A/h1/KoSgSUcumnJhjJdhFYla7YLd3weoCRVTP_KL3CY7duU) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyAR14j_zoIVV3sFcajuSDyXT7sl8yJhSDldsi2Y_n75-lxlP7AHwOQiVbi4MOZ8Ax4uCIdW4E-nps0San8o6_eBgAhaWOSzp5FO2GRqPDdiBk1mNZTUCK6DVZBmPs9AfOw-pNGztygg20pmxw84uCl-YS_VeWmGqN-f6fo2ORq-K7U3q005MwxU_1TJ2_vjzTkgFFYjoA6ntwWJK7b0P2nY947dzqrR53gUnF0ejIsqYA9HNrtR067aG4a57PbOogx_lcYW0_5Wq-zk-dlCHhv-xkcn04qtgPbEkdbMxAoxiLJjpqentQxZHapFrSZeuLAKCXSLWFsbNExbGu8fSyzT6lf4x1vfLNnRa439pnCsBkY0B5uSB9-AU87xxS4-77Lig0XXi2yGKzBYGLoa80qEei3VDtDZ08ecbtPNbDD_sKiiegIY96altLd2_7cUEcQg8lfx4yHDyejHle41v84CelOnYmuF73luIlzCC661SsowiqOfrLsNdbc2OAZTgFKGKxjp8OXltPM_HmsHkJevmH46QG47G7qTy394h2VdzbPm9zpea5QpOGQ5vrYBPw_f7-Wh7us-2mREk7lqGzT8LpCVg0-K56Eeq33uuAZSq4Y/3yp/r2jmlN_TSTKGnvsr2lLZ6A/h2/u1dbio5I81AzzZwBBVa1PSHn56qGaG4lY7QkIF_UmOQ)

In solidarity,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Rashida Tlaib
Date: Sat, Aug 12, 2023
Subject: Sign to protect public health from corporate polluters
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Listening to our residents, especially our seniors talk about having some of the worst asthma this year is devastating. We can't let this become our new normal.
With the 12th Congressional District having some of the worst air quality in the world, it's time for us to move with urgency.
We have seen it over and over again where corporate polluters operate in majority Black and brown communities like ours. This has compounding harms for public health—leading to high rates of cancer, respiratory diseases, infant mortality, and more. For example, Metro Detroit has some of the highest asthma rates in the country, and Black Detroiters are over three times more likely to be hospitalized for asthma.
**Something has to change. This is why I reintroduced the**** _Cumulative Impacts Act_****.**
The bill would require the EPA to consider the cumulative harms of pollution in an area before granting permits for polluting facilities—and to deny permits for facilities that would endanger public health. This would be a revolutionary, transformative change for our neighbors who just want to breathe clean air.
[**Please sign today to support the**** _Cumulative Impacts Act_****, which would require environmental regulators to prioritize people’s health over the profits of corporate polluters.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyAR14j_zoIVV3sFcajuSDyXT7sl8yJhSDldsi2Y_n75-lxlP7AHwOQiVbi4MOZ8Ax4uCIdW4E-nps0San8o6_eBgAhaWOSzp5FO2GRqPDdiBk1mNZTUCK6DVZBmPs9AfOw-pNGztygg20pmxw84uCl-YS_VeWmGqN-f6fo2ORq-K7U3q005MwxU_1TJ2_vjzTkgFFYjoA6ntwWJK7b0P2nY947dzqrR53gUnF0ejIsqYA9HNrtR067aG4a57PbOogx_lcYW0_5Wq-zk-dlCHhv-xkcn04qtgPbEkdbMxAoxiLJjpqentQxZHapFrSZeuLAKCXSLWFsbNExbGu8fSyzT6lf4x1vfLNnRa439pnCsBkaCHpLje73BG6gb968ZxNaRgXLE-YTI1zM7SS8JeS7AEpRCpAmEAsLWW2z-aOdOloloShYVKyIg8eH4rJI5rDoI-hNr7o1AWnd7bFa2kYVymzLfx_gof60D1w9vtI3T2FF6PnraFOPrGsrVAOQ-Vli0tCtnzx8GciAjLA-KEb-C9WR2w-RSrAAO5IzBUArZKF9QbG8oU6npHC3kNk5sly_SoLN96EClWuJtE4PQo7zbk1SV-yO173g_Lk7MQEaDw5g/3yp/r2jmlN_TSTKGnvsr2lLZ6A/h3/IznvCdwtuVSl-p38sIW2yeamvRX3IPE6psLJbGEeOP8)
[SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyAR14j_zoIVV3sFcajuSDyXT7sl8yJhSDldsi2Y_n75-lxlP7AHwOQiVbi4MOZ8Ax4uCIdW4E-nps0San8o6_eBgAhaWOSzp5FO2GRqPDdiBk1mNZTUCK6DVZBmPs9AfOw-pNGztygg20pmxw84uCl-YS_VeWmGqN-f6fo2ORq-K7U3q005MwxU_1TJ2_vjzTkgFFYjoA6ntwWJK7b0P2nY947dzqrR53gUnF0ejIsqYA9HNrtR067aG4a57PbOogx_lcYW0_5Wq-zk-dlCHhv-xkcn04qtgPbEkdbMxAoxiLJjpqentQxZHapFrSZeuLAKCXSLWFsbNExbGu8fSyzT6lf4x1vfLNnRa439pnCsBkaHLWoa6bB7obei8R02DnWmogeHqxql_kdRbAbAjBO_dXa9L4HoCi8XNJvcSumXZGOGdmXkpcJerPSUmZmpdr-VtzHDbbAqPkUA9Y3kKtR3b_qXx8nN_sSIyM1nKk_po7QT3p6suf-ebG0M0YnjlLZWwLf6IdqjgkGdI4FRStivKM8e8GOL-3YTTii8_o_zYTXsZskFu4caFRzRux5MShmhYyCmsMMhims7gO71OK56-XOCVey5tC9pdKps3qn2oOE/3yp/r2jmlN_TSTKGnvsr2lLZ6A/h4/yN1Ie0l_y8lfAuSy4JxamH1wYzqImqlGiqz1JvdsQVo)
---
When approving new polluting facilities, the EPA doesn’t currently take into account the cumulative impacts—the public health and environmental effects of past, present, and future pollution releases in the community.
The _Cumulative Impacts Act_ would require the EPA to analyze cumulative impacts in permitting decisions under the _Clean Air Act_ and _Clean Water Act_ , and deny permit applications unless the applicant can demonstrate a reasonable certainty of no harm to the community or vulnerable groups.
**This legislation will protect and empower residents of frontline communities who are living with the devastating effects of climate change and fossil fuel development.** That includes residents of Dearborn’s South End, which is home to an extreme concentration of corporate polluters that sit directly across from schools, homes, and playgrounds.
Samra’a Luqman, a community advocate in the neighborhood, says:_“We refuse to continue being the nation’s dumping ground for industries and corporations in the name of corporate greed. My family and our neighbors deserve to breathe clean air and drink clean water as basic human rights, and we need new laws that will put the well-being of impacted communities before the profits of the companies poisoning us.”_
Yes, we all deserve to breathe clean air and drink clean water. Where pollution occurs is a policy choice, and we can change the EPA’s permitting process to put people’s health first—particularly in communities already overburdened by air and water pollution.
[**Please sign today to support the**** _Cumulative Impacts Act_****, to rectify environmental racism and protect our public health from corporate polluters.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyAR14j_zoIVV3sFcajuSDyXT7sl8yJhSDldsi2Y_n75-lxlP7AHwOQiVbi4MOZ8Ax4uCIdW4E-nps0San8o6_eBgAhaWOSzp5FO2GRqPDdiBk1mNZTUCK6DVZBmPs9AfOw-pNGztygg20pmxw84uCl-YS_VeWmGqN-f6fo2ORq-K7U3q005MwxU_1TJ2_vjzTkgFFYjoA6ntwWJK7b0P2nY947dzqrR53gUnF0ejIsqYA9HNrtR067aG4a57PbOogx_lcYW0_5Wq-zk-dlCHhv-xkcn04qtgPbEkdbMxAoxiLJjpqentQxZHapFrSZeuLAKCXSLWFsbNExbGu8fSyzT6lf4x1vfLNnRa439pnCsBkYYxGT6830Xd9Ge3cjS3se8dydDoFIiLBFprHRf6Rr95l7tPC79Dxln4AOQJjo1laTdYJU3HKTd7wrTSnNFWPhjhh5g-N-jhqeZ_2Gh0IYn6nrvOpFKAxxRj-0ID2TX9nfG7TNJS4Y3Dg1SdhCUNkcj7vluQA8vBgzqD85khM-63S-QToOzlyXU8G6M_jiK65rn9AaRNuz1QceD9LACTINBng_HxHlQmlIS3XI0jPd08vPdO6tzBoHKqsCDn0yhWYM/3yp/r2jmlN_TSTKGnvsr2lLZ6A/h5/XlrqM002-xMbGeQptCb3z6CAfP_mZPotSejZNwfCmds)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyAR14j_zoIVV3sFcajuSDyXT7sl8yJhSDldsi2Y_n75-lxlP7AHwOQiVbi4MOZ8Ax4uCIdW4E-nps0San8o6_eBgAhaWOSzp5FO2GRqPDdiBk1mNZTUCK6DVZBmPs9AfOw-pNGztygg20pmxw84uCl-YS_VeWmGqN-f6fo2ORq-K7U3q005MwxU_1TJ2_vjzTkgFFYjoA6ntwWJK7b0P2nY947dzqrR53gUnF0ejIsqYA9HNrtR067aG4a57PbOogx_lcYW0_5Wq-zk-dlCHhv-xkcn04qtgPbEkdbMxAoxiLJjpqentQxZHapFrSZeuLAKCXSLWFsbNExbGu8fSyzT6lf4x1vfLNnRa439pnCsBkYqnhkcbol-SDdeoNTMzODCZZGH3WkNMEjOBSVnT_WSdUKWC_bk26YS7LUaR2huhxIsNy29JX26bZj42fn6fCjjeurcLKq2YVpWaOBUNn8N3yBZvH1hrl9gU_oSetB_C2rNoJQCWFzVfVZvLeb5owp5ycLf-3P3zqjq9BgCvUFyfav6Y1qTx0GniaUP0lRoo-y3avdPvfzmHn7z87jhxq33y50T1dxll1LxbUtSMLRJ2hgD8vxma3dDn06KNiIau2I/3yp/r2jmlN_TSTKGnvsr2lLZ6A/h6/DkLVx_-Ovr4_G5by6KDbxnXP9Gs1UmRkM6IhV3DgyxE)

Thank you for taking action. I will continue to hold corporate polluters accountable for treating communities of color like mine as sacrifice zones. Together, we’ll keep fighting for a world where all of us can thrive.
In solidarity,
Rashida

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3c22f086b4d42138e24bae03c7371e6&_e=wgJEL-CJkVMXs0Ddo1Vy5uayKei7lJ72WKVTOfXnnHxiAkUpSavzSvBsYXtlC6LM0AQaAADpaKn2nNMwgbypZcK4uKaziZoxLV3ELDk5-aYjmuHTrcxcbCN9IowV7epdAW65E1jK6BYcsgVO1jpfP_OkMdh23ng_vaki9S_T0sVQf41yLK09zhclgkepmZIHIigU2MkPJSLN6huivjScGFHjVcCfHGwQOvrTPeHa8rk5FuMe2zDDoUEBNTU97hS73LoWB287WqbRJq2x7DceUS4c3rfjqgIzop7-Xp_GY7DSg8Fgo-EBTsd916yLD08IYCwHzwubjzyUTWpEJRHcQK7TQiGd8Iy3m7_CEeqqCo5APfslIlf_26hxE3ciV64AmJxuXIuUCre1EmkMpLeTTw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3c22f086b4d42138e24bae03c7371e6&_e=wgJEL-CJkVMXs0Ddo1Vy5uayKei7lJ72WKVTOfXnnHxiAkUpSavzSvBsYXtlC6LM0AQaAADpaKn2nNMwgbypZcK4uKaziZoxLV3ELDk5-aYjmuHTrcxcbCN9IowV7epdAW65E1jK6BYcsgVO1jpfP_OkMdh23ng_vaki9S_T0sVQf41yLK09zhclgkepmZIHIigU2MkPJSLN6huivjScGFHjVcCfHGwQOvrTPeHa8rk5FuMe2zDDoUEBNTU97hS7V7pT_Lh5aq06PO-hJZYZ4CsyvYnfPhIejXCjuBQtqXT1uBKjbgOCNQ3NcEbo6Q-Gg1UbkLlXQXYuisXEPh4VdZncTR7rFN8TQUKhoiNDD9uDeM3KUZQruXq0waio8Jc8Qmeb8N3AQsFXMjtdyS8Lpw%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3c22f086b4d42138e24bae03c7371e6&_e=wgJEL-CJkVMXs0Ddo1Vy5uayKei7lJ72WKVTOfXnnHxiAkUpSavzSvBsYXtlC6LM0AQaAADpaKn2nNMwgbypZcK4uKaziZoxLV3ELDk5-aYjmuHTrcxcbCN9IowV7epdAW65E1jK6BYcsgVO1jpfP_OkMdh23ng_vaki9S_T0sVQf41yLK09zhclgkepmZIHIigU2MkPJSLN6huivjScGFHjVcCfHGwQOvrTPeHa8rk5FuMe2zDDoUEBNTU97hS7WJ0uO2AO8VYgZO3pcPMj3MVlref59kBUmf3DNTjo2h_jIQNzZ8Cfvh9lS2Y5dx_hFJYV4T-swmTQALWviNcB3vZZUXfik6L2bHdDwzLWxvLzWbKwS1UuD_SVC2Qc3f8b7iOd_Txy2nWTrZT-u8hbHw%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Fox News, Hunter Biden, and Jared Kushner
body:
We can see right through their cheap ‘journalism.’
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1375%2E120351%2EBrQnP8)
Peter, we have to talk about Fox News’ obsession with Hunter Biden.
The network has been ramping up their misinformation-fueled coverage of the Biden family, painting them as some sort of crime syndicate.
**But we know Fox News isn’t focused on the truth.** They’re focused on enraging their audience to drive ratings and push an extreme right wing agenda. Their obsession with Hunter Biden is a page out of the same playbook they used in 2016 to smear Hillary Clinton and in 2020 to push Trump’s Big Lie.
At Courier Newsroom, we fight back by telling our readers the truth about the Biden-Harris administration while covering local issues that actually impact our readers everyday lives.
**As opposed to whatever this is** :
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230813?refcode=em20230813&amount=5&refcode2=1375_120351_BrQnP8&akid=1375%2E120351%2EBrQnP8)
[**As we get closer to the 2024 election — and a potential Biden-Trump rematch — trustworthy, facts-first local journalism has never been more important. Our work is powered by your grassroots donations, so will you chip in $5 now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230813?refcode=em20230813&amount=5&refcode2=1375_120351_BrQnP8&akid=1375%2E120351%2EBrQnP8)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230813?refcode=em20230813&amount=5&refcode2=1375_120351_BrQnP8&akid=1375%2E120351%2EBrQnP8)**
Here’s the added kicker, Peter.

While Fox rages on about the Biden family, it’s no coincidence that they are radio silent about the Trump family, including allegations that Jared Kushner used his White House connections to grift his way into a $2 billion dollar investment from the Saudi crown prince.
The reasons behind Fox’s hypocrisy aren’t hard to understand. Pushing lies about Joe and Hunter Biden drives ratings and helps them push a right-wing agenda that includes carrying water for Donald Trump.
The Courier Newsroom model couldn’t be more different. We take the responsibility of delivering good, factual information seriously and will never compromise the truth or our values in our work.
[**If you believe in our fight against bad information, will you chip in $5 now to power the work of our dedicated news teams?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230813?refcode=em20230813&amount=5&refcode2=1375_120351_BrQnP8&akid=1375%2E120351%2EBrQnP8)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230813?refcode=em20230813&amount=5&refcode2=1375_120351_BrQnP8&akid=1375%2E120351%2EBrQnP8)**
Thanks for being in this fight with us,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1375_120351_BrQnP8&akid=1375%2E120351%2EBrQnP8)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1375%2E120351%2EBrQnP8)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

subject: I’m FUMING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Why in the HELL would New York state be awarded $130 million for migrant containment efforts when states like Arizona bear the brunt of the illegal activity?
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=33e2b5ce4dcc4be0854fd65d037d4f65&_t=MRxsp5Wz_wK_ip3v_ZStE_5d6W8VfKU4V4eCo2wCXKV_SlOGBaMH7zzsCozQ91FoEN1Yje5DFE65plP2DECDNTb5jz_e0mkx5w4xPkpUQqY%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=33e2b5ce4dcc4be0854fd65d037d4f65&_t=MRxsp5Wz_wK_ip3v_ZStE_5d6W8VfKU4V4eCo2wCXKV_SlOGBaMH7zzsCozQ91FoEN1Yje5DFE65plP2DECDNTb5jz_e0mkx5w4xPkpUQqY%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=33e2b5ce4dcc4be0854fd65d037d4f65&_e=cWVatdNkSKt6GjYh6BdO5YyAqEMUsTZHqfmPCWbzW26OJD0I2EiCflOPfRNqk9ClBSUVwuO6icgY9AyUfufSj9Kl20KfLWfm9g0estb3z0YmMtIfJDN4dKiVEGeAdURhcM1UMvqmVrnv2UBj-b29jOZm8I9d4optk-D9MGEf2caU-RdR3OTkuswycXo-rflHTloCZ4FyAVcA8cyzXb7AJ89NPCqKdzNiCi4nv5ULFchLhk0cVLTvZpTssvnHyvrqYQaPqIufiKrT8McwuhSj1ukqSlkztHJr0qXPX0JcmObem6aCMEpPxjchUXk6qLuPZLVWhko68Rp-3gwBfIu9FC7JA4JsjAfUjvkaaQ051ej81Ra2-TVGWFRsD-OZqa7dll85tvzMM3FVW0UA5sZiqQ%3D%3D)
| $130 MILLION TO NEW YORK CITY TO MANAGE **_"MIGRANT CRISIS"_**
Peter,

Our Southern Border is not secure and every member of the House and Senate, whether they want to admit it or not, knows it. **There have been 2,310,987 border encounters in fiscal year 2023 so far; in 2022, there were 2,378,944!**

As Sheriff of Pinal County – Arizona’s 3rd largest – it’s up to me and my deputies to ensure the security of the communities under our jurisdiction. And unlike President Biden and Washington Democrats, I don’t play favorites. **As I see it, every man, woman, and child deserve a safe community in which to live. Again, that’s my belief, and it’s not necessarily one that the President or the Senate majority leader share. **

_**IF THEY DID, $130 MILLION**_ in federal aid wouldn’t have gone to New York City to help their city manage their own “migrant surge.” **Think about it:** New York doesn’t share a border with Mexico like Arizona does, so why would the Federal Emergency Management Agency funnel such a significant amount of cash to New York City? Well, probably because Chuck Schumer is from Brooklyn! Want to know something else Arizona doesn’t have that New York City does? **Deep pocketed Democrat donors who aren’t used to migrants freely wondering into their upper crust communities uninvited.**

Meanwhile in Arizona where we’re bearing the brunt of illegal border encounters, along with New Mexico, Texas and California, **we’ve received just $45 million from feds to help prevent overcrowding in migrant facilities.**
**
** **THIS IS AS WRONG AS WRONG GETS!**

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

| | I'm probably one of the biggest nerds in Congress. I put a Lego Millennium Falcon on our wedding registry – much to the chagrin of my wife. To not seem completely self-indulgent, I told her I'd wait until we had kids to build it. After 10 patient years, I finally had the chance to share it with my sons a few years ago. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68019492/421659570/-821065315?refcode=2023-08-13-legos&recurring=&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=81c88c90-e239-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWM4OGM5MC1lMjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYwZc2hJFqVJhPqiz97YAZ0hArwWc2F5mWz54W8BAzc=) My kids started with Darth Vader and Chewbacca. Of course. Then they fought epic battles, and eventually, we were able to get some building done. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68019493/421659571/-821065315?refcode=2023-08-13-legos&recurring=&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=81c88c90-e239-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWM4OGM5MC1lMjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYwZc2hJFqVJhPqiz97YAZ0hArwWc2F5mWz54W8BAzc=) The next morning, I heard some noise that woke me up at 6:30 am. I came downstairs to find my son working on the Falcon by himself. He had done a couple of big build steps all on his own. I was so proud! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68019494/421659572/-821065315?refcode=2023-08-13-legos&recurring=&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=81c88c90-e239-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWM4OGM5MC1lMjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYwZc2hJFqVJhPqiz97YAZ0hArwWc2F5mWz54W8BAzc=) My boys spent the whole day at school scheming a better way to organize pieces and settled on color coding. This allowed us to be much faster. I loved seeing them problem-solve and work towards efficiency. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68019495/421659573/-821065315?refcode=2023-08-13-legos&recurring=&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=81c88c90-e239-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWM4OGM5MC1lMjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYwZc2hJFqVJhPqiz97YAZ0hArwWc2F5mWz54W8BAzc=) After several days the Millennium Falcon was finally finished! The boys promptly asked if I could get the Falcon displayed in the Capitol building. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68019496/421659574/-821065315?refcode=2023-08-13-legos&recurring=&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=81c88c90-e239-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWM4OGM5MC1lMjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYwZc2hJFqVJhPqiz97YAZ0hArwWc2F5mWz54W8BAzc=) The boys were totally hooked on Legos and Star Wars. Since then, many subsequent Star Wars Lego sets have been built. And they were over the moon to see the "real life" Millennium Falcon. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68019497/421659575/-821065315?refcode=2023-08-13-legos&recurring=&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=81c88c90-e239-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWM4OGM5MC1lMjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYwZc2hJFqVJhPqiz97YAZ0hArwWc2F5mWz54W8BAzc=) I'm so grateful for the opportunity to share things like Star Wars and Legos with my kids. I love being their Dad. I also love getting to share my passions with them, whether it be Legos and Star Wars or problem-solving and service to our community. It's exciting to see them grow! **Ultimately, my kids are the reason I'm in Congress.** I'm in this fight for my kids' future and the future of all our children. clean_body: | | | | I'm probably one of the biggest nerds in Congress. I put a Lego Millennium Falcon on our wedding registry – much to the chagrin of my wife. To not seem completely self-indulgent, I told her I'd wait until we had kids to build it. After 10 patient years, I finally had the chance to share it with my sons a few years ago. = My kids started with Darth Vader and Chewbacca. Of course. Then they fought epic battles, and eventually, we were able to get some building done. = The next morning, I heard some noise that woke me up at 6:30 am. I came downstairs to find my son working on the Falcon by himself. He had done a couple of big build steps all on his own. I was so proud! = My boys spent the whole day at school scheming a better way to organize pieces and settled on color coding. This allowed us to be much faster. I loved seeing them problem-solve and work towards efficiency. = After several days the Millennium Falcon was finally finished! The boys promptly asked if I could get the Falcon displayed in the Capitol building. = The boys were totally hooked on Legos and Star Wars. Since then, many subsequent Star Wars Lego sets have been built. And they were over the moon to see the "real life" Millennium Falcon. = I'm so grateful for the opportunity to share things like Star Wars and Legos with my kids. I love being their Dad. I also love getting to share my passions with them, whether it be Legos and Star Wars or problem-solving and service to our community. It's exciting to see them grow! Ultimately, my kids are the reason I'm in Congress. I'm in this fight for my kids' future and the future of all our children. They deserve a world where our leaders serve the people. I'm committed to making sure that happens. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress. | This email was sent by Andy Kim for Congress P.O. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Is there ANYTHING I can say? Anything at all?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
And what if I told you that your donation actually matters!
#

I am writing to humbly ask if there is ANYTHING at all that I can say to convince you to make your first online contribution to my campaign as we kick off our mid-month fundraising drive?
What if I told you that a story just dropped about how Kari Lake is starting to interview staff and consultants? She’s clearly working to get her campaign off the ground, and we can expect her to announce any time.
What if I told you that Emerson released a new poll the other day and it showed me TIED with MAGA sheriff Mark Lamb? Tied with a GOP opponent is not where we need to be 15 months out from the election.
What if I told you Kyrsten Sinema already has millions of dollars in the bank, is undoubtedly raising more from huge donors as you read this, and almost all our donations come from people giving small amounts in response to emails like this.
And what if I told you that your donation actually matters? It matters because reaching our goals is a sign of strength that will lead to more donations and even more fundraising, setting our campaign up to WIN this race?
Please, Peter. A lot of people are chipping in today to help us reach our goals. And what if I told you they're hoping you'll do the same to make sure we get there? I am.
[**Can we count on you to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona? We’ve had a tough time these past few weeks, and we’re hoping this mid-month drive will help us catch up.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230813-1-f&t=1&akid=919%2E734936%2EBYjKyy)

Thank you in advance for chipping in to help win this seat.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
subject: Lowering prescription prices, tackling the climate crisis, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The Inflation Reduction Act is the perfect example of Joe and Kamala’s work to help families across the country thrive. | | |
---
Hi Peter, it's Senator Cory Booker. When Joe asked me to join his campaign’s National Advisory Board, I knew right away how important it was to step up and amplify the great work Joe and Kamala are doing to help families across the country thrive. The _Inflation Reduction Act_ is a perfect example. It’s a once-in-a-generation piece of legislation that aims to lower health care costs, tackle the climate crisis, and invest in American manufacturing, all while not raising taxes on the middle class. Here’s a quick rundown of what this legislation has done in the year since Joe signed it into law: ➡️ Gave the federal government the power to negotiate drug prices ➡️ Capped the cost of insulin to $35 for seniors on Medicare ➡️ Took the most aggressive action _ever_ in confronting the climate crisis and strengthening our energy security ➡️ Helped hardworking families save hundreds of dollars a year on energy costs thanks to new tax credits and rebates That’s real progress, Peter, and we’re just scratching the surface. [You can learn more about the Inflation Reduction Act by clicking here, and I hope you’ll join Joe, Kamala, and me as we continue to build on the progress we’ve already made.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEA0Es8AR8U9h_eL5jzwmAJrLNSn3nhiRb5wEulxUysoteo0edtxbh7SwkVLjhNPS9kIPVDSUujsnC5uoT8cfgauYg4SliRDo1jjDggFI_6o0ApnVmTNNVI620pKzQNcY6y39gCIvbNRnzOZbiB6oJkJdVRtsgE9gtonOFVMsXSt6XmENjXg1wCmgZRq7DapLIIlmExOq2x289eo4_FTZmqw77pHFIgBL_auTTKIWef0wDjESqz3GsM6A7qZcmZu4tlUW67nlPrLnmtARDfsBPQrtFXvsN6hwGjRCdK-25Yoz-iNM2RwXxZQVgYkqKA82RCz8-xzgkio6VT1uw_C5nyY7Hi4oSdYbcY2lzpavpdz8HrXlce3Kkoe2xx44WzNBsJa2WYkV4pOtZ4-Ow2yuaRvuGKN3hM3opPwMYvCpzyEd4YhE-GB64ZOx-PXFAV0pg/3yp/Gl0ONgf4QXaSZuE16e089A/h0/BjtS7CfGqdTELun0BB_qXKlLovCmlxpyCfRdGkUf2XY)

clean_body: The Inflation Reduction Act is the perfect example of Joe and Kamala’s work to help families across the country thrive. | | | Hi Peter, it's Senator Cory Booker. When Joe asked me to join his campaign’s National Advisory Board, I knew right away how important it was to step up and amplify the great work Joe and Kamala are doing to help families across the country thrive. The Inflation Reduction Act is a perfect example. It’s a once-in-a-generation piece of legislation that aims to lower health care costs, tackle the climate crisis, and invest in American manufacturing, all while not raising taxes on the middle class. Here’s a quick rundown of what this legislation has done in the year since Joe signed it into law: ➡️ Gave the federal government the power to negotiate drug prices ➡️ Capped the cost of insulin to $35 for seniors on Medicare ➡️ Took the most aggressive action ever in confronting the climate crisis and strengthening our energy security ➡️ Helped hardworking families save hundreds of dollars a year on energy costs thanks to new tax credits and rebates That’s real progress, Peter, and we’re just scratching the surface. | | | Thanks for taking the time to read this message, and for your support of Joe and Kamala. I know it means the world to them. Cory Cory Booker U.S. Senator, New Jersey | |

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Democracy Is an Act
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
This month marks the anniversary of the Voting Rights Act (VRA), and while we celebrate this historic piece of legislation, it’s hard to do so without acknowledging systemic efforts to undermine the VRA and make it harder for people to vote.
Since 2020, we’ve seen election denial take hold and dozens of restrictive voting laws enacted. We’ve seen states make it harder for people to vote, clear the way for political interference in our elections, and further gerrymander maps. In Alabama, lawmakers have defied the U.S. Supreme Court’s order to honor a key provision of the VRA and draw new maps that give Black Alabamians fairer representation.
Extremists have become even more emboldened to undermine our democratic process. In fact, House Republicans are taking voter suppression to the national level. They voted to advance a bill that would encourage states to enact even more voting restrictions.
As always, I’m fighting back. I’m proud to be an original co-sponsor of the Freedom to Vote Act , which Democrats recently reintroduced and which, if enacted, would combat voter suppression; expand automatic, same-day registration and early voting; and strengthen voting by mail.
I had the great privilege of serving in Congress with one of the greatest citizens our country has ever known, Congressman John Lewis. In a beautiful letter he wrote to us all shortly before his death, he reminded us that democracy is not a state, it is an act. And he reminded us that we must take action:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tU5mIYmFH0uNYMH1KIbACw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tU5mIYmFH0uNYMH1KIbACw2]
It is time for us to use our votes to protect the rights of others to cast theirs and to engage people across our country to exercise this precious right.
We see the precariousness and the possibility of democracy in this moment. Will you add your name to show your support for efforts to protect voting rights? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tU5mIYmFH0uNYMH1KIbACw2]
The 2024 elections are the next essential step in protecting our democracy. That’s why I am so grateful for all the people who have been working together on this team to do so since 2018.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie_signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230811pet?refcode=folf230811pet]
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF LIZZIE FLETCHER, A JOINT FUNDRAISING COMMITTEE AUTHORIZED BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS AND LEADING PEOPLE FORWARD PAC.

name: Darcy
subject: Our work heats up now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | Here at Districts for Democracy, we currently are monitoring almost 100 school board candidates across nearly as many races. If we can raise $50k, we can immediately donate $500 to each candidate and get them the starter resources they need to win their races.

The NJ school board filing deadline was last month, **which means our work heats up now.** Protecting our children’s education from extremist culture wars and censorship starts right here with our school board elections.

[We are already halfway through August, and we still have a long way to go this month to reach our critical goal.
