name: SIGNATURE NEEDED (via Team VPP)
subject: re: incredible news on voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
this changes E-V-E-R-Y-T-H-I-N-G
| **BREAKING NEWS ALERT:
House and Senate Democrats Reintroduce the Freedom to Vote Act** | [100 LOCAL DEMOCRATS NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME TO PASS THE FREEDOM TO VOTE ACT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PASS_FVA/?source=VPP_20230813_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=6&akid=9859%2E878179%2EkLa27l)
---
We are SO excited!

**_With our democracy under attack, Democrats have taken HISTORIC action and have reintroduced the Freedom to Vote Act!_**

This bill would change everything for our country – it would:

✅ Make Election Day a federal holiday
✅ Enact automatic voter registration nationwide
✅ Require same-day voter registration and early voting

With all these INCREDIBLE protections for our right to vote, you can see why Republicans are hell bent on stopping this bill in its tracks!

That’s why we need to hear from you – our Democrats need to know that the people of our nation support this bill!

[**Please, we need your signature before midnight: Join 99 other Democrats in your area and sign our petition in support of the INCREDIBLE Freedom to Vote Act:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PASS_FVA/?source=VPP_20230813_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=9859%2E878179%2EkLa27l)
[100 LOCAL DEMOCRATS NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME TO PASS THE FREEDOM TO VOTE ACT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PASS_FVA/?source=VPP_20230813_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=9859%2E878179%2EkLa27l)
---
Thank you,

Team VPP
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9859%2E878179%2EkLa27l). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9859%2E878179%2EkLa27l).**

subject: a seat at the table

body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=347%2E52803%2E64pkYG)

| | Peter, I’m running for the U.S. Senate to address the issues and concerns you and your loved ones discuss at the kitchen table every night. **But to protect reproductive rights, ensure equal access at the ballot box, and build an economy that works for everyone, I’ll need your help now through Election Day.** **[So please, if you’re ready to elect a leader who will _always_ serve your best interests in the Senate, will you chip in $25 to support our grassroots campaign today?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4726?t=9&amount=25&akid=347%2E52803%2E64pkYG)** | | | [Donate Now!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4726?t=10&amount=25&akid=347%2E52803%2E64pkYG)
---
As the mother of a teenage daughter and the caretaker of two aging parents, I understand the struggles many Marylanders are facing, Peter.
As County Executive and a chief law enforcement officer, it’s been my privilege to stand up for Maryland’s working families. From taking on criminals, to creating jobs, growing economic opportunities and expanding healthcare access, I’ve _always_ fought to put Maryland first.
**And now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because Maryland deserves a senator who fights for them and shares their concerns.**
It’s time you had a seat at the table, Peter. **[If you agree, will you chip in $25 to support my Maryland-first campaign and help me fight on your behalf in the Senate?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4726?t=11&amount=25&akid=347%2E52803%2E64pkYG)**
| | [Donate Now!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4726?t=12&amount=25&akid=347%2E52803%2E64pkYG)
---
Sincerely,
Angela Alsobrooks

Friend,
I just found out that Crooked Joe's weaponized Department of InJustice obtained a search warrant to secretly gain access to my Twitter account and my private data.
The deranged and vengeful Biden-appointed prosecutor also DEMANDED that Twitter keep it a SECRET for 6 months.
And when Twitter at first did not comply by handing over my private data, they were FINED $350,000 - _by a judge appointed by Barack Obama._
This is the Deep State - a giant, interconnected network of corruption that abuses its power to crush dissent and attack its opposition.
As I've said before, when you begin to drain the swamp, you expose the monstrous entities that had been lurking at the bottom.
_**What else will we find out has been taking place behind closed doors to infringe upon my rights and interfere in the 2024 election?**_
In Crooked Joe's America, you no longer have constitutional _rights._
Our God-given rights to freedom of speech, privacy, and proper due process have been ripped to shreds.
These are dark days for our country, but I promise you this: I am not deterred in the slightest.
_**The more I hear these horror stories of how viciously these Deep State thugs have been violating my rights, the more committed I become to saving our country. **_
_Because this simply cannot go on. We cannot let the freest and greatest Republic in history fall to the dark forces of tyranny._

clean_body: | | | Friend, I just found out that Crooked Joe's weaponized Department of InJustice obtained a search warrant to secretly gain access to my Twitter account and my private data. The deranged and vengeful Biden-appointed prosecutor also DEMANDED that Twitter keep it a SECRET for 6 months. And when Twitter at first did not comply by handing over my private data, they were FINED $350,000 - by a judge appointed by Barack Obama. This is the Deep State - a giant, interconnected network of corruption that abuses its power to crush dissent and attack its opposition. As I've said before, when you begin to drain the swamp, you expose the monstrous entities that had been lurking at the bottom. What else will we find out has been taking place behind closed doors to infringe upon my rights and interfere in the 2024 election? In Crooked Joe's America, you no longer have constitutional rights. Our God-given rights to freedom of speech, privacy, and proper due process have been ripped to shreds. These are dark days for our country, but I promise you this: I am not deterred in the slightest. The more I hear these horror stories of how viciously these Deep State thugs have been violating my rights, the more committed I become to saving our country. Because this simply cannot go on. We cannot let the freest and greatest Republic in history fall to the dark forces of tyranny. If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in charge of America right now, then ignore what I'm about to ask you. | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Jon Tester
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Folks, did you see the most recent Montana Senate poll?

JON TESTER: 45%
GOP OPPONENT: 42%

This poll proves we have what it takes to win 2024’s most competitive
race, but all of our momentum could come crashing down if we don’t have
the resources to fend off the GOP’s attacks. If we want to win, we will
have to fight like hell to make it happen.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19014?t=1001&akid=3479%2E346206%2ErPMpjR ]Will you step up today and split a contribution between Charles Booker
and my campaign to help us stay in the lead no matter what national
Republicans throw our way? It’s important we hit our fundraising goal.

Folks, we know the election seems far away, but the honest truth is that
early resources are critical to building a campaign strong enough to win.

And with Mitch McConnell planning to unleash tens of millions in dark
money so his hand-picked candidate can win, every dollar we raise counts.
Your support today means we can reach more voters, mobilize more
supporters, and fight back harder against the negative attacks that will
come.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19014?t=1002&akid=3479%2E346206%2ErPMpjR ]Your support is critical, especially now. Please chip in -- split with
Charles Booker -- to help us build up as much small-dollar support as
possible so we can take on whatever McConnell and other national
Republicans throw our way.

CHIP IN →

It means so much to me to have folks like you on this team.

—Jon

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19014?t=1003&akid=3479%2E346206%2ErPMpjR ][IMG]

body:

Hi friends, it’s Gabby Giffords.
[**I’m reaching out today to respectfully ask if you’ll make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before our August mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close on Tuesday.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230813-1-15&t=2&akid=6325%2E3935704%2EAH-qoQ)

Now, I’m hoping I can ask you to take the next step by making your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today.
When we reach out with these asks, please know we don’t expect you to donate every time. But the only way we can fuel our work to save lives is when people like you give what they can, whenever they can.

name: Katie Hill
subject: Straight to the point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68024121/421676332/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230813_PM1_T1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2M5MDAxMmItZWQzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V_DJcykzEGzhKmj5wLMWfTwE48Gd304tfQ634VIrG2I=)
---
Hey Peter, We’ve set a goal of bringing in 500 individual contributions before our mid-quarter deadline this Wednesday — so we’ll get straight to the point: **The truth is that the odds are stacked against so many women and young people running for office.** A big reason for that is these candidates don't have the resources that come with being an established politician. Meanwhile, billionaire CEOs can write plenty of big checks to the established politicians they have in their pockets. That’s why HER Time is 100% powered by supporters like you who believe in our mission. We are a grassroots movement committed to supporting a generation of young women and allies to help them break through those final glass ceilings, one crack at a time. But House Republicans are almost as committed to rolling back progress as we are to making it. So we need to hit each and every fundraising milestone we set to ensure we stay on track to raise the resources necessary to elect more women and flip the House. [_**That’s where you come in, Peter: Will you be one of the 500 supporters we’re counting on to pitch in before our mid-quarter deadline? clean_body: | = Hey Peter, We’ve set a goal of bringing in 500 individual contributions before our mid-quarter deadline this Wednesday — so we’ll get straight to the point: The truth is that the odds are stacked against so many women and young people running for office. A big reason for that is these candidates don't have the resources that come with being an established politician. Meanwhile, billionaire CEOs can write plenty of big checks to the established politicians they have in their pockets. That’s why HER Time is 100% powered by supporters like you who believe in our mission. We are a grassroots movement committed to supporting a generation of young women and allies to help them break through those final glass ceilings, one crack at a time. But House Republicans are almost as committed to rolling back progress as we are to making it. So we need to hit each and every fundraising milestone we set to ensure we stay on track to raise the resources necessary to elect more women and flip the House. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, — Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Lucas Tyree Kunce
subject: Our record-breaking movement to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Let me explain how we got to this point:
#
We’ve accomplished so much over the last seven months, Peter.
From launching this campaign on January 6th to calling out Josh Hawley on cable news to breaking Missouri fundraising records, your support has helped us put a national spotlight on this U.S. Senate race. And now, we’re nearly halfway through our third fundraising quarter of the year.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[add a donation of whatever you think is best toward our grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35562?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP) But first, let me share a little more about how we got here.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35562?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP)**
I grew up in mid-Missouri and, like so many other working families, mine lived paycheck-to-paycheck. So when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35562?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP)
But we weren’t alone — our community took care of us. When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes and brought more meals by the house than we could ever hope to eat. **That’s the Missouri I grew up in.**
Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up. Got deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan. Later the Pentagon. I was on the Joint Staff negotiating arms control agreements with NATO and Russia.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35562?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP)
When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts — the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. **Here’s all that’s left of it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35562?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP)
While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts — like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil — and then told us they can’t figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people.
**I saw what was happening — and I was ready to fight back.**
So in my final year of active duty, I worked to upend the corporate defense monopolies that leave our country less safe. I also joined an organization that fights corporate monopolies — we took on defense contractors, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Ag, and Wall Street. The people buying off our politicians and leaving the rest of us behind.
**And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to replace Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who has power in our country** — so everyday people call the shots, not massive corporations or corrupt politicians. I want to abolish corporate PACs, expose lobbyists writing our laws, criminalize war profiteering, ban insider trading among members of Congress, and enact a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a massive investment and job creation program that will rebuild our forgotten communities and get us off fossil fuels once and for all.
I want to codify Roe v. Wade, secure voting rights, and ban anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams forever. I want to put working people in charge of our country. But I need your help to get it done.
**Without a single cent of corporate PAC money, we’re building a people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat — and I need you on our team.[So Peter, will you add a donation of any amount toward my campaign right now so we can continue building this movement and finally give power back to working people.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35562?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35563?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35563?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35563?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35563?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35563?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35563?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35562?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP)
---
I’m not just running to make a point — **this is a race we can win.**
**Josh Hawley is vulnerable.** In 2018, he won his seat with only 51% of the vote — but after he exposed himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6th, his approval has dropped to 42%. In Missouri’s last Senate race during a presidential election, the margin was only 2.7%.
Since then, Missourians have broken with Hawley and taken back their power at the ballot box by voting to raise the minimum wage, expand Medicaid through the Affordable Care Act, and legalize cannabis.
TIME Magazine called me the “clean-cut, populist Marine veteran who could give Democrats a fighting chance." And if we’re able to get this message in front of voters early in this race, we have a real shot at defeating Josh Hawley in 2024 and flipping Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.
**But I need you on this team to get it done, Peter.** GOP insiders and even Hawley’s own campaign have already started attacking me — and over the coming months, they’re bound to get even more vicious. That’s why we need to start preparing right now to fight back and deliver our positive message to voters.
**[Will you chip in anything you can right now so we can keep building this grassroots movement and stay prepared for the fight ahead? I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say anything you can afford makes a big difference to our campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35562?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35563?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=15&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35563?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=16&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35563?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=17&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35563?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=18&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35563?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=19&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35563?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=20&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35562?refcode=em20230813-3549&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP)
---
Together, we can take back power from the corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and finally put real, everyday people in charge of our country.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230813-3549-footer&t=22&refcode2=3549_614464_zn_WvP&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=3549%2E614464%2Ezn_WvP). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

I saw what was happening — and I was ready to fight back. So in my final year of active duty, I worked to upend the corporate defense monopolies that leave our country less safe. I also joined an organization that fights corporate monopolies — we took on defense contractors, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Ag, and Wall Street. The people buying off our politicians and leaving the rest of us behind. And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to replace Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who has power in our country — so everyday people call the shots, not massive corporations or corrupt politicians. I want to abolish corporate PACs, expose lobbyists writing our laws, criminalize war profiteering, ban insider trading among members of Congress, and enact a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a massive investment and job creation program that will rebuild our forgotten communities and get us off fossil fuels once and for all. I want to codify Roe v. Wade, secure voting rights, and ban anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams forever. I want to put working people in charge of our country. But I need your help to get it done. Without a single cent of corporate PAC money, we’re building a people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat — and I need you on our team. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: I’m not just running to make a point — this is a race we can win. Josh Hawley is vulnerable. In 2018, he won his seat with only 51% of the vote — but after he exposed himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6th, his approval has dropped to 42%. In Missouri’s last Senate race during a presidential election, the margin was only 2.7%. Since then, Missourians have broken with Hawley and taken back their power at the ballot box by voting to raise the minimum wage, expand Medicaid through the Affordable Care Act, and legalize cannabis. TIME Magazine called me the “clean-cut, populist Marine veteran who could give Democrats a fighting chance." And if we’re able to get this message in front of voters early in this race, we have a real shot at defeating Josh Hawley in 2024 and flipping Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. But I need you on this team to get it done, Peter. GOP insiders and even Hawley’s own campaign have already started attacking me — and over the coming months, they’re bound to get even more vicious. That’s why we need to start preparing right now to fight back and deliver our positive message to voters. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Together, we can take back power from the corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and finally put real, everyday people in charge of our country. Thanks for helping us get it done, Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: This is a longer email than what I usually write, but I hope you take the time to read it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
I’m grateful to the tens of thousands of people who pitch in what they can to support our fight. |
#
---
Friend, My team and I are making big plans for 2024. I’ve got important goals that I cannot achieve alone. So I have a big ask today that I hope you will consider. My team and I are already talking through early investments that we need to help re-elect President Biden and Vice President Harris and secure Democratic majorities in Congress. And the truth is that small-dollar recurring donations can have one of the most significant impacts on our success. This ongoing support helps us budget better, plan ahead to build our movement’s power, and invest in long-term infrastructure. **[If you are in this fight with me, please consider making a recurring contribution today. Every dollar adds up, so even just $5 makes a big difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68025572/421681679/720153128?recurring=1&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230813_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2U2MmJmODktZjIzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GIQYqAzQvRQSQs04SpAfpibX9rIdSNCNfEdVC-X6XS8=)** | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68025573/421681680/720153128?recurring=1&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230813_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2U2MmJmODktZjIzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GIQYqAzQvRQSQs04SpAfpibX9rIdSNCNfEdVC-X6XS8=)
---
One of my most important takeaways from the past few cycles is that we must invest more in long-term, ongoing organizing efforts. We cannot wait until right before Election Day to show up and ask people for their votes.
And making a recurring donation is one of the biggest impacts you can have on our success. It allows us to plan with the confidence that you will be there — working alongside us — every step of the way.
I’m grateful to the tens of thousands of people who pitch in what they can to power our work. Grassroots donors are the number one source of donations to our team. I know it’s a big ask, but if it’s in your budget, I’m asking you to join this team by becoming a sustaining donor to Team Fight Like Hell PAC today.
**[Will you make a monthly recurring donation of any amount to support our work? Small-dollar contributions allow us to plan and invest more strategically to win the important fights ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68025574/421681681/720153128?recurring=1&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230813_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2U2MmJmODktZjIzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GIQYqAzQvRQSQs04SpAfpibX9rIdSNCNfEdVC-X6XS8=)**
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68025575/421681682/720153128?recurring=1&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230813_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2U2MmJmODktZjIzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GIQYqAzQvRQSQs04SpAfpibX9rIdSNCNfEdVC-X6XS8=)
---
We’ve made incredible progress together over the last few years. We’ve rallied together and fought like hell to protect our fundamental freedoms.
The work required of us in the years ahead will be bigger and harder than ever. MAGA extremists and their dark money allies would love nothing more than to defeat us, take back the White House and the Senate, and stop our progress. But I know that if we continue to fight and recommit to this work for the long haul, we will win.
Thank you — again — for your continued support. I hope you know how much it means to me. But more importantly, how much it means to the progress we’ve made together.
Gretchen

We're at the halfway point of a major FEC public fundraising deadline, so I want to get a quick word in.

Fundraising is a decisive indicator of the strength of a campaign. As we approach another election year, it’s important we build AND sustain strong momentum.

Now, records reveal he has been bankrolling a secretive new organization in Texas. He’s provided nearly 100% of funding for the Texas Majority PAC this year. I’m the Democrats’ #1 target. And the left is hopeful we’ll be caught by surprise. That’s why I need your extra help right now. We cannot let these radicals prevail – we need to fight like hell to win. This is a battle for the heart and soul of Texas and America itself. George Soros dumped more than $750,000 into the Texas Majority PAC between January and June. My guess is he’ll make that look like peanuts before it’s all over. And while there is virtually ZERO information about this group available online, we know that they’re hiring right now and ramping up their efforts! Step up to help defeat the left and KEEP TEXAS RED. For Liberty, Ted Cruz P.S. My opponent is raising money hand over fist and the left is ALL-IN to silence me. We need a principled leader who will revive American strength and pride—not just in our foreign policy, but also in our everyday lives. That leader is Nikki Haley. Nikki’s story is driven by a love for America. As the child of legal immigrants who came to this country with nothing, she grew up being told how blessed she is to live in America. It’s a message she repeats constantly in her public and private life. Because for her, the American Dream is not a cliche. It is her life.” CONTINUE READING >> Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen has earned the award of "Comrade of the Week" for her role in the Biden administration’s watered down restrictions on U.S. investments in Chinese tech companies. → Monday, August 28: Town Hall in Indian Land, SC If you haven’t followed Nikki Haley on social media yet, make sure to follow her for more of the latest updates! Facebook Twitter Instagram Have a wonderful and blessed weekend! - Team Haley DONATE NIKKI HALEY MERCHANDISE HIGHLIGHT: If you haven’t gotten one already, our special-edition patriotic Nikki Haley for President hat is the PERFECT way to show off your support for Nikki Haley! All of our merchandise is made in America. ">Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your official campaign hat today! >> GET YOURS NOW → NIKKI HALEY’S OFFICIAL CAMPAIGN STORE: VISIT STORE STAND WITH NIKKI: Running for president is expensive and you might be wondering: Can my donation of $5 today really make an impact? The answer is yes it’s expensive, but every single dollar counts. Nikki’s fight to save America is fueled by grassroots support. In fact, grassroots conservatives like YOU are the reason Nikki has never lost an election before – from her run for the state legislature to governor. Your generous support today will allow Nikki and her team to host town halls, hold rallies, meet with voters, and spread her conservative message all around the country. ">So, if you can spare it, a donation of $5, $10, or ANY amount goes a long way to help Nikki reach more voters! >> P.S. If you don’t have $5 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time to TextNIKKI to 48324 and share this with 5 friends today! PITCH IN NOW! | | Friend,

---
It’s like clockwork: as we continue to surge in the polls, the Deep State bureaucrats and radical state prosecutors doing Crooked Joe’s dirty work rush to _INTERFERE_ in the 2024 election...

---
**“Atlanta-area prosecutor expected to seek more than a dozen indictments in Trump case”**

---
[Source: _CNN_]

---
I’m watching this all unfold in real time just as you are.

---
But with news reports indicating that the Georgia grand jury is likely to hear my case __this week__ , I wanted you to hear this straight from me this Sunday...

---
This would mark the _FOURTH_ time in nearly as many months that Crooked Joe and his accomplices set fire to the rule of law all in the name of “getting Trump.”

---
They’ve all seen the polls. They know that we’ve **GROWN OUR LEADS** in the all-important battleground states of Michigan and Arizona.

---
And so, like the tin-pot dictatorship the Left has become, they think that by trying to **JAIL** me for _LIFE_ , they will eliminate their leading opponent and the greatest threat to Crooked Joe and their Marxist regime in Washington.

---
But, Friend, no matter what happens this week, _no matter how many times the Left may unjustly**INDICT** yours truly as an INNOCENT man_, I will _**NEVER**_ _**SURRENDER**_ our country to their tranny.

---

We need you to join a very important group.
#
VoteVets has more than two million supporters, Derek.
But of that group, just one percent have donated.
Just one percent have skin in the game and back our campaigns. Campaigns like our push to ban lying FOX hosts on Military bases, or to end Tommy Tuberville’s blockade of senior Military promotions.
Today, we’re asking you to join that very important group.
Because on August 15th, we’ll be halfway to our next quarterly FEC deadline. It’s an important bellwether on how we’re doing this quarter, and will determine how much we’re able to do going into 2024.
And to be honest with you, our fundraising has slowed down quite a bit this month.
We poured millions of dollars into some of the best ads and candidates of the cycle in 2020 and helped deliver the House, the Senate, and the White House for Democrats. But if things don’t start to trend in the right direction, we won’t be able to do our part again in 2024.

name: Rick Scott
subject: I couldn't do this without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, I want to take a moment to thank you for all you’ve done for this campaign. I know you hear a lot from us. But our campaign is fueled by conservatives like you, and we wouldn’t be able to achieve anything without your support. Florida is historically one of the toughest states in the nation to run for office. **The races are always close - the last time I ran for Senate, I won by less than 1%.** **In such a tight competition, it’s important that we meet every single goal, and that’s why I’m reaching out to you today.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Pukita=2C=20GFI?=
subject: Download our FREE app!
body:
Download our FREE app for Apple and Android now! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8391e8c34d&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| | |
**The "420K Project"**
** **
**\- also known as -**
** **
**The "3.5% Project"**

---
|
There has been much research done on what percent of the population is needed for a civic movement to reach a tipping point. Where the movement achieves enough mass to be able to affect the change it wants. Not just to not be ignored, not just to have its voice heard, but to accomplish its objective. That number is 3.5%. In Ohio, with a population of about 12M people, 3.5% equates to 420,000 people.

For this reason, we're kicking-off the "420K Project" which we'll also call the "3.5% Project". Our goal is to connect & organize 420,000 Ohioans who love America, but don't like it right now. 420K Ohioans who are fed up with the corruption, dishonesty, and lies we see, read, and hear daily from all the institutions we previously respected. Government. Academia. Legacy Media. Political Parties. Churches. Non-profits. Charities. The list is endless.

The 2016 and 2020 elections started a movement in Ohio and America. They woke people up. Our goal is to build on this by using every tool available to reach the tipping point, to connect 3.5% of Ohioans, to unite 420,000 of us.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=35fa06e721&e=5c740fa3e2)

* * *
---
|
---
| |
**What can you do to help TODAY?**

---
|
Over the coming weeks, we'll be sharing our statewide strategy for the "420K Project" also known as the "3.5% Project". It's simple, but not easy. As a teaser, here's an image from the strategy presentation:

Today, you can do two things.

**First** , download our new app calle**d GFI _connect_**. It's available for both Google and Android and it's **FREE**.

Go **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=5f76fe3d3b&e=5c740fa3e2)** to download and install **GFI _connect_** , or click on the image below.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8ac32e46e1&e=5c740fa3e2)

**Second** , you can forward this message to 5 friends or family members who you feel would be willing to consider joining us. Please ask them to download and install the **GFI _connect_** app, but also ask them to fill out the questionnaire found **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=92b0d7906c&e=5c740fa3e2)** or by clicking on the image below:

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0a852ceaee&e=5c740fa3e2)

**South/60 • North/30** is part of our effort to ACTIVATE more Ohioans to our movement while the **GFI _connect_** app is a way to UNITE, COMMUNICATE with, ORGANIZE, and EDUCATE those in our movement, striving for constant improvement of our knowledge, skills, and tactics.
---
|
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=311d7ff533&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|

clean_body: Download our FREE app for Apple and Android now! | | | | | | The "420K Project" \- also known as - The "3.5% Project" | There has been much research done on what percent of the population is needed for a civic movement to reach a tipping point. Where the movement achieves enough mass to be able to affect the change it wants. Not just to not be ignored, not just to have its voice heard, but to accomplish its objective. That number is 3.5%. In Ohio, with a population of about 12M people, 3.5% equates to 420,000 people. For this reason, we're kicking-off the "420K Project" which we'll also call the "3.5% Project". Our goal is to connect & organize 420,000 Ohioans who love America, but don't like it right now. 420K Ohioans who are fed up with the corruption, dishonesty, and lies we see, read, and hear daily from all the institutions we previously respected. Government. Academia. Legacy Media. Political Parties. Churches. Non-profits. Charities. The list is endless. The 2016 and 2020 elections started a movement in Ohio and America. They woke people up. Our goal is to build on this by using every tool available to reach the tipping point, to connect 3.5% of Ohioans, to unite 420,000 of us. | | | What can you do to help TODAY? | Over the coming weeks, we'll be sharing our statewide strategy for the "420K Project" also known as the "3.5% Project". It's simple, but not easy. As a teaser, here's an image from the strategy presentation: Today, you can do two things. First , download our new app called GFI connect. It's available for both Google and Android and it's FREE. Go to download and install GFI connect , or click on the image below. Second , you can forward this message to 5 friends or family members who you feel would be willing to consider joining us. Please ask them to download and install the GFI connect app, but also ask them to fill out the questionnaire found or by clicking on the image below: South/60 • North/30 is part of our effort to ACTIVATE more Ohioans to our movement while the GFI connect app is a way to UNITE, COMMUNICATE with, ORGANIZE, and EDUCATE those in our movement, striving for constant improvement of our knowledge, skills, and tactics. | | | Prior Issues of This Email You May Find Valuable | | | | How Can You Help GFI? _There’s absolutely no attack he can come up with that can keep me off the campaign trail and stop me from fighting for YOU._
**_If Biden is going to try and stop me from winning the Iowa Caucus, then I’m going to fly to Iowa to DOUBLE our already insurmountable lead._**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Suzanne=20Crouch?=
subject: A View from the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
As we continue our journey towards a stronger Indiana, I wanted to take a moment to share some of the incredible moments we've had over the past week.

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=361fa78f61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_12_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-361fa78f61-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

As we continue our journey towards a stronger Indiana, I wanted to take a moment to pause on the campaign trail and share some of the incredible moments we've experienced over the past week. It's been an honor to connect with you, listen to your voices, and share in the spirit of community that defines our great state.

Let's keep the conversation going. Please reach out to share your questions, comments and concerns about Indiana as I️ run for Governor.
EMAIL ME (https://crouchforindiana.com/connect/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=361fa78f61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_12_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-361fa78f61-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Honoring Purple Heart Recipients
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=361fa78f61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_12_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-361fa78f61-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Last week was a whirlwind of meaningful engagements, starting with a visit to Fort Wayne for the Honor Flight Dinner. Standing before the largest gathering of Purple Heart recipients in Indiana, who were preparing for their Honor Flight the next day, was a humbling experience. The bravery and dedication of these Hoosier men and women is truly awe-inspiring.

** Celebrating leaders and public servants
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=361fa78f61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_12_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-361fa78f61-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I had the privilege of attending the Indiana Leadership Forum's graduation on Monday in Indianapolis, where the energy and enthusiasm of our future leaders was palpable.

Throughout the week, I held meetings with key leaders, discussing the issues that matter most to our communities and strategizing for a brighter future.

** Fulton County Candidate Forum
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=361fa78f61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_12_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-361fa78f61-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Tuesday brought an insightful forum with other gubernatorial candidates in Fulton County. The opportunity to engage in meaningful discussions about the future of our state reaffirmed my commitment to representing all Hoosiers with dedication and integrity.

** Stopping in Greenwood
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=361fa78f61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_12_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-361fa78f61-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

On Wednesday, I had the pleasure of touring the Indiana/Kentucky/Ohio Regional Council of Carpenters' Greenwood facility. Witnessing the dedication and craftsmanship of our skilled workers reminded me of the importance of fostering an environment where our workforce can thrive.

That evening, I connected with political leaders and fellow Hoosiers at the incredible Ray Skillman Collector Car Museum, sharing stories and celebrating our shared commitment to Indiana.

** Southwest Indiana Right to Life Banquet
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=361fa78f61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_12_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-361fa78f61-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Thursday marked a proud moment as I attended the Right to Life of Southwest Indiana's Banquet, standing beside fellow advocates for the sanctity of life.

** Visiting Southern Indiana communities
------------------------------------------------------------
And on Friday, I had the privilege of joining the Oakland City Sweet Corn Festival and the Victory Theatre Lighting Ceremony in Evansville, experiencing the warmth and unity of our communities firsthand.

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

As I reflect on this past week, I'm reminded of the extraordinary diversity and strength of Indiana. Each encounter, each conversation, has reinforced my belief in our potential to create positive change and lead our state towards a brighter future. Thank you for your unwavering support and for standing with me as we continue this journey together.

Onward and upward,

** Get Involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more.
GET INVOLVED (https://crouchforindiana.com/get-involved/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=361fa78f61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_12_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-361fa78f61-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
You can also attend one of my fundraisers (I️ would love to see you there!)
or make a donation by clicking the "Donate" button at the bottom of this newsletter.
https://mcusercontent.com/db6332b918877c0167cdddb48/files/3f465566-bc26-b24a-e538-7485d8cbc339/Crouch_List_of_2023_Fundraising_Events_as_of_7.20.23.pdf?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=361fa78f61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_12_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-361fa78f61-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at:
heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) .
https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=361fa78f61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_12_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-361fa78f61-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: Special Elections Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Your $22.58 donation...
body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| | **$22.58.** That’s our average online donation from grassroots supporters, and that’s what we’re hoping _you_ can contribute today. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We have ground-breaking special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire right around the corner – $22.58 can help win in races like these. **Reason #2:** Election Day is less than _100 days away,_ and we mean it when we say that a gift of $22.58 donated today is more impactful than $22.58 donated right before Election Day. **Reason #3:** State Democrats are constantly overlooked and underfunded, and with Republicans pouring millions into the states, we need constant resources to stay competitive. [So what do you say? name: Colin Allred
subject: Peter, asking for $5...
body:
we have a real chance to win this thing
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7543813d-5d39-47a8-9980-4e43b934772b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | We're making incredible strides in our race to defeat Ted Cruz, and now, Peter, **[I am personally asking for your support to help us keep up this incredible momentum.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tab3b2651-54bf-41fe-8805-c1f7d0c9d96a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ecfbe98-1674-45e2-b326-a90b5e61272b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**Donate $5 now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tadc3e7c0-2aef-4ea5-937c-b0cb7af62c63/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Since we launched this campaign, the Cook Political Report and Roll Call both upgraded our chances of winning. FiveThirtyEight now says Texas could be Democrats' best chance to flip a red seat blue. And a new poll shows us just 5 points behind Ted Cruz, with 14% of voters undecided. This is a testament to the powerful grassroots movement we're building, Peter, and I'm so thrilled that you're a part of it. But the more national attention this race gets, the more wealthy Republicans will be lining up to fill Ted Cruz's war chest. I'm counting on your immediate support to help me keep up our momentum from now until Election Day. [Please, will you split a donation of $5, $10, or any amount that's meaningful to you between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help defeat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta113bccf-ef77-4e96-b611-5d24fca9a4a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a17eefb-c82a-419c-bff4-a128f933ef32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3caf7c11-840a-428f-ab69-d491f67c59a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6b15166-ddf1-4617-82e2-fa73242688a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9655615d-7ced-4961-ba8f-4f047724d705/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| Thank you so much, Colin

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8de2980-d212-4c46-a944-11017c3e4a9b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Team! I wanted to be sure you saw this email from just a couple of days ago!

**We’re just $348 away from tonight’s midnight deadline and we’re counting on top supporters like you to help us make up the difference!

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68032135/421696764/163070490?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTJlMWM1Zi1mZDM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SrrVsF0r1YIKtkY4jJgMnOuPuL15sMD60-mlMc-g47s=)
Hey there — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain. But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans. **That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. **[We can’t do this without you by our side. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change. It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office. **Let's prove them wrong.** **[That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Eric Swalwell today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68032137/421696766/-465846335?&refcode=E3717-20230813-LeadersWeDeserve-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTJlMWM1Zi1mZDM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SrrVsF0r1YIKtkY4jJgMnOuPuL15sMD60-mlMc-g47s=) ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68032139/421696767/-1537287868?refcode=E3717-20230813-LeadersWeDeserve-EG-Surrogate&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTJlMWM1Zi1mZDM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SrrVsF0r1YIKtkY4jJgMnOuPuL15sMD60-mlMc-g47s=)

name: Kelly Hall, Executive Director
subject: Re: winning in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68032920/421697205/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDY2MjUxMC1mZTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NsF3un-Ohtca3D7uKsZPC-k0QKBSUxEVmVyXhaTRsKw=&emci=e9ef4ab9-7238-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=6d662510-fe39-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Dear friend, I’ll be honest, in all my years at Fairness Project, we have never seen this amount of attention or spending on a ballot measure focused on revising the ballot measure process. And I can tell you, it’s not because our opponents care about the importance of direct democracy in our elections. The fact is that Issue 1’s sole purpose was to stop Ohio voters from gaining reproductive freedom. And voters sent a clear message that they won’t be fooled and won’t back down until the right to a safe, legal abortion is enshrined in the state’s constitution. This special election proves once again that politicians shouldn’t have a say in what decisions we make with our bodies — **_we will._** But make no mistake, team, those that want to stand in our way are not giving up. They have lost this fight, but they are getting ready to double down in November. We cannot lose ground now with so much on the line. Now, we _must_ keep up the momentum to make sure that no matter what our opponents in Ohio throw our way, we're ready for it. clean_body: | | Dear friend, I’ll be honest, in all my years at Fairness Project, we have never seen this amount of attention or spending on a ballot measure focused on revising the ballot measure process. And I can tell you, it’s not because our opponents care about the importance of direct democracy in our elections. The fact is that Issue 1’s sole purpose was to stop Ohio voters from gaining reproductive freedom. And voters sent a clear message that they won’t be fooled and won’t back down until the right to a safe, legal abortion is enshrined in the state’s constitution. This special election proves once again that politicians shouldn’t have a say in what decisions we make with our bodies — we will. But make no mistake, team, those that want to stand in our way are not giving up. They have lost this fight, but they are getting ready to double down in November. We cannot lose ground now with so much on the line. Now, we must keep up the momentum to make sure that no matter what our opponents in Ohio throw our way, we're ready for it. That’s why we’re throwing every resource we can behind this movement to protect reproductive freedom in Ohio, and team, we’d love to have your support alongside us. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for stepping up, friend. Joe Biden won Georgia by just 0.23%, and next year’s election could be EVEN CLOSER. If we’re going to re-elect Joe and stop Donald Trump, then we need to ramp up our efforts NOW. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = This election will come down to margins that are slimmer than the fuzz on a peach, and we need to do everything we can to ensure Joe Biden comes out on top. – GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: My least favorite part of the job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#

Hey folks, I really hate bothering you on Sundays — _especially when my favorite August tradition, the Illinois State Fair, is underway_ — but I’m reaching out today because it’s important, so I promise to make this as quick as possible! Our mid-quarter fundraising deadline is this Tuesday, and my team tells me we’re not on track to hit our goal. As a Frontline candidate, Republicans are already working to flip this seat red in 2024, so meeting this goal ensures we’ll have the resources to stay competitive against challengers and protect my seat. Asking for money is my least favorite part of the job, but it’s essential that we continue making progress on the issues that matter — like bringing money back to our district to repair our roads and bridges and investing in our farmers. That’s why I’m humbly asking: **[Team, can you chip in any amount today to help our reelection campaign hit our mid-quarter goal? | Peter,

Sorry to interrupt your Sunday, but my mid-quarter deadline is this week, and Republicans are already running attack ads and billboards against me, so I can’t afford to slow down for even a day.

My team and I are working overtime to defend this toss-up seat again, but Republicans are preparing to spend big to defeat me. They know flipping this seat is their only opportunity to maintain their narrow House majority.

name: Jon Tester
subject: Whether we pull off a win could come down to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
This will be one of the most expensive and competitive races on the map. It’s up to us to build a team strong enough to win.

| Peter,

Roll Call ranked me as **the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running for reelection in 2024.**

That’s on top of _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ and _Inside Elections_ calling this race a **toss-up.** And it’s why Mitch McConnell has made Montana his top target. Not to mention, national Republicans are already hammering me with political ads that distort my record.

Look, I’m not panicking— _but I am sounding the alarm._

A wave of outside money and attacks are about to flood into Montana. This will be one of the most expensive and competitive races on the map. It’s up to us to build a team strong enough to win.

**Montana is a top battleground this cycle, and whether or not we pull off a win could come down to you. We’re $17,612 behind our mid-month fundraising goal. That’s why I need your help, especially today:**

[_**Split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and Fight for Progress to give us the necessary grassroots resources we need to stop Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate majority.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68037395/421701207/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230813-Z-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3NjQ5NDNlLTAzM2EtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Qb5lK2HZHxusTRE7l1sSdgoY4SpYhMvlGCtWblM2n2c=)

name: Team Cori
subject: RE: Sign on to end police violence.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori Bush just re-introduced the groundbreaking People’s Response Act. | |
---
Peter, During the Ferguson Uprising, Cori Bush was violently brutalized by police while trying to bring a woman to paramedics to help with a medical emergency. Even while protesting police violence herself, Cori was traumatized by the harassment and violence she experienced from police. As a nurse serving people with mental health crises, She also witnessed punitive responses that harmed the vulnerable people in her care. Cori knows we deserve a world where marginalized people can call for help and not risk being murdered by police. **Cori came to Congress to save lives, including by addressing the rise of police violence.** She just reintroduced the _People's Response Act_ , which transforms our approach to public safety to center care, not criminalization. This groundbreaking legislation supports cities, states and community-based organizations in launching and scaling public health alternatives to policing -- including appropriately trained and unarmed first responders. [**We must urgently transform our system of public safety to center care, not criminalization. If you agree, please sign on as a grassroots cosponsor of the _People’s Response Act_ today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmTu6IJ7unwFJcux6yAg63JRraEFq22DpdodN40J8FDnde8jhpyMkkfmMaOKFCa_t8xAuVr0XmMb8dPs9aUqFaNL7y5FsBvghxTnQ74cBzxAxmJUJ4bHfFQNRTITzGGiHbIrBGdEa-PiqXfXXPoH7d2tmZPlVKQ2fT9vdLcv_SNrPz7NZ3BmMR5OpbT76A6-1nyQ2pFA1IUfDVXD6mfDkbeDJeqOSmXOKBESKGdpICwg_oMiNu7580BYJnAxEKNpAEGSoNflHTuBdABcS7-t561RzSyQFgPLLizyUls8juP7gZytcD1lFaFJZaX0BVkOGDTP1cHBX2aAd9UUDsgFqQT3VnghEEUiJ5_A9XHwU40diwkzL3qrCNk_NLvEdFvnZiSvEHnMArMfTSEMePezwBdxDjh033UQskcJVv4f8hrU5mBiWGShuHYidXlYjkNcngSJMg9k6bhfCnqBa5A_99WlaZfwPkEkvIDxPom3prw42WKELoiHfK3YkQwWtevHVY/3yp/JijTCo88RtKlq0Q_oYwiWA/h0/NXg5b7DsSVJXRpjS_zNiRsDTLU_Pdal0GqVibxMVbs8)**** Thank you. Please feel free to read more in yesterday’s email about this important work. In solidarity, Team Cori **[SUPPORT OUR MOVEMENT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w6bIs1sMIjeK6M5WSpWn6GsL0LxbpIAbvNCyuX-YfLkRl8ECmeVN8StVHEf6QcpNQLHic7kUMbAO7CyBZ98Wwdiaj8XI-aoKuzAVOaNku8fod2_wvEQdHdCiHndlZnE0K_liasWD2RuQ4m1znjzffpcF0DoNM3PMUgx-Ju4XIztJQVSPoSAiKrqlclrMS7bSCAWkH_m5SZKPSjLl7Mlkbhy3tObJ0e1od3Au5-iYD6Nr68L7pfIho4g9UcxX8kK9pNPMehdBZTWOmbuRs3HdxW9pKxEZLb7x3kQpeCgOm7Vd0rCjSdnQbG0a6SkeNRUHVxqfR246ywhP12I6NvEd3tGYI2Wpbr3chjntbkJXnCEQ/3yp/JijTCo88RtKlq0Q_oYwiWA/h1/pkPhJjlaxSP3EXmIfsmdGGogw894QGZt148IcLzF1dg)**
* * *
\--- Original Message --- Peter, St. Louis has led the country in police killings per capita. In St. Louis County, Ferguson police have targeted Black residents, who have endured near-constant police surveillance and harassment. Police violence is so pervasive, many Black and marginalized people avoid calling the police when they are undergoing some of the most difficult emergencies. This is Congresswoman Cori Bush’s district. **Cori knows that our systems of public safety have failed to keep us safe.** She came to Congress to save lives, after having served as a registered nurse and an activist with the Ferguson Uprising. Recently, Cori re-introduced the _People’s Response Act_ , which re-envisions public safety by treating our communities’ moments of crisis not as opportunities for law enforcement to further police and criminalize -- but as public health emergencies to be treated with compassion and care. [**Please sign on today to support the _People’s Response Act_ , groundbreaking legislation that Cori Bush just reintroduced to transform our approach to public safety by investing in the health and well-being of our communities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmTu6IJ7unwFJcux6yAg63JRraEFq22DpdodN40J8FDnde8jhpyMkkfmMaOKFCa_t8xAuVr0XmMb8dPs9aUqFaNL7y5FsBvghxTnQ74cBzxAxmJUJ4bHfFQNRTITzGGiHbIrBGdEa-PiqXfXXPoH7d2tmZPlVKQ2fT9vdLcv_SNrPz7NZ3BmMR5OpbT76A6-1nyQ2pFA1IUfDVXD6mfDkbeDJeqOSmXOKBESKGdpICwg_oMiNu7580BYJnAxEKNpAEGSoNflHTuBdABcS7-t561RzSyQFgPLLizyUls8juP7gBiocNbLQYt98bzP_e15Xwgcll2_qTTJcdC3gSM-FfrrrSNjvpU1QgGS9SINEIc963Nbch78nNYylrMveiTRoVN8_947gsFf8QdjIR8BxgUmZG1avZ28M9gqlcm6Eyx2ZR2sWpoITSsPrNFLOikc9r9V1fQOlWMSPTZSoL4W-iBEfXzzpCsBlrLf5MSVuhjOshMi1ODLIvfmCba8vO-IRw/3yp/JijTCo88RtKlq0Q_oYwiWA/h2/P1UXpt-6-g6TRu5s1ar7PPqNgaKlKiI5HtfbqNQoUOA) **[SIGN ON NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmTu6IJ7unwFJcux6yAg63JRraEFq22DpdodN40J8FDnde8jhpyMkkfmMaOKFCa_t8xAuVr0XmMb8dPs9aUqFaNL7y5FsBvghxTnQ74cBzxAxmJUJ4bHfFQNRTITzGGiHbIrBGdEa-PiqXfXXPoH7d2tmZPlVKQ2fT9vdLcv_SNrPz7NZ3BmMR5OpbT76A6-1nyQ2pFA1IUfDVXD6mfDkbeDJeqOSmXOKBESKGdpICwg_oMiNu7580BYJnAxEKNpAEGSoNflHTuBdABcS7-t561RzSyQFgPLLizyUls8juP7voRIk2pi57eOxLgbrUY_Mpvk1hjnvQLjZ3vJXgW-n4izg5Or4pwX-4zHZpgBxEIE5Kb2SPPQwF7oLRom5kcdVPTJ_oSf45bKKDOJd0wOt4Aax2dFalh9d_WXQTXfVbpjd47hmJRxB2F3RtCeboW9JaTAc_3Yjk_i4SIpTMcRf1DZDCo-7Lmtc8-IfJmpNK7QpZNLhMk7n16vfxVnIFFtfg/3yp/JijTCo88RtKlq0Q_oYwiWA/h3/TzVwDzvPqU0gHzKKFsQKogscCMFV7vVjMRhLTvonfxE) ** In Cori’s home state of Missouri, Black people are almost 5 times more likely to be killed by police compared to white people. But we must be clear: This isn’t just a problem in Missouri. Our nation is failing to keep our communities safe, particularly Black and brown communities. Police violence is a leading cause of premature death for young Black boys in this country, and it is fully preventable. **Clearly, our country’s system of policing is not keeping us safe.** During the Ferguson Uprising, Cori Bush was violently brutalized by police while trying to bring a woman to paramedics to help with a medical emergency. Cori herself was traumatized by the harassment and violence she experienced from police while protesting police violence. As a nurse serving people with mental health crises, Cori also witnessed punitive responses that harmed the vulnerable people in her care. Today, armed law enforcement agents (who lack expertise in health crises) are the first to respond to a variety of health emergencies. This has deadly and traumatic consequences. **When there is a health emergency, an appropriately trained and unarmed health expert should be sent to support those in need.****[We deserve a world where marginalized people can call for help and not risk being murdered by police. Please add your name in support of the _People's Response Act_ now.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmTu6IJ7unwFJcux6yAg63JRraEFq22DpdodN40J8FDnde8jhpyMkkfmMaOKFCa_t8xAuVr0XmMb8dPs9aUqFaNL7y5FsBvghxTnQ74cBzxAxmJUJ4bHfFQNRTITzGGiHbIrBGdEa-PiqXfXXPoH7d2tmZPlVKQ2fT9vdLcv_SNrPz7NZ3BmMR5OpbT76A6-1nyQ2pFA1IUfDVXD6mfDkbeDJeqOSmXOKBESKGdpICwg_oMiNu7580BYJnAxEKNpAEGSoNflHTuBdABcS7-t561RzSyQFgPLLizyUls8juP7nffFlL0OKN5x3mfCmRMNtcAGjIxYYlISVh2MLssxOSSxlhqi5EyexGaWAr-G3QnuX5wLUj8WEBsO7mEX8bkNaoQVwcYvoYo22_Lg5KXjJhDTxkHVAY8uWuLT1QrR4zJmNrqG-QgO0Q8LAJ--YjUaNTRuMZ-MLZmEzfrEITvWDqCYtXcokBta3HYpPcOyaPzSoiRQDJYol5d1dcmyHlq01w/3yp/JijTCo88RtKlq0Q_oYwiWA/h4/f6wMruimYpXOruxFXWVxi_i5CLrINB2C0NZ-fI2bUzo) ** **The _People's Response Act_ transforms our approach to public safety to center care, not criminalization. The legislation supports cities, states and community-based organizations in launching and scaling public health alternatives to policing.** It’s not just a bill -- it's a movement in action. Cori Bush is lifting up the demands of the movement for Black lives, and she has engaged with local community groups all over the country about this legislation. **If passed, the _People’s Response Act_ would:**
* **Institute a new public safety division within the Department of Health and Human Services** focused on non-carceral and health-centered approaches to public safety;

* Develop a federal first responders unit to support [states and local governments] with emergency health crises;

* **Promote alternative approaches to public safety** , including coordination of research and policies across HHS and other agencies to center health-based and non-carceral responses throughout the federal government;

* **Provide $11 billion in grant funding to community-based organizations** , as well as state and local governments, to fund public safety and improve crisis response;

* **Set up a $2.5 billion First Responder Hiring Grant, which would create thousands of jobs for emergency first responders******(including licensed social workers, mental health counselors, substance use counselors, and peer support specialists) to improve our crisis response efforts focused on non-carceral, health-based approaches to public safety.

[**We must urgently transform our system of public safety to center care, not criminalization. If you agree, please sign on as a grassroots cosponsor of the _People’s Response Act_ today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmTu6IJ7unwFJcux6yAg63JRraEFq22DpdodN40J8FDnde8jhpyMkkfmMaOKFCa_t8xAuVr0XmMb8dPs9aUqFaNL7y5FsBvghxTnQ74cBzxAxmJUJ4bHfFQNRTITzGGiHbIrBGdEa-PiqXfXXPoH7d2tmZPlVKQ2fT9vdLcv_SNrPz7NZ3BmMR5OpbT76A6-1nyQ2pFA1IUfDVXD6mfDkbeDJeqOSmXOKBESKGdpICwg_oMiNu7580BYJnAxEKNpAEGSoNflHTuBdABcS7-t561RzSyQFgPLLizyUls8juP7gRXyW79XE0_22Avbg7SNaWtRRRJA4l9WUnzY1k21owS7NTt8_Q9xX4i_gHRXyWt9BWvROYH_7ArxEkdzTiCkG8WxH4b0ZEZQifx9wR3rDn0mQSNzJ0WnpHNSf34Jx3D4NoLxrnPXTithDMFujpI1GsHWUze22yFzZna6TzAJdKPn_i2bnFWe9g8VWC0jTzrMnJ95T9gpzC88yZH6-ovLr0/3yp/JijTCo88RtKlq0Q_oYwiWA/h5/qMgVNy8k38uqG9ytljedmSWiH7Aw4edHwMi2fg_am9k) We are building an America that works for all of us, and which treats every person with respect. We must dismantle anti-Black, white supremacist systems of violence in America and build a future of care. As Cori reminds us, another world is possible and within reach -- if we build it together. In solidarity, \- Team Cori **[SUPPORT OUR MOVEMENT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w6bIs1sMIjeK6M5WSpWn6GsL0LxbpIAbvNCyuX-YfLkRl8ECmeVN8StVHEf6QcpNQLHic7kUMbAO7CyBZ98WwdlLozLXaZcGS2t3dr3U7jiMAwx17GgNlVP5ATbgCSJ0tw_4QBnKrhTK-GmB0I9fINujV0I75S794aV_EFZHkPsq0uezZEYoTleqz8okRzNbTDQIy6EvMtSaFbOYMwizE-vVXHG2vsZLXZeluklewdaZ5UKbqBYB_LmEO4XlWulSa64gpD9eWe2x6BI7f4xPRpLINHzohujAfuoZcIolUqBBGyWHcOD_moJzKC9zOdOlA4WGlSZqteiwFdNKpR-PTmEuirUik_gLfACV0fY4BGeA/3yp/JijTCo88RtKlq0Q_oYwiWA/h6/S-O9DG0wZF4171X4xlwzKOnqY3CvvzU6ls0-oR6bV6g)**

body:

name: Shawn Wilson

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I know it might not seem like much, but here’s why:

Peter,

I know you’re busy, so I’ll cut right to the chase. Here’s what’s at stake in Louisiana’s upcoming gubernatorial election:
1. **Healthcare** – I’m not just planning on preserving Louisiana’s Medicaid expansion, but also continuing to strengthen qualifications for Medicaid services
2. **Worker wages** – We must raise wages so that working people across Louisiana — the backbone of our state economy — can afford the basics at home
3. **Public education** – The GOP’s attack on public education is unprecedented. We must trust and support the student-teacher relationship _without limitations_

**[RUSH A $3 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68038278/421704545/218720461?amount=3&refcode=ea.d0bf7f71-073a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d0bf7f71-073a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBiZjdmNzEtMDczYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OJhA0OQtc4Krtgr7lMRKak3zoaQA7A6kgzrUOfjnGfo=)** I know we can win this race, tackle these priorities, and show everyone that Democrats CAN keep winning in the South.

_But I can’t do it alone._ It will take strong Democrats in Louisiana and beyond working together to beat the GOP, especially since Donald Trump endorsed our leading opponent.

So today, I’m asking you for just $3 — $1 for each of those 3 priorities — to contribute to my campaign’s **Fight Back Fund. With your help, we’ll beat a whole field of GOP candidates looking to flip the governor’s seat from blue to red and move Louisiana forward.**

Will you please chip in just $3 (or anything you can) to our Fight Back Fund to help us beat the GOP and their extremist ideology?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68038280/421704547/218720461?refcode=ea.d0bf7f71-073a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d0bf7f71-073a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBiZjdmNzEtMDczYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OJhA0OQtc4Krtgr7lMRKak3zoaQA7A6kgzrUOfjnGfo=)** **[RUSH A $3 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68038282/421704549/218720461?amount=3&refcode=ea.d0bf7f71-073a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d0bf7f71-073a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBiZjdmNzEtMDczYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OJhA0OQtc4Krtgr7lMRKak3zoaQA7A6kgzrUOfjnGfo=)** **[RUSH A $25 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68038284/421704551/218720461?amount=25&refcode=ea.d0bf7f71-073a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d0bf7f71-073a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBiZjdmNzEtMDczYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OJhA0OQtc4Krtgr7lMRKak3zoaQA7A6kgzrUOfjnGfo=)** **[RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68038286/421704553/218720461?amount=&refcode=ea.d0bf7f71-073a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d0bf7f71-073a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBiZjdmNzEtMDczYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OJhA0OQtc4Krtgr7lMRKak3zoaQA7A6kgzrUOfjnGfo=)** Thanks so much for your support,
