clean_body: I know it might not seem like much, but here’s why: Peter, I know you’re busy, so I’ll cut right to the chase. Here’s what’s at stake in Louisiana’s upcoming gubernatorial election: 1. Healthcare – I’m not just planning on preserving Louisiana’s Medicaid expansion, but also continuing to strengthen qualifications for Medicaid services 2. Worker wages – We must raise wages so that working people across Louisiana — the backbone of our state economy — can afford the basics at home 3. Public education – The GOP’s attack on public education is unprecedented. We must trust and support the student-teacher relationship without limitations = I know we can win this race, tackle these priorities, and show everyone that Democrats CAN keep winning in the South. But I can’t do it alone. It will take strong Democrats in Louisiana and beyond working together to beat the GOP, especially since Donald Trump endorsed our leading opponent. So today, I’m asking you for just $3 — $1 for each of those 3 priorities — to contribute to my campaign’s Fight Back Fund. With your help, we’ll beat a whole field of GOP candidates looking to flip the governor’s seat from blue to red and move Louisiana forward. = = = = Thanks so much for your support, Shawn Wilson | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Box 4572 Baton Rouge, LA 70821 Our email program is an important way to reach our valued supporters, and this email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Peter, Republicans have already named me a top target for this coming election. I won’t sugarcoat it: this is going to be a tough fight ahead. The attacks have already started, but that's why it's so important to build a strong foundation now to prepare for any possible attacks ahead.

Last year, _we won by just 4 points_ , and Republicans view this district as an opportunity to pick up another seat. But Democratic victory here in Rhode Island brings us one step closer to taking back our majority – and we can win again in 2024 if we keep up our early organizing. That starts with hitting every fundraising benchmark, including our mid-month deadline on Tuesday.

[So Peter, will you chip in right away to help us meet our mid-month goal and take back our House majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68038768/421706152/1542275797?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230813_FR_mmfr1.2_0_1MO_teammagaziner_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI0YjExZS0wOTNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3PTrAqfgeS74-7ci16zl1wk_iafpnxbmUF6qlZapV-k=)

I won’t sugarcoat it: this is going to be a tough fight ahead. The attacks have already started, but that's why it's so important to build a strong foundation now to prepare for any possible attacks ahead. Last year, we won by just 4 points , and Republicans view this district as an opportunity to pick up another seat. name: Morgan Luttrell
subject: Ending this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=181442676c9b475ab38bfc5c66500b00&_e=QBNMneHmP-qoDx_ubMJyhEh-WtvO6KgFDyZzMaPyNm1GKcewSXCyUp0aUgO7NnSpSGqkMDn4TC3uIGnqCe7uAIpLBFQJzgG31d87-SXXZKuDhN35atfL5Yda8jpO_YdFFw_BuNrbrBB5FUzfz6m3XCxvoJoehi3C0qqJlXrGiqCDtxIATNBU77Hz5UG0Ls07fbmPmB-n-RwB8uDrbe_nz-HsnVovWtMX7fo03XEY325AiKJaN6N5MlvbmWzKViYitYLQkV6f5KyIZtwxvwEmnJCUzGLNY7WLVyIF8uCk-VQnrU0swo4GyahVH_An23RIrjjJZ_yZE85aRz5bbu-hWmJGeT72SRJH7Di4IxeqrM5S_iMFRQWKr0NIm1mEluCitnKmuUnY87uM-uThBfC8ZuviP7jgTAwpcEiIRLZAiES2rryYhBQHm0p1skqwdjBD)
---

Friend --

My name is Morgan Luttrell.

I'm a combat veteran who served in multiple combat missions in defense of America.

I've seen things I wouldn't wish on my worst enemy. Things I will never be able to unsee.

In 2009, I survived a helicopter crash that should've taken my life but, by the grace of God, I was given a second chance.

No matter how tough or brave you are, nothing is fully in your control. That's why we put our faith in God.

**But -- there are some things we CAN control, and that 's why I'm running for Congress. **

I have to just say it: Biden and the Radical Democrats want me GONE, they want me DEFEATED, they want to END my campaign for good.

But unlike the spineless career politicians, **I 'm not someone who EVER gives up.**

You see, the career DC politicians are living each day by their own agenda -- not thinking about those suffering the consequences.

After my time in the military, I knew that each day that I woke up in America was a gift.

_**The land of the free and home of the brave.**_

But the Biden regime has stripped our nation of our core values and turned us down a path that is leading us toward a dark future.

**So, Friend, I want to humbly ask you right now if you 'll stand with me in my fight for the America we all once knew and loved. **

It is patriots like yourself that have helped change the direction of our country before, but we still need you. Maybe now more than ever.

Please, stand up for America's liberties and freedoms by chipping in just a few bucks today?

---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=181442676c9b475ab38bfc5c66500b00&_e=QBNMneHmP-qoDx_ubMJyhEh-WtvO6KgFDyZzMaPyNm1GKcewSXCyUp0aUgO7NnSpSGqkMDn4TC3uIGnqCe7uAIpLBFQJzgG31d87-SXXZKuDhN35atfL5Yda8jpO_YdFFw_BuNrbrBB5FUzfz6m3XCxvoJoehi3C0qqJlXrGiqCDtxIATNBU77Hz5UG0Ls07fbmPmB-n-RwB8uDrbe_nz-HsnVovWtMX7fo03XEY325AiKJaN6N5MlvbmWzKViYitYLQkV6f5KyIZtwxvwEmnJCUzGLNY7WLVyIF8uCk-VSGDs_CzRmnvQ2UcrwID1esten0VcNkaS23MoeAzeD_mjGvsAyop6DsEFLXWYhfHd4G7wHlNo7zUv_ZvY_4L4y_h5xoC-ZIddSEsFClPaUOKK2pTp0Lb92KrLNZ69u7IuZvMgIzrJdWi_iwwiO547n2 "CONTRIBUTE")
---

Together, we can bring America back to her greatness before the Democrats send us further down the dark path we're currently on.

Thank you,

Morgan Luttrell

---
|

Magnolia, TX 77353

Team, we’re sorry to double email but this is important:
➡️ Montana Sen. Jon Tester has won against the GOP THREE times running.
➡️ But now Mitch McConnell is just TWO seats [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-august23?refcode=em_fr_b2_081323_Tester-surrogate-bump_30AC&amount=10] from flipping our Senate red.
➡️ So his Republicans are going ALL IN to take Tester down, running attack ads and promising to spend over $200 million in Montana!
NOW: Jon is one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators ahead of 2024! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-august23?refcode=em_fr_b2_081323_Tester-surrogate-bump_30AC&amount=10]
Team, we know that when the GOP wins, our democracy loses. Chip in $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-august23?refcode=em_fr_b2_081323_Tester-surrogate-bump_30AC&amount=5]

Hey -
I’ll keep this quick.
I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection in the country. And I’ll be honest—we’re not where we want to be ahead of our August mid-month fundraising deadline in just one week. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-august23?refcode=em_fr_b2_081323_Tester-surrogate-bump_30AC&amount=10]
National Republicans may have special interests and wealthy donors on their side, but this is a grassroots team, and I’ve got people like you.
That’s why I’m asking if you can split just $10 between my campaign and the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State to help us win this ultra-competitive race—because the number of donors we have is just as important as the total amount of money we raise. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Every phone call, door knocked, ad ran, and outreach attempt will make-or-break this race. Can you help fund our operation.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68038962/421707029/535544092?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.13_b1_co08u_90do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTQ0NmUzMS0wYzNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FghM5fPH2hds9DBnxr9VC8nCh69mJo5sYv24TOtUoGc=)
Here’s the latest update from CO-08:
1. **An anti-abortion extremist just entered the race** , and we’re afraid he’ll vote against reproductive freedom in Congress.

2. **Our mid-quarter deadline is in just 48 hours** , and we’re still 10% short of where we need to be to fully fund our campaign to re-elect Yadira Caraveo.

3. Every phone call, door knocked, ad ran, and outreach attempt will make-or-break this race. **_Critical budget cuts to our voter outreach programs could sabotage our campaign!_**

**[There’s no time to waste! We need your help to meet our mid-quarter goal and protect Yadira’s critical seat in Congress. Pitch in $8 or whatever makes sense to help us flip the House!>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68038963/421707030/535544092?amount=8&amounts=3,8,15,50,100,250&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.13_b1_co08u_90do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTQ0NmUzMS0wYzNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FghM5fPH2hds9DBnxr9VC8nCh69mJo5sYv24TOtUoGc=)** | ****[Support Yadira Caraveo!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68038964/421707031/535544092?amount=8&amounts=3,8,15,50,100,250&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.13_b1_co08u_90do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTQ0NmUzMS0wYzNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FghM5fPH2hds9DBnxr9VC8nCh69mJo5sYv24TOtUoGc=)****
---

This isn’t just about Colorado, Peter. The fight to take back the House runs straight through CO-08, so we need to protect this seat with all we’ve got.

_That’s why we’re not backing down_ \- and it’s why we’re counting on your help in this urgent moment. **[Will you pitch in now to support our work and reelect Democrat Yadira Caraveo?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68038965/421707032/535544092?amount=8&amounts=3,8,15,50,100,250&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.13_b1_co08u_90do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTQ0NmUzMS0wYzNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FghM5fPH2hds9DBnxr9VC8nCh69mJo5sYv24TOtUoGc=)**

clean_body: Every phone call, door knocked, ad ran, and outreach attempt will make-or-break this race. Can you help fund our operation. | = Here’s the latest update from CO-08: 1. An anti-abortion extremist just entered the race , and we’re afraid he’ll vote against reproductive freedom in Congress. 2. Our mid-quarter deadline is in just 48 hours , and we’re still 10% short of where we need to be to fully fund our campaign to re-elect Yadira Caraveo. 3. Every phone call, door knocked, ad ran, and outreach attempt will make-or-break this race. Critical budget cuts to our voter outreach programs could sabotage our campaign! = | **= This isn’t just about Colorado, Peter. The fight to take back the House runs straight through CO-08, so we need to protect this seat with all we’ve got. That’s why we’re not backing down \- and it’s why we’re counting on your help in this urgent moment. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ******=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=******** Thank you, Caraveo HQ | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Dear Fellow Democrats –

Everyone knows, Brunch is more fun with Democrats!

What are you waiting for - come join the festivities on August 16th! We’ve got a great crowd, generous sponsors, amazing merch and all that is missing is YOU!

body:

body:
| Peter Willis -- did you see Joseph’s message? Communities across the country are burning while the fossil fuel industry and radical Republicans are scheming to build **_oil pipelines in our national parks!_**

Climate change is the defining issue of our time -- and Progressives need to rally together before we run out of “next times.”

[That’s why we launched the 2024 PROGRESSIVE POWER Fund -- to build out an operation across the country that will mobilize key supporters, turn out Progressives, and smash the corporatist status quo. Will you chip in $10 today to become a founding donor?](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9609?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230813_FR_mmfrtrumpclimate24fwd_0_3MO_ourrevolution_na_na_ppf2024fwd&t=8&akid=4541%2E5885482%2E5f7A1g)

[That’s why we’re launching our 2024 PROGRESSIVE POWER Fund to make sure we have the resources we need to mobilize progressive voters to stand up to corporate interests and defeat the radical right-wing at the polls. July 2023 was the hottest month in recorded history. Waters off the coast of Florida measured at 101o two weeks ago. And this week alone we have seen an entire community and at least 55 lives lost to the ravages of wildfire.

These are not singular incidents, Peter Willis.

And instead of working toward a solution that will save lives, the **billionaire SuperPAC-funded GOP** wants to double down on dirty energy and the devastation it causes.

[](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9609?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230813_FR_mmfrtrumpclimate24fwd_0_3MO_ourrevolution_na_na_ppf2024fwd&t=12&akid=4541%2E5885482%2E5f7A1g)

clean_body: | Peter Willis -- did you see Joseph’s message? Communities across the country are burning while the fossil fuel industry and radical Republicans are scheming to build oil pipelines in our national parks! Climate change is the defining issue of our time -- and Progressives need to rally together before we run out of “next times.” | Begin forwarded message from Joseph Geevarghese Peter Willis, climate change is the defining issue of our time, and we don’t have a second to waste. Hard stop. July 2023 was the hottest month in recorded history. Waters off the coast of Florida measured at 101o two weeks ago. And this week alone we have seen an entire community and at least 55 lives lost to the ravages of wildfire. These are not singular incidents, Peter Willis. And instead of working toward a solution that will save lives, the billionaire SuperPAC-funded GOP wants to double down on dirty energy and the devastation it causes. When we organize, we win! Joseph Geevarghese, Executive Director, Our Revolution Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. From city halls to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party and get big money out of politics. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Trump's trial should be televised!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Televise the Trump Trial. Support the House Democratic request to make this happen](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb485d2e-b7ce-4c22-bad7-cb2a56ea37a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted629222-d59d-472d-9668-028bffc4861c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump faces federal criminal charges, and when he is tried, the American people should be able to see it live on television. House Democrats have formally requested this in [a letter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td27fc5fc-62d9-4322-badc-f39060b74da5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to the Judicial Conference, saying it is essential for the health of our democracy, and we couldn't agree more. We've all had more than enough of Trump rallies and lies getting nonstop airtime, so it's time to show him as he really is -- a criminal forced to sit and listen to the charges against him in a venue where his lies are not tolerated. [**Add your name, and ask that the Trump federal trial be televised.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4d5846a-79c9-4898-a5fd-4a05d74b6736/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

subject: I wasn’t wearing a suit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=9b58493b419e470ea6dbc37aba9c4e60&_e=3QTUP9mBe597pcqnP51eGwvn1XgJldZ2x6meKniS4HG4MQza0v9uIPI2cUK_KFMw1TstK0jU5vrLPs8XYumeEOtO4qPIivDwsUSTsPZgBA-8aSrpM3IxpOM1VbJYAJEOkc0cqR41R6OIEVIBFstL3DEe8x9n6EdfJl13BrLEfKXBN28rARXO_uU4qJvcUHyop4ZJnncHNU61Q-iaT-0dJtaVl20kSkHttsiH-KDk9kUVBzPoyv2ZUdT0G6T2Ey1BVrvQTxZIHUcO18cQqL9n3d8yqaXuG4rGmAwoKUITy_WNTmH0LVzTDIuAof31111_zoxJTwelQBFcplR4Gwm_BLqguU4oOG-QNpLdKoqMRtg%3D)
---
Peter.

Tim Kaine has spent his life wearing a fancy suit.

As a lawyer and a career politician, his uniform is shiny shoes and a too-tight tie.

**During my career, my uniform was a little bit different.**

Every day, I put on my body armor or dive gear to serve as a Special Operations Officer in the United States Navy.

_And while Tim Kaine was schmoozing with Washington insiders, I was serving in some of the most dangerous corners of the world from Iraq to Afghanistan to Somalia._

**Now, Virginia has a choice: do they want to be represented by a lawyer or a warrior?**

I’m ready to be the fighter our state needs, but I need your help.

**[Do you want to be represented by a lawyer or a warrior?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=9b58493b419e470ea6dbc37aba9c4e60&_e=3QTUP9mBe597pcqnP51eGwvn1XgJldZ2x6meKniS4HG4MQza0v9uIPI2cUK_KFMw1TstK0jU5vrLPs8XYumeEOtO4qPIivDwsUSTsPZgBA-8aSrpM3IxpOM1VbJYAJEOkc0cqR41R6OIEVIBFstL3DEe8x9n6EdfJl13BrLEfKXBN28rARXO_uU4qJvcUHyop4ZJnncHNU61Q-iaT-0dJguBwFS2Dd5qpPioEBGW4D5JXN4r87l72xwCNGEwmXO8mEmMCx9dMsW9YNakMLW9Jx3K_7hm9-Np2SW0UH-RyIu1KgbordDlj0FBw9edKmCRuHUniv-hyvY4dcfTwLPYZ770rDRT6Q6qAjl6ZMTyaF0%3D)**

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Hawaii, and what you can do to help
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Hey there,
I’m sure you’ve seen the news about the devastating wildfires in Hawaii.
As of this morning, at least 93 people have died, and thousands more have lost their homes. Lahaina — once the capital of the kingdom of Hawaii — has been almost completely decimated.
Here’s what the government is doing about it:
President Biden has declared a federal emergency, dedicating resources to help with relief and recovery efforts.
And Governor Newsom has also sent search and rescue personnel to help with emergency operations in the most impacted areas.
But the people of Hawaii are going to need more than that — they’re going to need our help to rebuild and recover.
As we know all too well in California, wildfires can wipe out entire communities in a matter of hours, and rebuilding is a long, difficult process. Hawaiians are going to need our support in the weeks, months, and years ahead.
[**So today, I’m asking you to join me in supporting the relief efforts in Hawaii by chipping in whatever you can to the Hawaii Community Foundation. 100% of your contribution will go toward relief efforts and supporting displaced Hawaiians.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-august23-hi.B5XUv1&refcode=em230813-1-15&t=1&akid=1480%2E159979%2EdFxseF)**
**[DONATE](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-august23-hi.B5XUv1&refcode=em230813-1-15&t=2&akid=1480%2E159979%2EdFxseF)**
As we face the impacts of the climate crisis across America, we must continue to stand in solidarity with each other.
Alex

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1480%2E159979%2EdFxseF)

name: EMILYs List
subject: There's no way this is right, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
Can you let us know? |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68040298/421714015/-947388913?sourceid=1051704&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmZlYzg0Yi0xNDNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yAVDNfBF7ki1M_oU1jKbkWWs5IL7yMuqbPrpqnY07lc=&emci=0fe8d062-8238-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=66fec84b-143a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) There's no way this is right, Peter.

Republicans are claiming a federal abortion ban is "popular," and a recent _Washington Post_ article says the GOP base is warming to the idea of a national ban. We already know the House has voted to restrict abortion, and that they'd waste no time doing the same in the Senate if they flip the chamber in 2024.

But this isn't about what Republicans in Congress are fighting about, or what analysts are saying. This is about the will of the American people. That's why we're running a live poll: **To find out what you think.** **Let us know:_Do you oppose a national abortion ban?_** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68040299/421714016/-947388913?sourceid=1051704&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmZlYzg0Yi0xNDNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yAVDNfBF7ki1M_oU1jKbkWWs5IL7yMuqbPrpqnY07lc=&emci=0fe8d062-8238-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=66fec84b-143a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Thanks for speaking out,

the EMILYs List team

clean_body: Can you let us know? | | | There's no way this is right, Peter. Republicans are claiming a federal abortion ban is "popular," and a recent Washington Post article says the GOP base is warming to the idea of a national ban. We already know the House has voted to restrict abortion, and that they'd waste no time doing the same in the Senate if they flip the chamber in 2024. But this isn't about what Republicans in Congress are fighting about, or what analysts are saying. This is about the will of the American people. That's why we're running a live poll: To find out what you think. Let us know:Do you oppose a national abortion ban? Thanks for speaking out, the EMILYs List team | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
| Hey—

I’ll keep this quick.

I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection in the country. **And I’ll be honest—we’re not where we want to be ahead of our August mid-month fundraising deadline in 2 days.**

National Republicans may have special interests and wealthy donors on their side, but this is a grassroots team, and I’ve got people like you.

[**That’s why I’m asking if you can split just $10 between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help us win this ultra-competitive race—because the number of donors we have is just as important as the total amount of money we raise. Can you chip in today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51295?t=6&akid=9822%2E878179%2EvNeK6M) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51296?t=7&akid=9822%2E878179%2EvNeK6M)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me. Now I am asking for you to take a chance on this campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
The things I want in life are not exotic. I think most people feel the same way.
I want loving relationships with my family. I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.
Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me.
I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs, to name just two.
Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.
The truth is, Senator Sinema has been an advocate for the rich and powerful in the Senate.
But those folks have enough advocates there.
It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.
That’s why I am running.
But if we’re going to win this race, it is going to take a historic grassroots effort.
I couldn’t get to where I am in life without help. And I can’t win this race either. It’s going to take all of us to win. So I am asking:
Can I count on you to split $20 between Serve America and our Senate campaign before our fundraising deadline comes to a close? I would not be asking if it was not so terribly important. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]Thank you,
Ruben

I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals. Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me. I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs, to name just two. Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress. The truth is, Senator Sinema has been an advocate for the rich and powerful in the Senate. But those folks have enough advocates there. It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help. That’s why I am running. But if we’re going to win this race, it is going to take a historic grassroots effort. I couldn’t get to where I am in life without help. And I can’t win this race either. It’s going to take all of us to win. So I am asking: Can I count on you to split $20 between Serve America and our Senate campaign before our fundraising deadline comes to a close? I would not be asking if it was not so terribly important. [] DONATE [ you, Ruben DONATE [] [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Brandon Presley (personal)
subject: I’ll keep this short and sweet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
It’s crunch time. | I won’t waste your time, Peter.

We're just a few hours away from our fundraising deadline, and we're still $3,718 shy of our Official Democratic Nominee Fund goal.

Picture this: If we fall short, we will be forced to cut crucial voter outreach programs. Our momentum will take a nosedive, and Tate Reeves and his country club cronies will claim victory in November.

NO THANKS.

This is an election of a lifetime, and I'm ready to keep the pedal to the metal until November 7th. But I need to know you’re with me every step of the way.

Every dollar counts, so please don't let this opportunity slip away, Peter. Click here to donate before it's too late: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-prs-bax-odnf?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68040881/421717458/1217261785?refcode=ea.4f5f4c66-1c3a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4f5f4c66-1c3a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGY1ZjRjNjYtMWMzYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BAiwcRwwIKeZDUrF86AebbySkLlpOsnjdMDbHMwc4L4=)

I can’t thank you enough.

\- Brandon Presley
Sent from my iPhone

Click here to donate before it's too late: = I can’t thank you enough. \- Brandon Presley Sent from my iPhone | | Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: The planet is heating up but the Arctic is warming twice as fast
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1926088?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Friend, you might have experienced some of the record-breaking heat waves that have been hitting across the country this summer. But for polar bears in the Arctic, the negative impacts of global warming are nothing new. The Arctic is warming __**TWICE as fast**__ as the rest of the Earth, and innocent polar bears are watching as their ice habitats are **melting away before their eyes.** These precious animals are literally clinging to survival, and Big Oil and Gas drilling activity in the Arctic is only making things harder for these helpless creatures. Industrial drilling and fracking is not only terrible for the environment and increasing the rate of global warming, but it’s bringing in massive amounts of pollutants to the fragile Arctic region and putting vulnerable animals at risk of being run over or buried by snow by giant drilling machines. _**Friend, how much longer will we allow the fossil fuel industry to exploit the planet for profit?**_ **Imperiled polar bears don’t have much time left, so it’s up to us to be a voice for these defenseless animals.** _[**Please, will you speak up today to fight back against Arctic drilling before Big Oil pushes our beloved polar bears to EXTINCTION?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1926089?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)_ | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1926090?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The disruptive noise pollution and toxic greenhouse gas emissions that oil and gas companies bring into the Arctic are impacting the entire landscape, leaving nearby residents to bear the brunt of this environmental hazard, including increased risk of dangerous oil spills that could destroy the fragile ecosystems that local people rely on for survival.
The massive machines pose a major risk of _**RUNNING OVER**_ nursing mama polar bears and their cubs that are denning under the ice — or even _**BURYING THEM ALIVE**_ and _**CRUSHING THEM**_ underneath mounds of heavy snow.
The Biden administration has recently _**APPROVED**_ a rule that permits even _MORE fossil fuel activity in the Arctic_ — even though the U.S. Fish & Wildlife Service (FWS) confirmed a **95% probability** that this increase will result in _**SERIOUS INJURY OR DEATH**_ to the highly threatened Southern Beaufort polar bears who live there!
**Friend, we cannot stand for any more dirty energy handouts from the federal government.** _**That’s why we’re counting on environmentalists like YOU to help put pressure on FWS to reject this new administrative rule and say NO to increased oil drilling in the Arctic.**_ [**Are you with us? Add your name right now to stand up to Big Oil and protect the Arctic >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1926091?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

---

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | Friend, you might have experienced some of the record-breaking heat waves that have been hitting across the country this summer. But for polar bears in the Arctic, the negative impacts of global warming are nothing new. The Arctic is warming TWICE as fast as the rest of the Earth, and innocent polar bears are watching as their ice habitats are melting away before their eyes. These precious animals are literally clinging to survival, and Big Oil and Gas drilling activity in the Arctic is only making things harder for these helpless creatures. Industrial drilling and fracking is not only terrible for the environment and increasing the rate of global warming, but it’s bringing in massive amounts of pollutants to the fragile Arctic region and putting vulnerable animals at risk of being run over or buried by snow by giant drilling machines. Friend, how much longer will we allow the fossil fuel industry to exploit the planet for profit? Imperiled polar bears don’t have much time left, so it’s up to us to be a voice for these defenseless animals. == | == The disruptive noise pollution and toxic greenhouse gas emissions that oil and gas companies bring into the Arctic are impacting the entire landscape, leaving nearby residents to bear the brunt of this environmental hazard, including increased risk of dangerous oil spills that could destroy the fragile ecosystems that local people rely on for survival. The massive machines pose a major risk of RUNNING OVER nursing mama polar bears and their cubs that are denning under the ice — or even BURYING THEM ALIVE and CRUSHING THEM underneath mounds of heavy snow. The Biden administration has recently APPROVED a rule that permits even MORE fossil fuel activity in the Arctic — even though the U.S. Fish & Wildlife Service (FWS) confirmed a 95% probability that this increase will result in SERIOUS INJURY OR DEATH to the highly threatened Southern Beaufort polar bears who live there! Friend, we cannot stand for any more dirty energy handouts from the federal government. That’s why we’re counting on environmentalists like YOU to help put pressure on FWS to reject this new administrative rule and say NO to increased oil drilling in the Arctic. == == Thanks for using your voice to fight for the planet, Friends of the Earth == == == | == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == ==

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: a real killer for a campaign like ours
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Here is the direct and honest truth:
#

Peter -
Here is the direct and honest truth:
For a campaign like ours, funded primarily by small-dollar donations, we can’t afford stretches of weeks where fundraising slows down by too much.
When that happens, it can be a real killer for a campaign like ours.
We don’t have the collection of hedge fund managers and drug company executives who will drop a stack of $6,600 checks off at a fundraiser.
So we have to keep things moving knowing that people can’t give to every email they receive, but they can give to some of them over the course of the campaign.
We hope you’ll choose to give today.
We hope you’ll choose to give because we’re in one of those slow stretches right now.
We hope you’ll choose to give because we’ve set a 3-day fundraising drive to close the gap on our fundraising goals.
So please. Make today be the day you give to elect Ruben:
[**Please use this link to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for U.S. Senate. It is so critical we pick up our fundraising in this mid-month drive, and we can’t do it without people like you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230813-2-f&t=1&akid=920%2E734936%2Ew1hRBv)

name: Team Blue Arizona
subject: Feeling the heat of climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arizona Democrats**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68041490/421719712/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230813_PM1_T2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmZmYjk1OWMtMWYzYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_198bQGACkup_bJDuPxTzek_H207QNVbnE2tt-Hzl-E=)
---
Extreme heat across Arizona over the entire month of July. Devastating wildfires in Hawaii. Historic levels of flooding in Alaska. We don’t have to tell you that our climate is in danger, folks, we’re sure you can see and feel it just as much as we can. | Hi there,

_**Michigan is at the center of former president Trump’s most recent indictment. A key component of Trump’s plan to steal the 2020 election was to overturn the results in Michigan.**_ It reminds us that we only narrowly avoided a democratic collapse in 2020. Thanks to a few key districts narrowly voting Democratic, like MI-03, we were able to deny Trump’s second bid for the presidency.

_**These most recent indictments show that we cannot take Blue Michigan for granted.**_

That’s why it is so imperative that we organize early to hold one of the ‘swingy-est’ and most purple areas of the state - Hillary’s district in West Michigan. Her seat will play a key role in securing the presidency in 2024.

An investment in Hillary’s campaign is an investment in a Blue Michigan and an investment in staving off the anti-democratic attacks of extremists. name: Gov. Gavin Newsom
subject: The unfortunate truth:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I wanted to take just a minute to share how the Inflation Reduction Act is saving Americans money while also combating climate change. | | |
---
Hi Peter, it's Governor Gavin Newsom -- As a member of the president’s National Advisory Board, I wanted to take just a minute to share how the _Inflation Reduction Act_ is saving Americans money while also combating climate change. We know no other state is doing more to accelerate climate action than California. Thanks in part to the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , families across our state will be able to transition to clean energy sources -- and save money doing it. name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Why?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
As we continue the movement to unseat GOP extremist Jack Bergman, I wanted to highlight my story [https://www.votedrbob.com/post/my-story-i-just-want-to-help-people-all-about-bob] , and tell you my 'why'.
I'm running for Congress to be the leader I needed growing up.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Every politician says they're driven by "service," but it's crucial we recognize what that means. For me, it's the same reason I got into medicine; helping others is my purpose.
➤ READ MY STORY ➤ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
I'm running for Congress because I believe in a government of the people and the goodness of a Nation that helps hardworking rural families succeed, like my own growing up.
Life was never easy for my family - growing up in a low-income household, victimized by father's alcoholism, my five siblings and I grew up on the 'other side of the tracks' and sometimes relied on government assistance.
But, one day, I was inspired to pursue a career in medicine after seeing the impact that my best friend's father, a family physician, had on his patients' lives.
I remember his stories of helping people, how doctors heal, solve problems, complete puzzles, and fix things that are broken - and even though I didn't have much, I had a home full of love, laughter, and joy, and I knew I wanted to spend my life doing the same, to give back.
Today, I'm driven by that same desire to just help others. Simply put, it is my purpose.
I didn't get into medicine to help the elite with good medical coverage. I wanted to help people like my family - working class, rural, Veterans - folks on Medicaid and Medicare. I served in low income areas, Navajo Nation, and communities that struggled with mental health, addiction and poverty.
Why? They needed the help the most.
Similarly, being a representative is more than a job; it's a vocation.
I'm driven to serve because I love my country for its ability to be better and progress. I believe we can all make a difference in that journey, and I want to use my experience and qualifications to help citizens thrive.
It's as simple as that.
, You are the greatest component of my campaign, and I'm seeking a fundraising boost. Can you please chip in today?
To create change for people forgotten in rural America, I'm humbly asking you to stand in my corner.
-Dr. Bob
Dr. Bob Lorinser, MD, MSW, MPH
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan & the UP
Democrat, MI01

clean_body: | | | | Their feud could be a good thing for us... Peter, The New York Democrats are in crisis as they try to take back the House seats they lost in 2022. The matchup? Liz Whitmer Gereghty vs. Mondaire Jones. One, the sister of failed Michigan Governor, Gretchen Whitmer – the other, the former Rep. for NY-17, who quit on his constituents 4 months early when he lost his election. They’re both abysmal choices for Congress... But the good news is that they’re going to spend so much time and money attacking each other to see who is further to the left, whoever wins will enter the general election against Mike Lawler seriously hampered. In order to ensure we take advantage of the Dems infighting, we need your help. | | | | | Thank you, Lawler War Room | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- ==

name: Sen. Cory Booker
subject: Kirsten is 100% the real deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68042453/421723599/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4365-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDYxMjJhYy0yOTNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SCftYe6oG0MNcbEBxbhVPL24IVv4B6rc4_31qh2W5hM=)
Friend,
I’m not usually one to brag, but I’ll talk all day about just how lucky I am to count Kirsten Gillibrand as one of my closest friends in the Senate.
**_Kirsten is 100% the real deal._**
She’s fighting for progress on the issues that matter to families. She’s running an authentically grassroots campaign. She refuses to accept money from corporate PACs. She’ll outwork just about anybody. And she’s one of the most kind and caring people in Washington. (Trust me on this one — she even learned to cook vegan for me!)
**With so much extremism in Washington, we need people like Kirsten, who lead with love, approach problems with compassion, and hold a deep respect for public service.**
But Kirsten is up against some powerful forces this year. New York Republicans are riding a red wave from 2022 — and they’ve got their sights set on Kirsten’s seat. I’m going to do everything I can to make sure that Kirsten wins another term in the Senate so she can keep fighting for families like yours. That’s why I’m personally asking: [**Please, will you donate $5 or more before midnight tonight to help my friend compete with GOP megadonors and defend our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68042454/421723600/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4365-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDYxMjJhYy0yOTNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SCftYe6oG0MNcbEBxbhVPL24IVv4B6rc4_31qh2W5hM=)
With gratitude and love,

Cory
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68042455/421723601/1575385346?refcode=jtk4365-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDYxMjJhYy0yOTNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SCftYe6oG0MNcbEBxbhVPL24IVv4B6rc4_31qh2W5hM=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68042456/421723602/1575385346?refcode=jtk4365-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDYxMjJhYy0yOTNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SCftYe6oG0MNcbEBxbhVPL24IVv4B6rc4_31qh2W5hM=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68042457/421723603/1575385346?refcode=jtk4365-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDYxMjJhYy0yOTNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SCftYe6oG0MNcbEBxbhVPL24IVv4B6rc4_31qh2W5hM=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Nico (Team Katie Porter)
subject: Are you interested in volunteering?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Election Day for our campaign is March 5, 2024
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=28149%2E3422442%2E3H5jeU)
_This is a bit of a longer email about our future volunteer opportunities and the campaign.[**If you just want to make sure you’re added to our volunteer list, click here.**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-volunteer/?source=EMAK13_1_VOL_20230813_V1_F&akid=28149%2E3422442%2E3H5jeU)_
Hey Derek, Nico here.
I recently re-joined Team Katie Porter! In Katie’s last election to the House, I led our door-knocking program, which helped us defeat nearly $10 million in Republican spending and keep Katie in Congress.
As a native Californian, I couldn’t be more excited about Katie running state-wide. She’s exactly the leader we need—she hasn’t been in Washington for decades, collecting corporate PAC checks. Instead, she’s a minivan-driving single mom who effectively holds power to account and will always fight for working people.
**Election Day for our campaign is March 5, 2024.** We’re running in a competitive primary to advance to the General Election in November, and volunteers are going to be a crucial part of our win.
From door-knocking, to phone calls, to text banks, and event help, we’re going to need volunteers in every part of the state. **And if you’re not in California (or would rather help out from home) we’ll have plenty of virtual volunteer opportunities as well.**
I’ll be honest, Derek, one of our opponents has consistently outraised us. But Katie isn’t worried. As a single mom of three school aged-kids she’s used to being on a budget and doing more with less. Having a robust and active network of volunteers will help every dollar we spend go further.
[**If you think you might be interested in volunteering for our campaign, just make sure your contact information is on our list by clicking here.**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-volunteer/?source=EMAK13_1_VOL_20230813_V1_F&akid=28149%2E3422442%2E3H5jeU) You’ll hear more from me and the team as our campaign ramps up.
[Volunteer ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-volunteer/?source=EMAK13_1_VOL_20230813_V1_F&akid=28149%2E3422442%2E3H5jeU)
Thanks so much for reading, hope to see you on the campaign trail!
Nico

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK13_1_VOL_20230813_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=28149_3422442_3H5jeU&akid=28149%2E3422442%2E3H5jeU)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=28149%2E3422442%2E3H5jeU)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=28149%2E3422442%2E3H5jeU)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

body:
| | | Fellow American, We’re reaching out today because Josh Hawley needs us, and your contribution has yet to be registered in our database.

**Our mid-month deadline is in just TWO DAYS, and we MUST catch up on our fundraising goal this month.**

After our mid-month cutoff, it will be too late to catch up for the summer, putting us behind for the rest of the election.

We can’t win unless every patriot does their part, Fellow American, so we’ve provided a secure link for you to contribute to our mid-month deadline here: **[https://secure.winred.com/josh-hawley-committee/midmonth-rr-email](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=9bb1ff7e6c13498d9cbe0fb74f1d22c0&_e=4wd3E0rHPMQFoDrXHWJGUOfcYisQBBUQ1dRCq3PkG53_e8SWan7plK2JircOJquKGYSx71EoW2shxEMq9KaX23WGK7DkcbHGKb_9jBdALAKHRWsZJgAGEzBk5FwgWCIR73nFke6a7Prys-FJU2QcyoOZUityfmob1PN_m-3doR7Bq9nlMZuL08VagPSfIZO86x_hIYZyFPLT0ApYUUDL1wGrEssbgQlUkbzElGDFJ1kfAOBqqsA_CTPQIaf8GJrbNus5lsntnA4-AKCkpjKolp-UINmWaXDipKr72lvcGU3lIklRct9C7KPNG3b5Z2R4fo4FkHySFbjfWu2_JuwzjXpobuzhTeDTs5YRA9WBdEA_oSpSSpJy7nykVtINALS4mA1sjXttHi04zsfbuyeVq8-LTeqvB5jYfskcdGXcwkkC6lWKYDbfUItgYRrA5oe0)**

Dear Patriot,

My name is Wendy Davis, and I am running for Indiana's 3rd Congressional District. I am a Judge, military wife, military mom, a Christian, and a proud American who is deeply committed to the values that make this country great.[](http://links.davisforin.com/u/click?_t=3e9e6097e33749f890adf7e8c9b24a4e&_m=debf61989b9443178c7b0e878af75c5f&_e=-c_looIR9oBg78IASCS47OKFJGwWDHnIl4_43S3Y3Ii8uKiglHuHcqghR1tlWwyrAER10Bj4OXrGJkdm4JgofQ7rf2AgeHwI90kBMxSwzDE-1O8Fu6ojF1Gsz4vmK9hyoFtL9bSD7R2IM4EAqfrNp-mFl1AbDtpxAhv2MY1BVaftOpZ7AsLeH7QsywzDmN2Dw03wSHRRaZTiq8F3DHCbqotg4MfOxhxRoiYLaEIwquFFiwoWmnp49UfPA_DPfoao1-celpl2HUPqMqP8sY9Qc2CZAQRdF7oTOc6dJRAhHDudz3El6wbvLpbfIXanDbdpdXxJrUr9wtXqQTMI4Q3M0neQINLMhGrt_1i9YatWvkF8NVVwAOzwtY3P6Bk5pFitmwXtZWdFJZJ8SuglXYK62OaViRf9UXLHXHMyAU_2E9Y3WNVd0_jg01eiIfpy-DEQau_0RPJIJEqEPxcBjxO37r9Za2rz4YcfdaR2gCIVu0cs1r3OfE_7u67WzU1_PxaKy6SC4FdprGkpELyml2a1Vg%3D%3D)
As I travel around Northeast Indiana, I am struck by how many of us are deeply concerned about the direction our country is headed. We see wokeism running amok in our courtrooms, schools, and businesses. We see our borders being overrun by illegal immigrants and drugs pouring into Indiana and our country. We see the failed policies of the Biden administration causing chaos and destruction across the country.

But I am here to tell you that there is hope. I am running for Congress to make a difference on the federal level, to fight for the rule of law, to protect our Second Amendment rights, to stand up against wokeism and political correctness, to protect our unborn, and to secure our borders once and for all.

As a military mom and wife, I know how important it is to protect our families and our communities. That's why I will work tirelessly to protect our right to bear arms.

I am also deeply committed to reversing the failed policies of the Biden administration, securing our borders, and stopping the flow of drugs and illegal immigrants into our country. We cannot allow our communities to be destroyed by the chaos that comes with open borders and failed policies.

**_[But I can't do this alone. I need your help. I am asking you to make a donation to my campaign today. Every dollar you give will go directly towards helping me get elected and making a difference in Congress.](http://links.davisforin.com/u/click?_t=3e9e6097e33749f890adf7e8c9b24a4e&_m=debf61989b9443178c7b0e878af75c5f&_e=-c_looIR9oBg78IASCS47OKFJGwWDHnIl4_43S3Y3Ii8uKiglHuHcqghR1tlWwyrAER10Bj4OXrGJkdm4JgofQ7rf2AgeHwI90kBMxSwzDE-1O8Fu6ojF1Gsz4vmK9hyoFtL9bSD7R2IM4EAqfrNp-mFl1AbDtpxAhv2MY1BVaftOpZ7AsLeH7QsywzDmN2Dw03wSHRRaZTiq8F3DHCbqotg4MfOxhxRoiYLaEIwquFFiwoWmnp49UfPA_DPfoao1-celpl2HUPqMqP8sY9Qc2CZAQRdF7oTOc6dJRAhHDudz3El6wbvLpbfIXanDbdpdXxJrUr9wtXqQTMI4Q3M0neQINLMhGrt_1i9YatWvkF8NVVwAOzwtY3P6Bk5pFitM6n90_kcmVzGKg6jELurUe87JgjsG8G9l2tnLeGW82u90GAHtpdyhRzhm30FieUEUbY9zLOrfIYrb7bsw8oRiVyXEsq-ZRpyCr4-1xp9EuvHzpVV11CrQFXJmYVC4hrt_DY312ctpoQcOjCBDKuA7g%3D%3D)_**

Today is the final day to help the 191,000 voters impacted by Georgia Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger’s voter purge keep their registrations. _**[Will you please chip in $20 or anything you can to support our Prevent the Purge Fund and make sure we can contact every voter we possibly can?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68043274/421726784/309034870?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230813_f_voterpurge6_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDE0ZWJjMi0yZDNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HY1L8BT0DnCVgrFO3WC1SPGQeHpcd1z_q533jMuXTIc=)**_
This is probably not news to you: Georgia’s voter purges have become a topic of national embarrassment stretching back to Brian Kemp’s purging of half a million voters in July 2017 when he was Secretary of State. This blatant voter suppression in Georgia is one of the reasons why Fair Fight was founded.
Raffensperger has clearly followed in Kemp's footsteps. He might call these voter purges “an important tool for election integrity” but we — and you — know better.
**Fair Fight volunteers are still calling and texting voters to ensure we do everything possible to minimize the damage of the purge. We depend on support from voting rights champions like you in order to quickly launch and maintain this mobilization work.**
[_**To put it plainly: We need all hands on deck right now to make sure as many voters as possible stay on the rolls. Please rush a donation right away and help prevent a massive voter purge in Georgia. Your donation, no matter the amount, will go towards our organizing efforts for this and future voting rights fights.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68043275/421726785/309034870?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230813_f_voterpurge6_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDE0ZWJjMi0yZDNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HY1L8BT0DnCVgrFO3WC1SPGQeHpcd1z_q533jMuXTIc=)

body:
| | | I’m on a mission to hold Joe Biden accountable, but I need your help.

[**Will you fill out our open survey related to Joe Biden’s abuse of power?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=e7edb5f88b4446ec9de2fcf73e9dff51&_e=BZ1arYsnp5a69As-nDEP1nRLiQKmkIuU4POY0YLTQrrarVgG4_rKCecFUBVrThORTSDq9U0nqrxfJ9NT3YgPStjw1rU3Ao8XRgyt2HayhvtvwmiAkEDtqdYZtxN1BLJYqsRssoBORMiJJQEhEkpzLdYVuIJzKgWxD8QWiMM0ycVOx84y3DTy5K4X_8VwCDE5tLAQDpKs_P60ES24sdAYiqcVItx8pdFg-z2JuO4vM6Nwck4_1JeiFY0V27mKk-HvVop8cRCVNh0JjebLhVGBYVyf43e5QkAMn_WgbfITK8zkbUOGRBFzjNoHDIjIGOAH8NhRYYUbp_xc3GoMjCYRNC_gMUwa8iIEfaFJ7v0kavvNFA6BbJEFBcoZ8q8-a6VY)

It’s no wonder so many Americans have lost faith in government.

The Biden Administration has eroded all appearances of transparency, accountability, and equal justice under the law.

And while they destroy the fabric of America, they’re being rewarded with big campaign contributions from liberal big tech and Hollywood billionaires.

We need the information to fight back, and we can’t do it without input from grassroots patriots like you.

[**Please, fill out our open survey today and help me understand YOUR opinion on the Bidens’ abuse of power.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=e7edb5f88b4446ec9de2fcf73e9dff51&_e=BZ1arYsnp5a69As-nDEP1nRLiQKmkIuU4POY0YLTQrrarVgG4_rKCecFUBVrThORTSDq9U0nqrxfJ9NT3YgPStjw1rU3Ao8XRgyt2HayhvtvwmiAkEDtqdYZtxN1BLJYqsRssoBORMiJJQEhEkpzLdYVuIJzKgWxD8QWiMM0ycVOx84y3DTy5K4X_8VwCDE5tLAQDpKs_P60ES24sdAYiqcVItx8pdFg-z2JuO4vM6MM_zmLfs_uU9yCe2UGMLErsBdCJ974rToh6m9l-tzwmQHNvHIIc-QDwjWhBsXLSv97SNcHabgS0EVYjA-bxwEP8nNJPfUrVxoe0ueE3n_QTh51dW5JY6OS5aVUArK1W9TjJcZIUymzOsC6dVCu2a6S)

_A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott:_ Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. body:
During the last campaign, we got out-spent by Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs – by millions and millions of dollars.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68043384/421727243/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzU5MTEwZC0zMDNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lDlgvJhpRXaKv-6ENvV_xTscZZGEhB7ZuAGJquWouE=&emci=3487075a-2f3a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0359110d-303a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68043385/421727244/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzU5MTEwZC0zMDNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lDlgvJhpRXaKv-6ENvV_xTscZZGEhB7ZuAGJquWouE=&emci=3487075a-2f3a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0359110d-303a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
After the 2022 election, my husband Adam Frisch and I went to Washington for “freshman orientation” for new members of Congress.
We still didn’t know whether or not Adam had defeated Lauren Boebert. We were in the middle of a recount – and Adam was down by only a few hundred votes.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68043386/421727245/1610638071?refcode=em20230813pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=0359110d-303a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzU5MTEwZC0zMDNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lDlgvJhpRXaKv-6ENvV_xTscZZGEhB7ZuAGJquWouE=)
Ultimately, though, after all the votes were counted, Adam came up short. We lost to Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country.
Now, Adam’s running again in 2024 – and this time, I know he can win. But first, we have to fix the reason he so narrowly lost in 2022.
**During the last campaign, we got out-spent by Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs – by millions and millions of dollars.** It wasn’t that we didn’t put in the work (we did). It wasn’t that Adam didn’t have a positive vision for the district (he does). We were just drowned out in millions of dollars of lie-filled attack ads.
You see, Lauren Boebert is one of the best fundraisers in Congress. Her extreme, far-right base funnels millions to her campaign. But Adam doesn’t take money from corporate PACs – never has, never will.
**If Adam’s going to be able to finish the job and defeat Lauren Boebert this time, we cannot afford to get out-spent again – and we’re counting on your help now.**
**We’ve set a goal to raise another $300,000 before our mid-August deadline, but right now, we still have $61,792 left to raise.**
[**Please, can my husband Adam Frisch count on you to chip in $5 or more right now to his campaign – every dollar you can afford before our mid-August deadline – and help him finally defeat Lauren Boebert?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68043387/421727246/1610638071?refcode=em20230813pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=0359110d-303a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzU5MTEwZC0zMDNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lDlgvJhpRXaKv-6ENvV_xTscZZGEhB7ZuAGJquWouE=)

name: Casey HQ
subject: Our fundraising slowed down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=442%2E552475%2EgL6Txe)
Peter,
We have some bad news: as of today, **our fundraising has started to slow down.**
Our team is working overtime to raise as much as possible to help keep Bob Casey in the Senate. Pennsylvania is critical to holding our Senate majority, so the stakes are too high to leave anything to chance.
We can’t afford to slow down — and we’re relying on our grassroots supporters to get us back on track today.
[**Senate control is on the line, so we’re asking folks on our team to pitch in your first contribution today so we can close our fundraising gap. Can we count on your support?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230813-1?refcode=em20230813-1&refcode2=442_552475_gL6Txe&akid=442%2E552475%2EgL6Txe)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230813-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230813-1&refcode2=442_552475_gL6Txe&akid=442%2E552475%2EgL6Txe)**
We always knew Pennsylvania was going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country — that’s why it’s critical to ensure we’re prepared for everything the GOP will throw our way.
Most campaigns experience slower fundraising over the summer months, but it is critical we pick up the pace and close the gap before our mid-quarter deadline.
**[We’re humbly asking if you’ll help us meet our mid-quarter fundraising goal by making a contribution today. We’re relying on your support, Peter.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230813-1?refcode=em20230813-1&refcode2=442_552475_gL6Txe&akid=442%2E552475%2EgL6Txe)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230813-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230813-1&refcode2=442_552475_gL6Txe&akid=442%2E552475%2EgL6Txe)**
Thank you,
Team Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=442%2E552475%2EgL6Txe)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=442%2E552475%2EgL6Txe)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Tamie Wilson for US
subject: Jordan’s star witness backfired spectacularly
body:
Devon Archer showed that Jim Jordan was bluffing all along.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68043415/421727415/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDMxM2U5MTItMzEzYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bnxGXjgoNxiz8qVuDDy3f_WteBNERA8zZUf7dhgWa-c=)
---
Friend, Jim Jordan has been whipping the MAGA base into a frenzy with wild speculation about Hunter Biden, desperately trying to make a case for impeaching President Biden to his GOP House colleagues. Well, last week we got a peek at the deposition transcript of Jordan’s self-described “star witness” and...it’s about what you would expect from an “investigation” by a known liar like Jim Jordan. Devon Archer, summoned by Jim Jordan to testify behind closed doors about his knowledge of Hunter and Joe Biden’s (nonexistent) business dealings, **served up a classic nothingburger for the Judiciary Committee:**
---
| | The deposition showed that not only is there zero evidence for the massive allegations that Jordan and his cronies have cooked up about Joe Biden, but the man who was hyped as possessing a smoking gun against the Bidens turned out to have nothing but a plastic toy gun that spits out a “bang” flag. Jim Jordan isn’t even competent enough to fabricate a scandal for the MAGA base he is obsessed with manipulating and controlling. **The only scandal here is that Jim Jordan is allowed to continue serving in Congress after he played a key role in helping Trump strategize, plan, and execute his attempt to overturn the results of the 2020 election.** Jordan should be expelled for violating the Constitution — and we will watch in delight as Jordan is held accountable in court and Clooney’s documentary for being a man who swept under the rug dozens of credible reports of sexual abuse when he was entrusted with the care of student athletes as a coach at OSU. Tamie is running for US—to fight for all people of Ohio, to stand up for all of us who are sick of right wing demagogues like Jim Jordan stomping all over our Constitution and our democracy to hold power. Fascist bullies like Jordan must be stopped, and the only way we win is by standing together. **[Can you contribute $25 to support a leader like Tamie who will fight Jim Jordan for all of us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68043416/421727416/1649708063?refcode=nothingburgerNGP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDMxM2U5MTItMzEzYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bnxGXjgoNxiz8qVuDDy3f_WteBNERA8zZUf7dhgWa-c=)**

name: Liz
subject: already halfway through August
